Mountainous Mass.name: 山岳体量 Mountainous Mass
Mountainous Mass.description:
你的身体因一层层脂肪、肌肉与筋腱而隆起，使你与体型更小的 xotlxotl 同族进一步区分开来。你从你的族裔获得 20 生命值而非 10，并作为加值专长获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.KxaYlC50zzHysJj8]{泰坦摔角手} 技能专长。

Your body bulges with layers of fat, muscle, and sinew, further separating you from your smaller xotlxotl brethren. You gain 20 Hit Points from your ancestry instead of 10 and gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.KxaYlC50zzHysJj8]{Titan Wrestler} skill feat as a bonus feat.

Contagious Cynicism.name: 传染性犬儒 Contagious Cynicism
Contagious Cynicism.description:
你分享自己对他人意图的怀疑，使他人相信偏执是有理由的。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gMbrNFKz9NP3TR4s]{Inexhaustible Cynicism}作为一个你每天可施放一次的7级原始先天法术，但当你以此方式施放它时，它获得听觉和语言（特征）特性。

You share your skepticism about people's intentions, convincing others that paranoia is warranted. You gain @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gMbrNFKz9NP3TR4s]{Inexhaustible Cynicism} as a 7th-level primal innate spell that you can cast once per day, though when you cast it this way, it gains the auditory and linguistic traits.

Animal Facade.name: 动物伪装 Animal Facade
Animal Facade.description:
看到小妖精（特征）有时会暴露行踪，因此你学会了变为一种看似无害的动物形态，以便在四周潜伏而不被察觉。你的动物形态是一个特定的微型陆生动物形态。此形态鲜明且独特，你每次都会变成同一种形态。在你的动物形态下，你可能具有某种暗示你作为小妖精（特征）真实本性的显著特征，或也可能没有任何能将你与同种类其他动物区分开的特征。使用动物伪装视同为用于欺瞒的冒充用途而进行一次伪装，不过仅用于采用你的替代形态。在此微型动物形态中，你获得1级@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gfPjmG6Fe6D3MFjl]{害虫形态}的属性。你可以无限期保持你的替代形态，并且你可以再次使用此动作以变回你真正的小妖精（特征）形态。

Seeing a sprite can sometimes give the game away, so you’ve learned how to take the form of a seemingly-harmless animal in order to lurk about unnoticed. Your animal form is a specific form from a Tiny terrestrial animal. This form is distinctive and unique, and you change into the same form each time. In your animal form, you might possess a distinguishing characteristic that hints at your true nature as a sprite, or there might be nothing to distinguish you from other animals of the same species. Using Animal Facade counts as creating a disguise for the Impersonate use of Deception, though only to adopt your alternate form. In this Tiny animal form, you gain the statistics of a 1st-level @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gfPjmG6Fe6D3MFjl]{Pest Form}. You can remain in your alternate form indefinitely, and you can shift back to your true sprite form by using this action again.

Nihilist.name: 虚无主义者 Nihilist
Nihilist.description:
你对所遇之人的道德感到失望，这使你拒绝传统阵营。你获得对所有阵营伤害（混乱、邪恶、善良与守序）的抗力 3。此抗力在 13 级时提高至 4，在 17 级时提高至 5。你还获得对依赖阵营的效果之豁免的 +1 环境加值。若你对这类效果掷骰结果为成功，则改为大成功；若你对这类效果掷骰结果为大失败，则改为失败。

Your disappointment in the morals of those you've met causes you to reject conventional alignments. You gain resistance 3 to all alignment damage (chaotic, evil, good, and lawful). This resistance increases to 4 at 13th level and 5 at 17th level. You also gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against effects dependent on alignment. If you roll a success against such an effect, you get a critical success instead, and if you roll a critical failure against such an effect, you get a failure instead.

Prismatic Call.name: 虹彩呼唤 Prismatic Call
Prismatic Call.description:
频率 每日一次

无论是g’mayun的守护女神奇拉（Chira）的力量、混沌位面林波（Limbo）的未驯混沌，还是深渊（Abyss）的恶意无垠，你将这股力量召入体内，并以毁灭性的效果呼喊而出。不同的情绪创造出灵性力场，使g’mayun能够以真彩视觉“看见”声音，就像听见它们一样轻易，呈现为一道棱彩般的彩虹色谱。除这为听觉而非基于光之外，其效果与一个7环@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.d6o52BnjViNz7Gub]{Prismatic Spray}相同，使用你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者来决定该DC。

Frequency once per day

Whether it’s the power of the g’mayun’s patron goddess Chira, the untamed chaos of the chaotic plane of Limbo, or the malevolent infinity of the Abyss, you call the power into you and cry out with devastating effect. The different emotions create spiritual forces, allowing g’mayuns to see the sounds with truecolor sight as easily as hear them, in a rainbow of prismatic colors. Other than being auditory instead of based on light, this has the same effects as a 7th-level @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.d6o52BnjViNz7Gub]{Prismatic Spray}, using the higher of your class DC or spell DC to determine the DC.

Budding Hero.name: 新晋英雄 Budding Hero
Budding Hero.description:
你从一位亲代身上萌发而出，对方很可能是一位从英雄血脉传承下来的领袖。假设你的亲代确实出自英雄后裔，你的合唱团成员对你寄予厚望。你在交涉（Diplomacy）上成为受训（或者如果你已经在交涉上受训，则改为另一项技能），并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.KpFetnUqTiweypZk]{Group Impression}技能专长。你在对抗其他chochori的交涉检定上获得+1环境加值；如果你在交涉上是大师，则该环境加值提升为+2。

特殊 你只能在1级时选择此专长，而且你不能重训以获得此专长，也不能从此专长重训掉。

You were budded from a parent, most likely a leader descended from a heroic line. Assuming your parent descended from heroes, your choriste expects big things from you. You’re trained in Diplomacy (or another skill if you were already trained in Diplomacy), and you gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.KpFetnUqTiweypZk]{Group Impression} skill feat. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Diplomacy checks against other chochori, which increases to a +2 circumstance bonus if you’re a master in Diplomacy.

Special You can only select this feat at 1st level, and you can’t retrain into this feat or from this feat.

Curl Up.name: 蜷缩 Curl Up
Curl Up.description:
你可以蜷缩起来进行防御，以保护自己免受伤害。你获得对AC的+1环境加值，直到你下个回合开始。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.fGL1U0XgSukWP23Z]{效果：蜷缩}

You can curl up defensively to protect yourself from harm. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.fGL1U0XgSukWP23Z]{Effect: Curl Up}

Chochori Lore.name: 乔科里学识 Chochori Lore
Chochori Lore.description:
尽管众多的乔克里起源故事五花八门且相互矛盾，你仍尽可能多地学习了这些故事，以及其他各种关于灵性主题与自然之力的故事。你在自然与宗教中获得受训熟练度等级。若你原本会自动在其中一项技能中成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能中成为受训。你也在乔克里学识中成为受训。

While the many chochori origin stories are varied and contradictory, you’ve learned as many as you can, as well as all other sorts of stories about spiritual topics and forces of nature. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Nature and Religion. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also become trained in Chochori Lore.

Blessed Song.name: 祝福之歌 Blessed Song
Blessed Song.description:
无论该祝福的本质是天界、混沌或恶魔，你都可以吟唱一个次级祝福来提高你盟友的攻击，并持续吟唱以扩大其区域。你每天可以施放一次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XSujb7EsSwKl19Uu]{Bless} 作为一个神圣类天生法术。

Whether the blessing is celestial, protean, or demonic in nature, you can sing a minor blessing to improve your allies’ attacks, and continue singing to expand its area. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XSujb7EsSwKl19Uu]{Bless} once per day as a divine innate spell.

Bounding Reposition.name: 弹跃调位 Bounding Reposition
Bounding Reposition.description:
触发 一名敌人用近战攻击未命中你。

在闪避敌人的攻击后，你本能地跳开以远离进一步的危险。你进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{跃跳}。如果你拥有@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.tiXAmZgkC8ESP8Kx]{难以置信的跃跳者}，你可以改为进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{跳高}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{跳远}，但你不能将疾行作为这些动作的一部分。

Trigger A foe misses you with a melee attack.

After dodging your foe's attack, you instinctively hop away from further danger. You @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap}. If you have @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.tiXAmZgkC8ESP8Kx]{Unbelievable Leaper}, you can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{High Jump} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump} instead, but you can't Stride as part of these actions.

Earth's Eyes.name: 大地之眼 Earth's Eyes
Earth's Eyes.description:
你的双眼获得洞窟的深邃与大地的元素庇护，使你能够在黑暗中视物。你获得黑暗视觉。

Your eyes gain the depth of the caverns and the elemental protection of earth, allowing you to see in the dark. You gain darkvision.

Chochori Weapon Familiarity.name: 乔科里武器熟悉度 Chochori Weapon Familiarity
Chochori Weapon Familiarity.description:
你知道如何使用多种水动力穿刺武器进行战斗。你在匕首、戟、骑枪、长矛、刺剑、长矛、三叉戟上为受训。此外，你获得所有非普通的chochori武器的许可。为确定你的熟练度之目的，军用chochori武器视为简易武器，而高等chochori武器视为军用武器。

You know how to fight with a variety of aquadynamic piercing weapons. You are trained with daggers, halberds, lances, longspears, rapiers, spears, tridents. In addition, you gain access to all uncommon chochori weapons. For the purpose of determining your proficiency, martial chochori weapons are simple weapons and advanced chochori weapons are martial weapons.

Sense Community.name: 感官 社区 Sense Community
Sense Community.description:
对你来说，留意盟友已成本能。你在60英尺内知晓且自愿的盟友，若按理说你本应无法侦测到他们，则改为对你而言处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐蔽}而非无法侦测。你对60英尺内对你而言处于隐蔽状态的自愿盟友进行目标的纯骰检定DC为5，而非11。

It's second nature for you to be on the lookout for allies. Willing allies that you are aware of within 60 feet that would otherwise be undetected by you are instead @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} from you. The DC of the flat check for you to target willing allies within 60 feet that are hidden from you is 5 instead of 11.

Corrosive Spit.name: 腐蚀唾液 Corrosive Spit
Corrosive Spit.description:
你的酸性唾液现在只要给它一点时间，就能熔穿木头。你的酸液吐击徒手攻击造成1d6点酸性伤害而非1d4点，并且在一次大成功时，每个武器骰会造成1d4点持续酸性伤害，而非每个武器骰1点持续酸性伤害。

Your acidic spittle can now melt through wood, given a little time. Your acid spit unarmed attack deals 1d6 acid damage instead of 1d4, and on a critical hit deals 1d4 persistent acid damage per weapon die instead of 1 persistent acid damage per weapon die.

Resonant Refrain.name: 共鸣叠句 Resonant Refrain
Resonant Refrain.description:
你与作用于你灵魂的各种位面影响有着极其深刻的联系，因此你可以将伟大之歌作为载具、以你自己的灵魂作为音叉，亲身前往相关位面进行旅行。选择灵薄狱、涅槃或深渊。你每周可以施放两次@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{位面转移}，作为只能以你自身为目标的神圣先天法术；你只能旅行至所选的位面，并且你的灵魂充当专注成分。

You are so deeply connected to the various planar influences on your soul that you can physically travel to the plane in question, using the great song as the vessel and your own soul as the tuning fork. Choose Limbo, Nirvana, or the Abyss. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{Plane Shift} twice per week as a divine innate spell that can only target yourself; you can travel only to the chosen plane, and your soul serves as the focus component.

Counter Bully.name: 反制霸凌者 Counter Bully
Counter Bully.description:
触发 一名敌人导致你获得惊惧（状态）

你早已习惯于决斗式的支配展示，因此每当有人令你感到恐惧时，你都会本能地反击并威吓对方。你尝试对触发的敌人进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize}，而你凶狠的回应使你在威吓检定中获得+1环境加值。

 

Trigger A foe causes you to gain the frightened condition

You are so used to dueling displays of dominance that whenever someone frightens you, you instinctively push back and intimidate them. You attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} the triggering foe, and your vicious response grants you a +1 circumstance bonus to your Intimidation check.

Bottle Baby.name: 瓶中婴儿 Bottle Baby
Bottle Baby.description:
你可以与一个你能携带的非魔法瓶子建立羁绊，该瓶子的容量尺寸必须能容纳26盎司或更少的液态。为此，你必须对该瓶子进行绑定，使其转化为一件具有绑定（特征）的魔法物品。当你握持该绑定瓶子时，你可以使用@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.oc2dmFv7cpMzPRqe]{Bottle Up}动作进入其中。

You can bond with one nonmagical bottle you can carry that's sized to hold 26 ounces of liquid or less. To do so, you must invest in the bottle, transforming it into a magical item with the invested trait. While holding the invested bottle, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.oc2dmFv7cpMzPRqe]{Bottle Up} action to enter inside it.

Budding Psychic.name: 萌芽心灵术士 Budding Psychic
Budding Psychic.description:
你那过大的怪异耳朵能够侦测并向他人传递灵能思绪。虽然你尚未掌握这项技能，但你是个有天赋的新手与初露头角的灵能者。你可以每小时一次将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.D442XMADp01qJ7Cs]{Mindlink} 作为天生的秘法法术施放。

Your overlarge, strange ears can detect and transmit psychic thought to others. While you've yet to master this skill, you're a talented novice and budding psychic. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.D442XMADp01qJ7Cs]{Mindlink} as an innate occult spell once per hour.

Dreamwalk.name: 梦行 Dreamwalk
Dreamwalk.description:
你能轻松穿行于梦境之中，如同想象的幻影一般，在记忆与察觉的空隙间轻盈掠过。你变得如此如梦似幻，以至于你每10分钟可以使用一次 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.6nX9nQSNjFR24C0q]{Just a Dream}。

此外，当你使用 Just a Dream 时，你可以不进行一次迈步，而是向任意方向传送至多15尺，到达一个你能看见的位置。如果你选择以传送代替迈步，则 Just a Dream 获得咒法和传送（特征）特征。

You walk through dreams with ease, flitting across the lacunae in memory and perception like a figment of the imagination. You become so dreamlike that you can use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.6nX9nQSNjFR24C0q]{Just a Dream} once every 10 minutes.

Additionally, when you use Just a Dream, instead of taking a Step, you can teleport up to 15 feet in any direction to a location you can see. If you choose to teleport instead of Step, Just a Dream gains the conjuration and teleportation traits.

Stiffened Wings.name: 僵硬之翼 Stiffened Wings
Stiffened Wings.description:
频率 每天一次

你可以让你的翅膀变得僵硬，持续10分钟。在你的翅膀僵硬期间，你获得等同于你陆地速度的飞行速度。

Frequency once per day

You can stiffen your wings for 10 minutes. You gain a fly Speed equal to your land Speed while your wings are stiffened.

Go Cold Turkey.name: 突然戒断 Go Cold Turkey
Go Cold Turkey.description:
频率 每小时一次

你运用你的魔法，帮助一名盟友硬扛一项苦难，这会将该苦难从其体内清除，但可能比更循序渐进的治疗更危险。选择以你自己或一名被你触碰的盟友为目标，然后从该目标正在遭受的一项持续苦难中选择一项。该目标立即针对该苦难尝试豁免检定并获得+1状态加值，直到该苦难被清除，或他们已尝试了五次豁免检定（以先发生者为准）。他们承受任何豁免检定失败的所有通常效果，因此这可能会对目标造成伤害，甚至如果他们失败次数足以导致死亡，还可能会杀死他们。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.OU2t7wTPJF0XndsP]{效果：彻底戒断}

Frequency once per hour

Using your magic, you help an ally tough out an affliction, which clears the affliction from their system but might be more dangerous than a more gradual treatment. Choose to target yourself or a touched ally, then choose one ongoing affliction from which the target is suffering. The target immediately attempts saving throws against the affliction with a +1 status bonus, until either the affliction is cleared or they have attempted five saving throws, whichever comes first. They take all the usual effects of any failed saving throws, so this could prove harmful to the target or even kill them if they fail often enough to result in death.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.OU2t7wTPJF0XndsP]{Effect: Go Cold Turkey}

Bird Song.name: 鸟鸣 Bird Song
Bird Song.description:
你可以与鸟类交谈并理解它们及其歌声，这在很大程度上是因为你觉得它们以自己的方式与伟大之歌相连。你可以向鸟类提问、从它们那里得到回答，并对鸟类使用交涉（技能）。GM决定哪些动物算作鸟类。

You can speak to and understand birds and their song, in large part because you feel that they are connected, in their own way, to the great song. You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with birds. The GM determines which animals count as birds.

Dreaming Eyes.name: 梦幻之眼 Dreaming Eyes
Dreaming Eyes.description:
你的双眼已适应梦境与精神景观中变化不定的光照斑块，使你能在昏暗光照状态下看清事物。你获得弱光视野，使你能在昏暗光照下正常视物。若你拥有缚影传承，则你改为获得黑暗视觉。

Your eyes are adjusted to the variable patches of lighting found in dreams and mindscapes, allowing you to see in dim lighting conditions. You gain low-light vision, allowing you to see normally in dim light. If you have the shade-bound heritage, then you gain darkvision instead.

Earth's Voice.name: 大地之声 Earth's Voice
Earth's Voice.description:
你已学会与石头内部的声音交谈，呼唤生命质——万物之中上古碎片的残屑。尽管石头通常并不具备智能，你与生命质交谈；它们的个性会受石材种类影响，而对于经加工的石料，还会受其所隶属的建筑结构类型影响。石头的视角、察觉与知识赋予它一种与人类迥然不同的世界观，以至于它不会认为相同的细节重要。石头大多能回答关于过去触碰过它们的生物的问题，以及它们之下或其后被隐蔽之物。

You’ve learned how to speak with the voices inside of stones, calling upon the vitae, the fragments of the Eld within all things. While stone is not normally intelligent, you speak with the vitae, which have a personality colored by the type of stone, as well as by the type of structure the stone is part of, for worked stone. A stone’s perspective, perception, and knowledge give it a worldview different enough from a human’s that it doesn’t consider the same details important. Stones can mostly answer questions about creatures that touched them in the past and what is concealed beneath or behind them.

Drain Ingredients.name: 榨取材料 Drain Ingredients
Drain Ingredients.description:
频率 每小时一次

你从敌人的身体中以魔法抽出食材，将其转化为一顿美味餐食，你将其吞下以治疗自己。你对一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] 内的活敌人造成 @Damage[6d6[void]] 伤害，其进行一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] 强韧豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。你恢复等同于单个生物所受伤害的生命值；以受到最多伤害的生物来计算治疗量。

大成功 敌人不受影响。

成功 敌人受到一半伤害。

失败 敌人受到全额伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 1}。

大失败 敌人受到双倍伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drain 2}。

Frequency once per hour

You magically draw ingredients out of your enemies’ bodies, transforming them into a delicious meal, which you devour to heal you. You deal @Damage[6d6[void]] damage to living enemies in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] with a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. You heal Hit Points equal to the damage a single creature takes; calculate the healing using the creature that took the most damage.

Critical Success The enemy is unaffected.

Success The enemy takes half damage.

Failure The enemy takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

Critical Failure The enemy takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}.

Bountiful Banquet.name: 丰盛宴席 Bountiful Banquet
Bountiful Banquet.description:
你可以召唤异界实体来援助你准备一场华丽的盛宴，以抚慰身体并取悦所有宾客的味蕾。你习得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.yRf59eFtZ50cGlem]{Heroes' Feast}仪式，并且你可以通过将主要检定DC提高2来在不需要任何副施法者的情况下施放该仪式，不过在这种情况下你也必须进行所列出的次要检定之一。你可以通过将其DC提高2来使用烹饪学识进行主要检定。如果你同时进行这两项调整，DC提高是累加的。

You can summon extraplanar entities to aid you in creating a fabulous feast to soothe the body and delight the palate of all your guests. You learn the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.yRf59eFtZ50cGlem]{Heroes' Feast} ritual, and you can cast this ritual without needing any secondary casters by increasing the Primary Check DC by 2, though in that case you must also make one of the listed Secondary Checks. You can use Cooking Lore for the primary check by increasing its DC by 2. If you make both modifications, the DC increases are cumulative.

Invoke Name Mark.name: 唤名印记 Invoke Name Mark
Invoke Name Mark.description:
频率 每天一次

触发 你在一次意志豁免中失败

你呼唤你的名字所蕴含的力量，以令你的意志坚定不移。你可以对触发的豁免进行重骰，并使用更好的结果。

 

Frequency once per day

Trigger You fail a Will saving throw

You call upon the power of your name in order to hold your will steadfast. You can reroll the triggering saving throw and use the better result.

Cooking Weapon Familiarity.name: 烹饪武器熟悉度 Cooking Weapon Familiarity
Cooking Weapon Familiarity.description:
你擅长使用那些在绝境时可能兼作武器的烹饪器具，例如剁肉刀、片鱼刀和嫩肉槌。你在匕首、窃贼叉、手斧、镰刀和轻锤上为受训，并获得窃贼叉和镰刀的许可。

此外，你获得所有非普通orpok武器的许可。为了决定你的熟练度，军用orpok武器视为简易武器，而高级orpok武器视为军用武器。

You are handy with cooking implements that might double as weapons in desperate straits, such as cleavers, filleting knives, and tenderizing mallets. You are trained with daggers, filcher’s forks, hatchets, kamas, and light hammers, and you gain access to filcher’s forks and kamas.

In addition, you gain access to all uncommon orpok weapons. For the purpose of determining your proficiency, martial orpok weapons are simple weapons and advanced orpok weapons are martial weapons.

Life of the Party.name: 派对的灵魂 Life of the Party
Life of the Party.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你拒绝让死亡阻碍你的宾客享受并毁掉你的派对。你为一名相邻的生物提供一杯特制饮品，或向其举杯鼓舞；该生物已死亡，且在不超过2轮前仍正从 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.M2DHoTWpUrQKGlzH]{Revel} 中受益。当你这么做时，该生物立刻以1点生命值复活，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded 1}。

Frequency once every 10 minutes

You refuse to even let death get in the way of your guests enjoyment and ruin your party. You administer a special drink or offer a rallying toast to an adjacent creature who has died while benefiting from @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.M2DHoTWpUrQKGlzH]{Revel} no more than 2 rounds ago. When you do, that creature is immediately returned to life with 1 Hit Point and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded 1}.

Earthen Gate.name: 土之门 Earthen Gate
Earthen Gate.description:
你与大地元素的协调性极其强大，以至于你可以直接开启通往大地元素位面的门户，也能设法返回物质位面。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{位面转移}作为一个原始传承的天生法术。你每周可以施放两次。你只能使用该位面转移天生法术在大地元素位面与物质位面之间来回旅行。由于你身体的自然共鸣，你可以充当该法术的法术焦点，并且不需要音叉。

Your attunement to the earth element is so strong that you can open gateways directly to the Elemental Plane of Earth, as well as make your way back to the Material Plane. You gain @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{Plane Shift} as a primal innate spell. You can cast it twice per week. You can use this plane shift innate spell only to travel back and forth between the Elemental Plane of Earth and the Material Plane. Due to your body’s natural resonance, you can act as the spell focus, and you don’t require a tuning fork.

Kragrak Lore.name: 克拉格拉克学识 Kragrak Lore
Kragrak Lore.description:
你曾跟随定居点里年长的克拉格拉克学习，了解元素与周遭的世界，以及古老的故事。你在自然与生存中获得受训（熟练度）。若你会自动在这些技能之一中变为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能中变为受训。你也在克拉格拉克学识中变为受训。

You’ve studied with the older kragraks in your settlement and learned about the elements and the world around you, as well as the old stories. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Nature and Survival. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also become trained in Kragrak Lore.

Earth's Call.name: 大地的召唤 Earth's Call
Earth's Call.description:
你可以呼唤上方的生物降下来，在下方地面与你会合。每天一次，你可以将@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gPvtmKMRpg9I9D7H]{Earthbind}作为原初先天法术施放。

You can call creatures from above down to meet you on the ground below. Once per day, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gPvtmKMRpg9I9D7H]{Earthbind} as a primal innate spell.

Earthroil.name: 地涌 Earthroil
Earthroil.description:
频率 每日一次

你将自己与大地调谐，并依照你的命令操纵其形态，在你60尺内的地面上，以@Template[type:burst|distance:15]创造一片临时的困难地形。由你的Earthroil形成的这片困难地形持续1分钟，随后大地会粗略地回落为其原本的形态。

Frequency once per day

You attune yourself to the earth and manipulate its form as you command, creating a temporary region of difficult terrain in a @Template[type:burst|distance:15] on the ground, within 60 feet. This difficult terrain formed from your Earthroil lasts for 1 minute before the earth roughly sloughs back into its original form.

Dolent Aria.name: 哀恸咏叹调 Dolent Aria
Dolent Aria.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你吟唱一段优美而哀伤的旋律，使悲伤侵入敌人的心中。60尺内的一名敌人必须在一次 @Check[type:will|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] 中获得成功（DC取你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者），否则将获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} 状态，持续1分钟。在此期间，每当该敌人受到攻击时，他们都可以再尝试一次意志豁免；成功则提前结束该效果。无论如何，该敌人会在24小时内对Dolent Aria暂时免疫。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

You sing a beautiful and mournful melody to inflict sorrow in the heart of your foe. One foe within 60 feet must succeed at a @Check[type:will|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)], with the higher of your class DC or spell DC, or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 minute. Each time the foe is attacked during this time, they can attempt another Will save, ending the effect early on a success. Regardless, the foe is temporarily immune to Dolent Aria for 24 hours.

Enduring Glare.name: 持久怒视 Enduring Glare
Enduring Glare.description:
你那严厉的怒视所激起的力场波浪，在你毫不动摇的意志支撑下达到魔法的高峰，使你能够用力场创造一张愤怒的面孔来替你挡在前方。每天一次，你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rMGkk23qWvxTmgA8]{Forceful Hand} 作为5级原初先天法术施放，但其形态是你阴沉的面孔，而非一只无形之手。

The wave of force generated by your stern glare and buoyed by your unflinching willpower reaches magical heights, allowing you to create an angry face out of force to interpose for you. Once per day, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rMGkk23qWvxTmgA8]{Forceful Hand} as a 5th-level primal innate spell, but it takes the shape of your scowling face rather than a disembodied hand.

Bully.name: 恶霸 Bully
Bully.description:
你知道如何只凭一瞥就能支配他人。你在威吓（Intimidation）中变为受训（如果你已经在威吓中受训，则改为选择另一项你选择的技能），并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.xQMz6eDgX75WX2ce]{Intimidating Glare} 技能专长作为加值专长。

You know how to dominate others with a mere look. You are trained in Intimidation (or another skill of your choice if you're already trained in Intimidation) and gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.xQMz6eDgX75WX2ce]{Intimidating Glare} skill feat as a bonus feat.

Amphibious Practice.name: 两栖训练 Amphibious Practice
Amphibious Practice.description:
你已经练习了在陆地与水下的移动。你的陆地速度从20尺提高到25尺；如果你拥有陆行者传承，你的游泳速度则改为提高到30尺。

You’ve practiced movement both on land and underwater. Your land Speed increases from 20 feet to 25 feet; if you have the landwalker heritage, your swim Speed increases to 30 feet instead.

Earthen Burrow.name: 土遁 Earthen Burrow
Earthen Burrow.description:
你利用自己与大地元素的个人联系来调谐自身，并缓慢地在松散的大地中掘进。你获得15尺的掘地速度。

You use your personal ties to the element of earth in order to attune yourself and burrow slowly through loose earth. You gain a burrow speed of 15 feet.

Tongue Tether.name: 口舌系绳 Tongue Tether
Tongue Tether.description:
你修长而柔韧的舌头能完成相当多的事。只要你能自由张口，你就不需要空闲的手来进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{解除武装}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.3yoajuKjwHZ9ApUY]{抓住边缘}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{绊摔}。如果你拥有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.OK8X6QFRuRxpBMcZ]{长舌}专长，你可以用舌头在超出你正常触及5尺的距离进行解除武装、抓住边缘和绊摔。

Your long and sinuous tongue can accomplish quite a few things. So long as you can freely open your mouth, you do not need free hands in order to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{Disarm}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.3yoajuKjwHZ9ApUY]{Grab an Edge}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip}. If you have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.OK8X6QFRuRxpBMcZ]{Long Tongue} feat, you can Disarm, Grab an Edge, and Trip with your tongue at a distance that is 5 feet beyond your normal reach.

Eye for Plunder.name: 掠夺之眼 Eye for Plunder
Eye for Plunder.description:
你拥有一种超自然的感官，使你能够快速清点物品，这在合法与非法职业中都尤为有用。你在下列之一的学识中为受训：黑社会学识或商业学识。你可以将@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.EqdSKqr8Qj5TUhMR]{Approximate}作为原初先天戏法施放。戏法会被升阶至等于你等级一半（向上取整）的法术等级。

You have a supernatural sense that allows you to quickly count items, which is particularly helpful in both legal and illegal professions. You are trained in your choice of Underworld Lore or Mercantile Lore. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.EqdSKqr8Qj5TUhMR]{Approximate} as a primal innate cantrip. A cantrip is heightened to a spell level equal to half your level rounded up.

Sweat Toxin.name: 汗毒素 Sweat Toxin
Sweat Toxin.description:
触发 一个相邻的敌人以近战武器攻击命中你，或一个敌人以近战徒手攻击命中你

你从皮肤渗出毒素，使命中你的敌人暴露于你的毒素之下。你对触发的敌人造成你的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.4ZDb3iddvdjckn00]{Exude Toxin} 伤害，该敌人尝试进行一次对抗你职业DC的 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.system.attributes.classDC.value)|basic:true] 豁免。如果你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.NUHcJWnab2IrsCZx]{Persistent Toxin} 专长，则当你 Sweat Toxin 时，你可以改为使用其造成持续伤害。

Trigger An adjacent foe hits you with a melee weapon attack or a foe hits you with a melee unarmed attack

You sweat toxin from your skin, exposing the foe who hit you to your toxin. You deal your @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.4ZDb3iddvdjckn00]{Exude Toxin} damage to the triggering foe, who attempts a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.system.attributes.classDC.value)|basic:true] save against your class DC. If you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.NUHcJWnab2IrsCZx]{Persistent Toxin} feat, you can use it to deal persistent damage instead when you Sweat Toxin.

Rending Hurricane.name: 撕裂飓风 Rending Hurricane
Rending Hurricane.description:
频率 每小时一次

你呼唤更深层的情感源泉，将你的撕裂狂飙强化为威力惊人的飓风。若你接下来的动作是撕裂狂飙，说明一个你当前正在面对的情感动荡来源。你将冲突注入狂飙，使其区域增至 @Template[type:cone|distance:30]，并将其伤害骰从d4提升为d8。

Frequency once per hour

Calling upon a deeper source of emotion, you grow your Rending Squall into a powerful hurricane. If your next action is Rending Squall, name a source of emotional turmoil with which you are currently dealing. You feed the conflict into the squall, increasing its area to a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] and increases its damage dice from d4s to d8s.

Hardriggan Weapon Expertise.name: 哈德里甘武器专精 Hardriggan Weapon Expertise
Hardriggan Weapon Expertise.description:
很少有人能与你对硬索人所用武器的熟练度相比。每当你获得一项职业特性，使你在特定武器上获得专家或强效熟练度时，你也会在你的头槌、你所有已受训的硬索人武器，以及你通过“硬索人武器熟悉”专长所受训的武器上获得同样的熟练度。

Few can compare to your proficiency with the weapons hardriggans use. Whenever you gain a class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency in certain weapons, you also gain that proficiency in your headbutt, all hardriggan weapons in which you are trained, and the weapons you are trained with from the Hardriggan Weapon Familiarity feat.

Cooking Weapon Talent.name: 烹饪武器天赋 Cooking Weapon Talent
Cooking Weapon Talent.description:
你在使用烹饪器具方面的天赋转化为在战斗中更好地使用它们的能力。每当你使用orpok武器或“烹饪武器熟悉”专长中列出的武器造成大成功或大失败时，你都会施加该武器的大成功或大失败专精效果。

Your talent for handling cooking implements translates into an ability to use them better in a fight. Whenever you critically hit using an orpok weapon or one of the weapons listed in the Cooking Weapon Familiarity feat, you apply the weapon’s critical specialization effect.

Smoke Vision.name: 烟雾 视野 Smoke Vision
Smoke Vision.description:
灰烬与烟雾和火一样，都是你存在的一部分。通过让自己与弥漫在烟雾空气中的微小颗粒调谐，你可以清晰地透过它看见。烟雾不会妨碍你的视野；你无视由烟雾造成的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽（状态）}状态。

Ash and smoke are just as much of a part of your being as fire. By attuning yourself to the fine particles that linger in smoky air, you can see through it clearly. Smoke doesn’t impair your vision; you ignore the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition from smoke.

Cooking Weapon Expertise.name: 烹饪武器专精 Cooking Weapon Expertise
Cooking Weapon Expertise.description:
如同一盘精致的战争佳肴，你将对烹饪器具的熟悉与自身职业的训练与技巧相融合，创造出一个强效于各部分总和的整体。每当你获得一项职业特性，使你在某些武器上获得专家或强效熟练度时，你也在匕首、窃贼叉、小手斧、镰刀、轻锤，以及所有你受训的orpok武器上获得该熟练度。

Like an exquisite dish of warfare, you blend your familiarity with cooking implements with your class’s training and techniques in order to create a whole that is greater than the sum of its parts. Whenever you gain a class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency in certain weapons, you also gain that proficiency in daggers, filcher’s forks, hatchets, kamas, light hammers, and all orpok weapons in which you are trained.

Cartilaginous Twist.name: 软骨扭曲 Cartilaginous Twist
Cartilaginous Twist.description:
频率 每轮一次

你的身体以更为坚实的形态无法做到的方式扭曲并转动。尝试一次检定以进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}。如果你掷出成功，你改为获得大成功或大失败；如果你掷出大成功或大失败，你可以在决定是否跨步5英尺之前，选择对你所逃脱的那个生物进行一次打击。如果你失败，则改为第二次尝试逃脱；你会根据你进行的两个动作相应地增加你的多重攻击减值，但仅在完成所有动作之后才计算。

Frequency once per round

Your body twists and turns in ways that more solid forms can't. Attempt a check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}. If you roll a success, you get a critical success instead, and if you roll a critical success, you can choose to Strike the creature from which you Escaped before deciding whether to Stride 5 feet. If you fail, you instead attempt to Escape a second time; you increase your multiple attack penalty as appropriate for both the actions you took, but only after completing all the actions.

Dream Magic.name: 梦境 魔法 Dream Magic
Dream Magic.description:
你在梦境与梦魇上拥有强大的力量，使你能够令虚弱的生物陷入沉睡并惊吓你的敌人。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4koZzrnMXhhosn0D]{恐惧} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.o4lRVTwSxnOOn5vl]{睡眠} 作为1环异术天生法术。你每天可以施放每个法术一次。

You wield great power over dreams and nightmares, allowing you to send weak creatures to slumber and scare your foes. You gain @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4koZzrnMXhhosn0D]{Fear} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.o4lRVTwSxnOOn5vl]{Sleep} as 1st-level occult innate spells. You can cast each spell once per day.

Durable Ally.name: 坚韧盟友 Durable Ally
Durable Ally.description:
你知道该如何以及何时建议你的盟友承受艰辛。你可以使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{援助}反应动作来给予一名相邻生物的强韧豁免加值。如同援助的常规规则，你必须在自己的回合使用一个动作进行准备，例如向盟友描述该如何为麻烦做好准备，或如何咬紧牙关挺过痛苦。

You know just how and when to advise your allies on withstanding hardship. You can use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{Aid} reaction to grant a bonus to an adjacent creature’s Fortitude saving throw. As normal for Aid, you must prepare by using an action on your turn, such as to describe to the ally how to brace themselves for trouble or how to grit their teeth through the pain.

Bottle Tricks.name: 瓶子把戏 Bottle Tricks
Bottle Tricks.description:
当你在已投入的瓶子内时，除了能够使用一个动作离开瓶子之外，你还可以花费一个动作来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover}，使你从瓶子获得的掩蔽从标准掩蔽提升为强效掩蔽，并使你在瓶子内时变得没有重量——允许瓶子在空瓶时会漂浮的情况下漂浮，或让你在瓶子内时恢复你的正常重量。当你从瓶子中出来时，你会自动恢复你的正常重量。

While you're inside your invested bottle, in addition to being able to use an action to leave the bottle, you can spend an action to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover}, increasing the cover you gain from your bottle to greater cover instead of standard cover, to become weightless while inside the bottle—allowing the bottle to float if it would float when empty, or to regain your normal weight when inside the bottle. You automatically regain your normal weight when you emerge from the bottle.

Chora's Call.name: 寇拉的召唤 Chora's Call
Chora's Call.description:
频率 每天一次

你唤起你的chora的力量，令你的敌人遭受浩劫。元素的狂乱降临于120英尺内的一个@Template[type:burst|distance:20]。区域内的所有生物受到@Damage[3d6[fire],1d6[persistent,fire]]{3d6火伤害与1d6持续火}，并针对你更高的职业DC或法术DC进行一次@Check[type:reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)|basic:true]基础豁免。伤害与持续伤害的类型取决于你的chora，而Chora’s Call也会根据你的chora获得一个额外的A:特征。若你在生命中一次重大的生命转变期间于日后改变你的chora，你的伤害类型与A:特征也会随之改变以匹配。到10级时，并在其后每2级，Chora’s Call的伤害增加1d6，至20级时最多为9d6。

各chora的伤害类型与A:特征如下：若你是aikrys，伤害为挥砍且A:特征为空气；若你是carbor，伤害为穿刺且A:特征为植物；若你是farose，伤害与A:特征均为火；若你是hypisk，伤害为钝击且A:特征为水；若你是jamambri，伤害与A:特征均为电击；若你是terath，伤害为钝击且A:特征为大地；若你是vergiss，伤害与A:特征均为寒冷。

Frequency once per day

You call forth the power of your chora to wreak havoc upon your foes. Elemental mayhem descends upon a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] within 120 feet. All the creatures in the area take @Damage[3d6[fire],1d6[persistent,fire]]{3d6 fire damage and 1d6 persistent fire}, with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)|basic:true] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. The damage type for both the damage and the persistent damage depends on your chora, and Chora’s Call gains an additional trait depending on your chora. If you change your chora later in life during a major life transition, your damage type and trait change to match. At 10th level, and every 2 levels thereafter, the damage from Chora’s Call increases by 1d6, to a maximum of 9d6 at 20th level.

The damage type and trait for each chora are as follows: If you’re aikrys, the damage is slashing and the trait is air; if you’re carbor, the damage is piercing, and the trait is plant; if you’re farose, the damage and trait are both fire; if you’re hypisk, the damage is bludgeoning and the trait is water; if you’re jamambri, the damage and trait are both electricity; if you’re terath, the damage is bludgeoning and the trait is earth; if you’re vergiss, the damage and trait are both cold.

Quick Disassemble.name: 快速拆卸 Quick Disassemble
Quick Disassemble.description:
需求 你正持有一件负载为1或更低的物品。

你试图迅速拆解你手中物品的足够多关键部件，使其在有人修好之前无法运作。进行一次工艺检定，对抗制作你所持物品所需的相同DC，并根据你的结果产生相应效果。若你尝试对一件特别难以损坏或摧毁的物品使用此动作，例如一件诅咒物品或一件神器，你将自动失败。

大成功或大失败 你将物品拆解得非常彻底，以至于简单修理已不足以恢复。该物品实际上被摧毁，并被分解为其组成部件。若你不希望如此彻底地摧毁该物品，你可以选择改为承受成功的结果。

成功 你只拆解了刚好足够的部件，使该物品在修好之前无法运作。该物品变为损坏。

失败 你无法拆解该物品，该物品不受影响。

Requirements You are holding an item of 1 Bulk or less.

You attempt to quickly disassemble enough crucial pieces of the item you’re holding that it won’t work until someone fixes it. Make a Crafting check against the same DC it would take to Craft the item you are holding, with effects depending on your result. If you try to use this action on an item that is especially difficult to harm or destroy, such as a cursed item or an artifact, you automatically fail.

Critical Success You disassemble the item so well that simple repairs won’t suffice. The item is effectively destroyed and reduced to its constituent parts. You can choose to take the results of a success instead if you prefer not to destroy the item so thoroughly.

Success You disassemble just enough pieces that the item won’t work until it’s fixed. The item becomes broken.

Failure You aren’t able to disassemble the item, and the item is unaffected.

Interconnectivity.name: 互联互通 Interconnectivity
Interconnectivity.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 你即将掷先攻。

你已精通让人们团结起来协同工作。选择至多三名位于你15尺内且自愿的盟友。在同时看到你们双方的结果后，若你的先攻结果更高，他们可以使用你的先攻结果。每有一名盟友选择这样做，你在战斗的第一个回合失去一个动作（若一名盟友使用你的掷骰，你失去一个动作；若两名盟友使用你的掷骰，你失去两个动作；若三名盟友都使用你的掷骰，你失去三个动作）。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You are about to roll initiative.

You have mastered bringing people together to work in unison. Choose up to three willing allies within 15 feet. They can use your result for initiative if your initiative result is higher after seeing both results. For each ally who chooses to do so, you lose one action on your first turn of combat (you lose one action if one ally uses your roll, two actions if two allies use your roll, and three actions if all three allies use your roll).

Determined Gourmand.name: 坚毅饕客 Determined Gourmand
Determined Gourmand.description:
无论疾病或健康，你都发誓尽可能多地进食，不顾自己胃部的咕噜作响或身体的抗议。恶心（状态）不会阻止你摄入任何东西。你在通过呕吐来降低恶心（状态）时，对@Check[type:fortitude|traits:action:retch|overrideTraide:true] 强韧豁免获得+1环境加值。

In sickness or in health, you vow to eat as much as you can, regardless of your stomach’s rumbling or the protestations of your body. The sickened condition doesn’t prevent you from ingesting anything. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to @Check[type:fortitude|traits:action:retch|overrideTraide:true] saves made to reduce the sickened condition by retching.

Sudden Mutation.name: 突发突变 Sudden Mutation
Sudden Mutation.description:
频率 每天一次

你的身体具有非自然的可变性。你获得此专长时，选择一种普通的1级诱变剂。当你启动此专长时，你在1分钟内获得该诱变剂的益处与缺陷。

特殊 你可以多次获得此专长，每次选择一种不同的诱变剂。

Frequency once per day

Your body possesses unnatural mutability. When you take this feat, select a single common 1st-level mutagen. When you activate this feat, you gain the benefits and drawbacks of that mutagen for 1 minute.

Special You may take this feat more than once, selecting a different mutagen each time.

Chronicler Obsession.name: 编年史家执念 Chronicler Obsession
Chronicler Obsession.description:
你对g’mayun的历史如此痴迷，致力于寻找失落的碎片并保存你已知的一切，以至于你总是比任何人都更了解它，而且你从不出错。你在进行关于g’mayun、g’mayun社会或g’mayun历史的回忆知识检定时获得+1环境加值。若你用于该检定的技能为大师，你改为获得+2环境加值；若为传奇，你改为获得+3环境加值。若你在对这些主题进行回忆知识检定时大失败，你改为获得失败。若你在对这些主题进行回忆知识检定时成功，你会获得额外的背景信息；若你获得大成功，，由GM酌情决定，你可能会获得比通常更多的额外信息或背景。

You are so obsessed with g’mayun history, finding the lost pieces and preserving what you know already, that you always know more than anyone else about it, and you never make a mistake. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on checks to Recall Knowledge about g’mayun, g’mayun society, or g’mayun history. If you are a master in the skill you used for the check, you get a +2 circumstance bonus instead, and if you’re legendary, you get a +3 circumstance bonus instead. If you critically fail a check to Recall Knowledge about those topics, you get a failure instead. If you succeed at a check to Recall Knowledge about those topics, you gain additional context, and if you get a critical success,, at the GM’s discretion you might gain even more additional information or context than normal.

Party Planner.name: 队伍策划者 Party Planner
Party Planner.description:
通过提前筹划聚会，你可以随时准备好举办一场庆典。当你掷骰先攻时，你可以以自由动作（） @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.M2DHoTWpUrQKGlzH]{Revel}。如果你在酒类学识、烹饪学识或表演技能上达到传奇，你可以在使用与你的技能相关的临时武器（例如大酒杯、平底锅或吉他）进行攻击掷骰并获得重大成功时，使用反应动作来进行 Revel。

By planning parties in advance, you can prepare to host a celebration at a moment's notice. When you roll initiative, you can @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.M2DHoTWpUrQKGlzH]{Revel} as a free action. If you're legendary in Alcohol Lore, Cooking Lore, or Performance you can use a reaction to Revel when you critically succeed at an attack roll with an improvised weapon associated with your skill (such as a tankard, frying pan, or guitar).

Dolent Crescendo.name: 哀怨渐强 Dolent Crescendo
Dolent Crescendo.description:
频率 每小时一次

你的哀怨咏叹调达到惊人的高潮，影响附近所有敌人。若你的下一个动作是使用哀怨咏叹调，则你的咏叹调会影响60尺内的所有敌人，而非仅影响一个敌人。

 

Frequency once per hour

Your Dolent Aria hits an incredible crescendo, affecting all foes nearby. If your next action is to use Dolent Aria, your aria affects all foes within 60 feet, instead of just affecting one foe.

Demon Hunter.name: 恶魔猎人 Demon Hunter
Demon Hunter.description:
你运用伟歌中残存的恶魔联结，直击其痛处并洞悉其弱点。你以武器和徒手攻击对抗恶魔时，伤害获得环境加值。该加值等于你的武器或徒手攻击的武器伤害骰数量（起始为+1，使用强袭武器或强袭徒手攻击时为+2，依此类推）。当你成功进行一次关于恶魔的回忆知识检定时，除任何其他信息外，你总会额外得知其罪孽弱点；若你本来就会得知其罪孽弱点，则改为得知另一条信息。若你是 ironbeak g’mayun，你的喙部徒手攻击在用于判定恶魔对冷铁的弱点时视为冷铁（但不会对其他对冷铁有弱点的生物生效，例如妖精）。若你是 nighteyes g’mayun，你对抗恶魔时，你的察觉检定与DC获得+2环境加值。

You use the demonic connection that remains in the great song to hit them where they hurt and intuit their weaknesses. You gain a circumstance bonus to damage with weapons and unarmed attacks against demons. This bonus is equal to the number of weapon damage dice of your weapon or unarmed attack (starting at +1, then +2 with a striking weapon or unarmed attack, and so on). When you succeed at a check to Recall Knowledge about a demon, you always learn its sin weakness in addition to any other information; if you would have already learned its sin weakness, you learn a different piece of information instead. If you’re an ironbeak g’mayun, your beak unarmed attack counts as cold iron for the purpose of determining demons’ weakness to cold iron (but not other creatures weak to cold iron, like fey). If you are a nighteyes g’mayun, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Perception checks and DCs against demons.

Emissary Familiar.name: 使者魔宠 Emissary Familiar
Emissary Familiar.description:
你的鹦鹉或热带鸟类魔宠是一个被称为神圣使者的特殊存在，它从神圣领域被派遣到你身边，并带着自己的目的。当你选择此专长时，选择一个与该魔宠的神圣联结相匹配的阵营：与g’mayun守护女神相连的魔宠选择善良阵营、与原生体（protean）相连选择混乱中立、与恶魔相连选择混乱邪恶。由GM酌情决定，你可以选择不同的阵营与联结。该魔宠具有你所选择的阵营。它获得言语魔宠能力作为一项加值能力，这不计入它可拥有的能力数量的正常上限。此外，每分钟一次，它可以施放@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.izcxFQFwf3woCnFs]{引导}作为一个神圣天生法术。

Your parrot or tropical bird familiar is a special entity called a divine emissary, which was sent to you from the divine realms with its own agenda. When you select this feat, choose an alignment that matches the familiar’s divine connection, either good-aligned for a familiar connected to the g’mayun patron goddess, chaotic neutral for a protean connection, or chaotic evil for a demonic connection. At the GM’s discretion, you can choose a different alignment and connection. The familiar has the alignment you chose. It gains the speech familiar ability as a bonus ability, which does not count against the normal limit to the number of abilities it can have. Furthermore, once per minute, it can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.izcxFQFwf3woCnFs]{Guidance} as a divine innate spell.

Imaginary Toxin.name: 虚构毒素 Imaginary Toxin
Imaginary Toxin.description:
你在双手上显现出一层魔法膜，从你的目标身上汲取想象力与灵体。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.F3KQBROagKZ93FV5]{显现薄膜} 动作，你可以用其来创造这种梦境薄膜毒素。你免疫于你自己的梦境薄膜。你的梦境薄膜的豁免DC等于你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。

You manifest a magical membrane over your hands that saps the imagination and spirit from your targets. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.F3KQBROagKZ93FV5]{Manifest Membrane} action, which you can use to create this dream membrane poison. You're immune to your own dream membrane. The save DC for your dream membrane is equal to the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

Bacoo Lore.name: 巴库学识 Bacoo Lore
Bacoo Lore.description:
你了解巴库哲学：关于社群的力量、在物质位面的残酷之中保持谨慎的重要性，以及巴库如何通过鼓励凡人同心协力来反抗神祇。你在社交与隐匿方面变为受训。若你原本会自动在这些技能之一上成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能上成为受训。你也在巴库学识方面变为受训。

You know bacoo philosophy about the strength of community, the importance of being cautious amidst the cruelty of the Material Plane, and the ways bacoo defy the gods by encouraging mortals to work together. You become trained in Society and Stealth. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also become trained in Bacoo Lore.

Advanced Dream Delving.name: 进阶梦境潜行 Advanced Dream Delving
Advanced Dream Delving.description:
你是操控梦境的大师。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.yM3KTTSAIHhyuP14]{梦境讯息}和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Uqj344bezBq3ESdq]{梦魇}作为4环神秘天生法术。你可以每天施放每个法术一次。

You're a maestro of dream manipulation. You gain @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.yM3KTTSAIHhyuP14]{Dream Message} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Uqj344bezBq3ESdq]{Nightmare} as 4th-level occult innate spells. You can cast each spell once per day.

No More Yielding Than a Dream.name: 不再比梦境更屈服 No More Yielding Than a Dream
No More Yielding Than a Dream.description:
你可以比大多数其他物质位面的班诺格更频繁地闪入你的梦境形态，从而躲避敌人的攻击。你可以每小时使用一次你的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.6nX9nQSNjFR24C0q]{Just a Dream} 反应动作（），而不是每天一次。

You can elude your enemies' attacks by flickering into your dream form far more often than most other Material Plane bannogs can. You can use your @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.6nX9nQSNjFR24C0q]{Just a Dream} reaction once per hour instead of once per day.

A Leg Up.name: 助你一臂之力 A Leg Up
A Leg Up.description:
你可以使用一条用于行走的触手来执行需要空闲手的交互动作，即使你的双手在其他方面都被占用。你的触手无法执行需要显著手部敏捷的动作，包括任何需要进行检定才能完成的动作，并且你不能用它来握持物品。

You can use one of the tentacles you use to walk to perform Interact actions requiring a free hand, even if both hands are otherwise occupied. Your tentacle can't perform actions that require significant manual dexterity, including any action that would require a check to accomplish, and you can't use it to hold items.

Chochori Weapon Flow.name: 乔科里武器流派 Chochori Weapon Flow
Chochori Weapon Flow.description:
你以潮起潮落的节奏战斗，让你的乔科里武器发挥最佳水平。每当你使用乔科里武器、来自蔓织者传承的触手打击，或“乔科里武器熟悉”专长中列出的任意一种武器造成大成功时，你施加该武器的大成功专精效果。

You fight with an ebb and flow, allowing your chochori weapons to perform at their best. Whenever you critically hit using a chochori weapon, a tentacle Strike from the tendrilweaver heritage, or one of the weapons listed in Chochori Weapon Familiarity feat, you apply the weapon’s critical specialization effect.

Honed Claws.name: 磨砺的爪击 Honed Claws
Honed Claws.description:
你的双手末端长有锋利的爪击，你已将其磨砺成用于自卫的实用预防手段，或是用来击倒敌人的方法。你获得一次爪击徒手攻击，造成1d4挥砍伤害，并具有灵巧和娴熟特征。

Your hands end in sharp claws, which you've honed into a useful precaution for self-defense or a method to take down your foes. You gain a claw unarmed attack that deals 1d4 slashing damage and has the agile and finesse traits.

Advanced Dream Shaping.name: 进阶梦境塑形 Advanced Dream Shaping
Advanced Dream Shaping.description:
你获得了编织狡黠梦境与梦魇的能力。你编织梦境与梦魇的能力得到提升。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.K2WpC3FFoHrqX9Q5]{Hypnotic Pattern}与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Pwq6T7xpfAJXV5aj]{Phantom Prison}作为3环灵媒系天生法术。你每小时可以各施放一次这些法术。

You become able to craft cunning dreams and nightmares. Your ability to craft dreams and nightmares improves. You gain @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.K2WpC3FFoHrqX9Q5]{Hypnotic Pattern} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Pwq6T7xpfAJXV5aj]{Phantom Prison} as 3rd- level occult innate spells. You can cast each of these spells once per hour.

Earth's Embrace.name: 大地的拥抱 Earth's Embrace
Earth's Embrace.description:
频率 每小时一次

你将身体解体为一团沉积物云（灰烬克拉格拉克为灰烬，巨岩克拉格拉克为土壤，盐克拉格拉克为盐，沙克拉格拉克为沙子），持续5分钟，轻到可以被微风卷起。在此状态下，你为无定形。你失去任何对AC的物品加值以及所有来自护甲的其他效果与加值，并且你使用你的无甲防御熟练度调整值。你获得对物理伤害的抗力10，并且免疫精确伤害。你不能施放法术、启动物品，或使用带有攻击或操作（特征）的动作。你获得10尺飞行速度，并能滑过细小裂缝。

Frequency once per hour

You discorporate your body into a cloud of sediment (ash for ash kragraks, soil for boulder kragraks, salt for salt kragraks, or sand for sand kragraks) for 5 minutes, which is light enough to be picked up by the breeze. In this state, you’re amorphous. You lose any item bonus to AC and all other effects and bonuses from armor, and you use your proficiency modifier for unarmored defense. You gain resistance 10 to physical damage and are immune to precision damage. You can’t cast spells, activate items, or use actions that have the attack or manipulate trait. You gain a fly Speed of 10 feet and can slip through tiny cracks.

Wildfire Leshy Familiar.name: 野火莱希魔宠 Wildfire Leshy Familiar
Wildfire Leshy Familiar.description:
你发现吸引较弱的野火莱西来援助你很容易。将你的魔宠变为野火莱西所需的能力数量比正常少2。

You find it easy to attract weaker wildfire leshys to aid you. The number of abilities required to make your familiar a wildfire leshy is two lower than normal.

Lightning Dash.name: 闪电疾驰 Lightning Dash
Lightning Dash.description:
当你反复冲刺或跳跃时，你是周围最快的人之一，哪怕是在你的迅捷同族之中也是如此。当你使用 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.mkyQD9Tfg2znty6k]{突然疾驰} 时，你疾走或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{跳跃} 四次。

When you sprint or leap repeatedly, you're among the fastest around, even among your speedy kin. When you use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.mkyQD9Tfg2znty6k]{Sudden Dash}, you Stride or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap} four times.

Artful Creep.name: 精巧匍匐 Artful Creep
Artful Creep.description:
你迅捷且寂静如影。当你使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} 动作时，你可以移动至多等同于你的速度，并且你不再需要具有掩蔽或强效掩蔽，或处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态，才能进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{兽皮} 或 Sneak。

You're swift and silent as a shadow. You can move up to your Speed when you use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} action, and you no longer need to have cover or greater cover or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide} or Sneak.

Booty Finder.name: 战利品探测器 Booty Finder
Booty Finder.description:
你对宝藏与战利品有一种与生俱来的感官，而你行窃的天性与贪婪使你会为任何因缺乏搜寻而可能错过的此类赃物而痛苦不已。你在进行用于发现隐藏宝藏的察觉检定时，以及在使用回忆知识来判断宝藏的价值时，获得+2环境加值。即使你没有进行搜索，GM也会为你掷一次秘密检定，以发现通常要求你必须进行搜索才能找到的隐藏宝藏。你仍然需要满足找到该宝藏的任何其他需求。

You have an innate sense for treasure and booty, and your larcenous nature and cupidity mean that you agonize over any such loot you might have missed through lack of searching. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to find hidden treasure and when using Recall Knowledge to determine the value of treasure. Even if you aren’t Searching, the GM rolls you a secret check to find hidden treasure that normally requires you to be Searching. You still need to meet any other requirements to find the treasure.

Instant Comeback.name: 即时反击 Instant Comeback
Instant Comeback.description:
触发 你的回合开始。

你对被压制的愤怒迅速涌动而出，让你得以复仇。你站立。

 

Trigger Your turn begins.

Your anger at being overwhelmed surges forth quickly, allowing you to take your revenge. You Stand.

Push Past Pain.name: 忍痛前行 Push Past Pain
Push Past Pain.description:
频率 每天一次

需求 你有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{受伤（状态）}。

当你受伤时，你咬紧牙关，仅凭自己的意志之力强迫身体进行治疗。在接下来的4轮内，你获得等同于你等级一半再加上你的受伤（状态）值的两倍的快速治疗（例如，如果你是9级且受伤3，则快速治疗为10）。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.X1XDod1R1wHoPCGd]{效果：超越疼痛}

Frequency once per day

Requirements You have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded} condition.

When injured, you grit your teeth and force your body to heal by the strength of your will alone. For the next 4 rounds, you gain fast healing equal to half your level, plus twice the value of your wounded condition (for example, fast healing 10 if you are 9th level and wounded 3).

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.X1XDod1R1wHoPCGd]{Effect: Push Past Pain}

Feast of Life.name: 生命盛宴 Feast of Life
Feast of Life.description:
频率 每天一次

你进入一种美食的狂喜，只要你持续进食，就无法被杀死。持续 1 分钟，只要你在该回合吃了或喝了什么，你在自己每个回合结束时便恢复 @Damage[15[healing]]{15 生命值}。在此期间，你可以进行 交互，把脸埋进补给里大口啃食一份普通食物而无需使用手，但你不能用这种方式来 启动 魔法或炼金食物，也不能获得任何其他需要进食才能获得的特殊效果。只要你自上个回合以来吃过食物，在你的生命盛宴期间，你就不会因 伤害 而死亡，并且你的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死（状态）} 状态不会增加到会杀死你的数值（这会阻止大多数 orpok 超过濒死 3），不过如果你的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{受伤} 数值变为 4 或更高，你会一直处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷} 直到你的创伤得到 治疗。

 

Frequency once per day

You enter a gourmet rapture that makes it impossible to kill you as long as you keep eating. For 1 minute, you recover @Damage[15[healing]]{15 Hit Points} at the end of each of your turns as long as you ate or drank something that turn. During this time, you can Interact to ram your face into your supplies and munch on a normal piece of food without using a hand, but you can’t use this to Activate magical or alchemical food or gain any other special effects that require eating. As long as you ate food since your last turn, you can’t die from damage during your Feast of Life, and your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying} condition can’t increase to a value that would kill you (this stops most orpok from going beyond dying 3), though if your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded} value becomes 4 or higher, you stay @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} until your wounds are treated.

Tendril Trap.name: 卷须陷阱 Tendril Trap
Tendril Trap.description:
频率 每日一次

你使60尺内的地面长出带毒的触须，形成一个@Template[type:burst|distance:20]。细薄的带毒触须从区域内的地面冒出。该区域在水下时变为困难地形和有害地形，持续10分钟；若该区域不在水下，则持续1分钟，之后触须会干枯并死亡。任何在地面上穿过该区域移动的生物，每进入该区域的每一格，都会受到@Damage[2[poison]] 伤害。

 

Frequency once per day

You grow venomous tendrils from the ground within 60 feet in a @Template[type:burst|distance:20]. Thin venomous tendrils grow out from the ground in the area. The area becomes difficult terrain and hazardous terrain for 10 minutes underwater, or for 1 minute if the area isn’t underwater, after which the tendrils dry out and die. A creature that moves on the ground through the area takes @Damage[2[poison]] damage for every square of that area it moves into.

Reaver's Suspicion.name: 掠夺者的疑心 Reaver's Suspicion
Reaver's Suspicion.description:
你不仅会留意利用他人的机会，还会谨慎地警戒，防范任何可能对你做同样事情的人。你不会被与你等级相同或更低的生物夹击。

You not only keep an eye out for opportunities to take advantage of others, but you keep careful watch to guard against anyone who might do the same to you. You can’t be flanked by creatures of your level or lower.

Full-Throated Spit.name: 全力啐吐 Full-Throated Spit
Full-Throated Spit.description:
频率 每小时一次

你的喉囊中长出了酸囊。你喷射酸液，形成一个@Template[type:cone|distance:15]，对区域内每个角色造成等同于你酸液喷吐打击的伤害（包括打击符文但不包括属性符文），并且每个角色都必须进行一次@Check[type:reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.system.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)|basic:true]豁免，对抗你职业DC与法术DC中较高者。在一小时过去之前你无法再进行任何酸液喷吐攻击——你已经用光了所有酸腺。

Frequency once per hour

You have grown acid-sacs in your gullet. You spray acid in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15], dealing damage equal to the damage of your acid spit Strike (including striking runes but not property runes) to each character in the area with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.system.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)|basic:true] save against the higher of your class DC and spell DC. You can't make any further acid spit attacks until an hour has passed—you've used up all your acid glands.

Lucid Step.name: 清醒步 Lucid Step
Lucid Step.description:
如果你与一名沉睡的生物相邻，你可以进入其梦境景观并成为其梦的一部分。处于目标的梦境中时，你会以积极参与者的身份体验它——做梦者、梦中的角色与内容，以及梦境景观的其他居住者都能感知到你并与你互动。你无法进入不会做梦的生物的梦境。

一旦你进入目标的梦境，你可以在那里停留，直到该生物醒来，或直到你花费三个动作离开梦境为止。当你离开梦境时，你会出现在做梦者当前所在的位面上，在做梦者相邻的一个未被占据的空间中，并且你的目标会在24小时内暂时免疫清醒步。

If you're adjacent to a sleeping creature, you can enter their dreamscape and become a part of their dream. While in the target's dream, you experience it as an active participant—you can be perceived and interacted with by the dreamer, the dream's characters and contents, and other inhabitants of the dreamscape. You can't enter the dreams of a creature that doesn't dream.

Once you are inside a target's dream, you can remain there for as long as the creature remains asleep, or until you spend three actions to exit the dream. When you exit a dream, you appear on the plane that the dreamer is currently on, in an unoccupied space adjacent to the dreamer, and your target becomes temporarily immune to Lucid Step for 24 hours.

Slippery Slime.name: 滑溜的黏液怪 Slippery Slime
Slippery Slime.description:
你的身体覆盖着一层薄薄的、极其滑溜的黏液，使你能够从那些你绝对不该穿过的地方滑过去。你能够穿过狭窄的空间，如同你是一只超小型生物（如果你不是小型，则视为小一个体型），并且在挤压通过时能以全速移动。

Your body is covered with a thin layer of exceedingly slick slime, which lets you slip through places you most certainly shouldn't. You fit through tight spaces as though you were a Tiny creature (or one size smaller if you aren't Small), and can move at full Speed while Squeezing.

The Old Rumplank Snatch & Grab.name: 老朗普兰克的夺抢与擒抱 The Old Rumplank Snatch & Grab
The Old Rumplank Snatch & Grab.description:
你冲过一名敌人并对其发动攻击，分散其注意力并割走其钱袋，或以其他强硬方式夺取其贵重物品。你疾走。在你疾走期间的任意时刻，你都可以对单一生物进行一次近战打击。若该打击命中，你可以尝试对目标使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.RDXXE7wMrSPCLv5k]{偷窃}，即使目标正在战斗中也可以。你仍必须满足偷窃动作的任何其他需求（他们必须在触及范围内，你需要一只空手，并且你只能偷窃特定类型的物品，如该动作描述中所述）。

You rush past a foe and attack them, distracting them and cutting their purse or otherwise forcefully taking their valuables. You Stride. At any point during your Stride, you can make a melee Strike against a single creature. If the Strike hits, you can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.RDXXE7wMrSPCLv5k]{Steal} from the target, even if the target is in combat. You still must meet any other requirements for the Steal action (they must be in reach, you need a free hand, and you can only Steal certain types of items, as specified in the action’s description).

Song's Flight.name: 歌之飞行 Song's Flight
Song's Flight.description:
频率 每天一次

你汲取伟大之歌的力量，暂时长出闪烁虹彩、缀满音符的羽毛翅膀。翅膀持续 5 分钟。在此期间，你获得等同于你速度的飞行速度。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.je8wUhqrM8eZr25f]{效果：歌之飞行}

Frequency once per day

Tapping into the power of the great song, you temporarily grow iridescent rainbow-colored feathery wings laden with musical notes. The wings last for 5 minutes. During this time, you gain a fly Speed equal to your Speed.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.je8wUhqrM8eZr25f]{Effect: Song's Flight}

Rowdy Reveler.name: 喧闹狂欢者 Rowdy Reveler
Rowdy Reveler.description:
你可以煽动人群进入狂乱的狂热之中，往往会让事情对所有人都更加危险。你以及每个从 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.M2DHoTWpUrQKGlzH]{Revel} 中受益的盟友，每轮各一次，在尝试进行豁免或技能检定时，可以选择掷两颗骰子。若他们这么做，他们选择其中一个结果用于该检定，并将另一个结果用于一次 @Check[type:flat|dc:11] ，其结果如下。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} ，直到其下个回合结束。

大成功或大失败 该生物为 clumsy 2 且获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} ，直到其下个回合结束，或直到 Revel 的持续时间结束，以较长者为准。

You can incite a crowd into frenzied fervor, often making things more dangerous for everyone. You and each ally benefiting from @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.M2DHoTWpUrQKGlzH]{Revel} can choose to roll two dice when attempting a saving throw or skill check, once per round each. If they do, they choose one result to use for the check and use the other result for a @Check[type:flat|dc:11] with the following results.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} until the end of their next turn.

Critical Failure The creature is clumsy 2 and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} until the end of their next turn or for the duration of the Revel, whichever is longer.

Bacoo Magic Tricks.name: 巴库的魔法把戏 Bacoo Magic Tricks
Bacoo Magic Tricks.description:
你学会了bacoo常用来表演的魔法把戏。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Qw3fnUlaUbnn7ipC]{Prestidigitation}和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.AUctDF2fqPZN2w4W]{Sigil}作为原初先天戏法。

You've learned the magic tricks bacoo commonly likes to perform. You gain @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Qw3fnUlaUbnn7ipC]{Prestidigitation} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.AUctDF2fqPZN2w4W]{Sigil} as primal innate cantrips.

G'mayun Lore.name: 格马云学识 G'mayun Lore
G'mayun Lore.description:
你已经非常详细地了解了g’mayun历史的年代，并更深入地研究了伟大之歌。你在表演和宗教上获得受训熟练度等级。如果你原本会自动在这些技能之一上成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能上成为受训。你也在G’mayun学识上成为受训。

You have learned about the ages of g’mayun history in great detail and studied deeper into the great song. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Performance and Religion. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also become trained in G’mayun Lore.

Battle Ready.name: 战斗准备 Battle Ready
Battle Ready.description:
触发 你掷先攻

你随时准备战斗爆发。你进行交互以拔出一把武器。

 

Trigger you roll initiative

You are ready for a fight to break out at any moment. You Interact to draw a weapon.

G'mayun Weapon Familiarity.name: 盖马云武器熟悉度 G'mayun Weapon Familiarity
G'mayun Weapon Familiarity.description:
你偏好短刃与长柄弯刃的混用：短刃也可用于雕刻，而长柄弯刃则像握着一支巨人画笔。你对匕首、弯刀、长柄刀、弯刃短刀与马刀为受训，并获得弯刃短刀的许可。

此外，你获得所有罕见的g’mayun 武器的许可。为决定你的熟练度之目的，军用g’mayun 武器视为简易武器，而进阶g’mayun 武器视为军用武器。

You favor a mix of short blades that can also be used for carving and longer curved weapons that you hold like a giant paintbrush. You are trained with daggers, falchions, glaives, kukris, and scimitars, and you gain access to kukris.

In addition, you gain access to all uncommon g’mayun weapons. For the purpose of determining your proficiency, martial g’mayun weapons are simple weapons and advanced g’mayun weapons are martial weapons.

Parrot Familiar.name: 鹦鹉魔宠 Parrot Familiar
Parrot Familiar.description:
你与一只鹦鹉或其他热带鸟类建立了羁绊作为你的魔宠。你获得一个魔宠，且该魔宠必须是一只鹦鹉或其他热带鸟类。它仍然获得魔宠能力的益处，但其基础形态仍为一只鹦鹉或其他热带鸟类。由于其基础形态，它必须拥有飞行者能力。

You have bonded a parrot or other tropical bird as your familiar. You gain a familiar, and this familiar must be a parrot or other tropical bird. It still gets the benefits of familiar abilities, but its base form remains a parrot or other tropical bird. Because of its base form, it must have the flier ability.

Firestarter.name: 纵火者 Firestarter
Firestarter.description:
你体外的火焰任你随心所欲地操控。你可以将@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.O9w7r4BKgPogYDDe]{Produce Flame}作为原始先天法术随意施放。戏法会被升阶至等于你等级的一半（向上取整）的法术等级。

The flames without your body are yours to wield as you please. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.O9w7r4BKgPogYDDe]{Produce Flame} as a primal innate spell at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell level equal to half your level rounded up.

Incredible Growth.name: 惊人增长 Incredible Growth
Incredible Growth.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你在短时间内变得更大，获得惊人的触及。你获得4级@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge}的效果，持续1分钟。

 

Frequency once per 10 minutes

You grow even larger for a short time, gaining an impressive reach. You gain the effects of 4th-level @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge} for 1 minute.

Maintain Distance.name: 保持距离 Maintain Distance
Maintain Distance.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

触发 一名敌人移动至与你相邻。

你的个人空间对你很重要。疾走至你的速度。此移动不会触发来自触发生物、基于移动的反应动作（例如借机攻击），但可能会触发来自其他生物的反应动作。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Trigger An enemy moves adjacent to you.

Your personal space is important to you. Stride up to your Speed. This movement doesn't trigger reactions based on movement (such as Attack of Opportunity) from the triggering enemy, though it might trigger reactions from other creatures.

Revitalizing Snack.name: 活力零食 Revitalizing Snack
Revitalizing Snack.description:
当你使用 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.Rrihbij0QwDXrkVy]{Healthy Snack} 时，你也可以将你的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied} 状态的数值降低 1。每天一次，当你使用 Healthy Snack 时，你可以改为将你的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained} 状态的数值降低 1。

When you use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.Rrihbij0QwDXrkVy]{Healthy Snack}, you can also reduce the value of your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied} condition by 1. Once per day, when you use Healthy Snack, you can reduce the value of your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained} condition by 1 instead.

Persistent Toxin.name: 持续毒素 Persistent Toxin
Persistent Toxin.description:
你可以让你的毒素在敌人体内持续滞留。当你使用 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.4ZDb3iddvdjckn00]{Exude Toxin} 时，你可以选择造成持续性毒素或酸性伤害（以造成更高伤害者为准），而非通常的额外伤害。

You can make your toxin linger in your foe's system. When you use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.4ZDb3iddvdjckn00]{Exude Toxin}, you can choose to deal persistent poison or acid damage (whichever would deal more damage) instead of normal additional damage.

Dream Pet.name: 梦境宠物 Dream Pet
Dream Pet.description:
在你梦中生活的时光里，你曾漫游于梦境位面中的梦景。在那里，你设法与一只魔法生物结下了亲密的友谊——它或许诞生于梦境之地的奇思妙想，又或许源自其梦魇般的性相。你的想象朋友如今能在你清醒的时光里与你并肩同行，一同展开冒险。你获得一只魔宠。你为魔宠选择的动物类型由你决定，但大多数班诺格会选择兔子或野兔，或其他具备兔类特性的生物。你的魔宠获得梦境（特征）。

During the hours of your dreaming life, you wandered the dreamscapes of the Dimension of Dreams. There, you managed to forge a close friendship with a magical creature, perhaps born of the Dreamlands' whimsy, or perhaps of its nightmarish aspects. Your imaginary friend can now join you and have adventures together alongside you during your waking hours. You gain a familiar. The type of animal you choose for your familiar is up to you, but most bannogs choose a rabbit or hare, or another creature with rabbit-like features. Your familiar gains the dream trait.

Rending Squall.name: 撕裂狂飙 Rending Squall
Rending Squall.description:
你在突如其来的尖叫或其他响亮的呼喊中释放汹涌的情绪，以音波能量的爆发伤害区域内的生物。狂飙般的尖啸疯狂涌动、凝聚，最终以一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:15] 的形式显现，造成 @Damage[1d4[sonic]] 伤害。区域内的每个生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)|basic:true] 豁免，对抗你职业DC或法术DC中较高者。使用“撕裂尖啸”后，你在 [[/r 1d4 #Rending Squall Recharge]]{1d4轮} 内无法再次使用该能力。

在第3等级以及其后每2个等级，伤害提高1d4（[[/r (ceil(@actor.level/2)d4)[sonic]]]{基于等级的sonid伤害}. 

特殊 当你选择该专长时，为你的“撕裂尖啸”选择使其具有神术（特征）或异能（特征），取决于你是引动伟大之歌（其为异能）还是来自神祇、天使或恶魔的源头（则为神术）。 “撕裂尖啸”获得你所选择的特征，以符合其魔法来源。

You unleash your turbulent emotions in a sudden storm of screams or other loud exclamations, damaging creatures in the area of the outburst of sonic energies. The squall wildly surges, coalesces, and finally manifests itself in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] that deals @Damage[1d4[sonic]] damage. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)|basic:true] saving throw against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. After using Rending Squall, you can’t use this ability again for [[/r 1d4 #Rending Squall Recharge]]{1d4 rounds}.

At 3rd level and every 2 levels thereafter, the damage increases by 1d4 ([[/r (ceil(@actor.level/2)d4)[sonic]]]{level based sonid damage}. 

Special When you take this feat choose for your Rending Squall to either have the divine trait or occult trait depending on whether you tap into the great song (which is occult) or a deific, angelic, or demonic source (which is divine instead). Rending Squall gains the trait you chose, as appropriate for its magical source.

Kragrak Shard.name: 克拉格拉克碎片 Kragrak Shard
Kragrak Shard.description:
你可以从身体上分离出大量细小的碎片并将它们发射向敌人，同时你的身体会立刻再生出已发射的碎片。你获得一种碎片远程徒手攻击，其射程增量为10尺。该攻击造成1d4穿刺伤害。你的碎片属于投石索武器组，并具有推进A:特征。与其他徒手攻击一样，你可以用强力打击缠手布来强化此攻击。

You can detach numerous small shards from your body and launch them at foes, as your body instantly regenerates the launched shards. You gain a shard ranged unarmed attack with a range increment of 10 feet. The attack deals 1d4 piercing damage. Your shard is in the sling weapon group and has the propulsive trait. Like other unarmed attacks, you can improve this attack with handwraps of mighty blows.

Suction Climb.name: 吸附攀爬 Suction Climb
Suction Climb.description:
你触手上的吸盘使你能够轻松在垂直表面移动。你获得15尺的攀爬速度。

The suction cups on your tentacles allow you to navigate vertical surfaces with ease. You gain a climb Speed of 15 feet.

Gardener.name: 园丁 Gardener
Gardener.description:
你花了大量时间照料植物，以至于你能本能地越过绿植，看清其后或其下隐藏的事物。你无视由枝叶造成的隐蔽，并且不会因枝叶而获得对察觉的环境加值。

You’ve spent so much time tending to plants that you can instinctively look past greenery to what lies beyond or beneath it. You ignore concealment caused by foliage and you don’t take circumstance bonuses to Perception from foliage.

Contagious Toxin.name: 传染性毒素 Contagious Toxin
Contagious Toxin.description:
你的毒素会从一个受害者跳跃到另一个受害者。当你进行 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.4ZDb3iddvdjckn00]{Exude Toxin} 造成一次重击，或当一名敌人对抗 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.7Jtrhy0d1lgKZvUc]{Sweat Toxin} 时出现大成功或大失败，你会使一名与原本敌人相邻的次要敌人暴露于毒素之下，该次要敌人需进行一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.system.attributes.classDC.value)|basic:true] 强韧豁免，对抗你的职业DC。若次要敌人继续在其豁免检定中出现大成功或大失败，你可以继续使额外的次要敌人暴露，不过在每次使用 Exude Toxin 或 Sweat Toxin 时，你总共不能让同一名敌人多次暴露于你的毒素之下。

Your toxin leaps from victim to victim. On a critical hit when you @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.4ZDb3iddvdjckn00]{Exude Toxin} or a foe's critical failure against @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.7Jtrhy0d1lgKZvUc]{Sweat Toxin}, you expose a secondary foe adjacent to the original foe, with a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.system.attributes.classDC.value)|basic:true] save against your class DC. If a secondary foe continues to critically fail their saving throw, you can continue to expose additional secondary foes, though you can't expose the same foe to your toxin more than once in total for each use of Exude Toxin or Sweat Toxin.

Coral Form.name: 珊瑚形态 Coral Form
Coral Form.description:
你变形为一丛固定不动的中型珊瑚，用以伪装自己躲避他人。察觉检定不会揭示你的真实本质，但一次成功的 @Check[type:nature|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] 或 @Check[type:survival|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] 检定，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者，会发现你看起来是一丛对该区域而言异常崭新的珊瑚，并且与附近任何类似的珊瑚都不相连。在珊瑚形态下，你可以观察周遭的一切，但你不能采取除终止该效果与结束你的回合之外的其他行动；你可以用一个具有专注（特征）的单动作来这么做。作为一丛珊瑚，你的AC为20，且只有状态加值、状态减值、环境加值与环境减值会影响你。当你是珊瑚时，你在反射豁免中掷出的任何成功与大成功或大失败中的大成功都会视为失败。

You transform into a sessile Medium-sized patch of coral, disguising yourself from others. Perception checks don’t reveal your true nature, but a successful @Check[type:nature|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] or @Check[type:survival|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] check against the higher of your class DC or spell DC reveals that you appear to be a patch of coral that is strangely new to the area, and disconnected from any similar nearby coral. While in coral form, you can observe everything around you, but you can’t act other than to end the effect, and your turn, by using a single action, which has the concentrate trait. As a patch of coral, your AC is 20, and only status bonuses, status penalties, circumstance bonuses, and circumstance penalties affect you. While you are coral, any successes and critical successes you roll on Reflex saves are failures.

Cunning Creep.name: 狡诈潜匿者 Cunning Creep
Cunning Creep.description:
你沉默而迅捷，并且在必要时，你尤其擅长在不被看见的情况下移动。每当你使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行} 动作时，你可以额外移动 5 英尺，最多不超过你的速度。此外，只要你持续使用潜行动作并在你的隐匿检定中成功，即使你在潜行动作结束时没有掩蔽或强效掩蔽且不处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态，你也不会变为被观察到，只要你在你的回合结束时具有掩蔽或强效掩蔽，或处于隐蔽状态。

You're silent and swift, and when necessary, you're especially skilled at moving without being seen. You can move 5 feet farther whenever you take the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} action, up to your Speed. In addition, as long as you continue to use Sneak actions and succeed at your Stealth check, you don't become observed if you don't have cover or greater cover and aren't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} at the end of the Sneak action, as long as you have cover or greater cover or are concealed at the end of your turn.

Bottle Buddy.name: 瓶中伙伴 Bottle Buddy
Bottle Buddy.description:
当你@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.oc2dmFv7cpMzPRqe]{装瓶}时，你可以缩小并带上一名自愿的生物一同进入你的瓶子。瓶子为该生物提供标准掩蔽，且该生物除了重新出现之外无法行动；当你重新出现时，它会自动重新出现，或它也可以独立于你以单动作自行重新出现。若你拥有@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.Bx1PoyXnQBFBkyvD]{装瓶把戏}，该生物可以花费一个动作在瓶中@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{采取掩蔽}以获得强效掩蔽，而你也可以花费一个动作在同一时间、以与你调整自身体重相同的方式来调整该生物的体重。

You can shrink and bring one willing creature with you into your bottle when you @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.oc2dmFv7cpMzPRqe]{Bottle Up}. The bottle gives the creature standard cover, and the creature can't act except to reemerge, which it automatically does when you reemerge or can do as a single action independent of you. If you have @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.Bx1PoyXnQBFBkyvD]{Bottle Tricks}, the creature can spend an action to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover} in the bottle to gain greater cover, and you can spend an action to adjust the creature's weight at the same time and in the same way as you do your own weight.

Chochori Weapon Expertise.name: 乔科里武器专精 Chochori Weapon Expertise
Chochori Weapon Expertise.description:
你将自己对乔寇里武器的知识与自己职业的训练相结合，使你能最大限度地发挥乔寇里武器的威力。每当你获得一项职业特性，使你在某些武器上获得专家或强效熟练度时，你也在匕首、戟、骑枪、长矛、细剑、长矛、三叉戟，以及所有你已受训的乔寇里武器上获得该熟练度。

You combine your knowledge of chochori weapons and your class’s training, allowing you to get the most out of chochori weapons. Whenever you gain a class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency in certain weapons, you also gain that proficiency in daggers, halberds, lances, longspears, rapiers, spears, tridents, and all chochori weapons in which you are trained.

G'mayun Weapon Passion.name: G'mayun 武器热忱 G'mayun Weapon Passion
G'mayun Weapon Passion.description:
你对传统g’mayun武器的热情使你在将敌人置于任你摆布之时，能够获得它们最致命的益处。每当你使用g’mayun武器，或使用G’mayun Weapon Familiarity专长中列出的武器造成大成功或大失败时，你施加该武器的大成功或大失败专精效果。

Your passion for traditional g’mayun weapons allows you to gain their most deadly benefits when you have your foe at your mercy. Whenever you critically hit using a g’mayun weapon or one of the weapons listed in G’mayun Weapon Familiarity feat, you apply the weapon’s critical specialization effect.

Brawn Over Brains.name: 蛮力胜过脑力 Brawn Over Brains
Brawn Over Brains.description:
当你的心智变得混沌时，你知道该更用力地打击，而不是更聪明地打击。每当你具有呆滞（状态）时，你的近战打击的伤害掷骰获得等同于你的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞（状态）} 状态数值的环境加值（最大为+4环境加值）。

When your mind becomes clouded, you know to hit harder rather than smarter. You gain a circumstance bonus to damage rolls on your melee Strikes equal to the value of your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied} condition (to a maximum of a +4 circumstance bonus) whenever you have the stupefied condition.

Sprite Weapon Expertise.name: 小妖精（特征）武器专精 Sprite Weapon Expertise
Sprite Weapon Expertise.description:
你运用一点妖精魔法来增强你的武器训练，使你对你的小妖精（特征）武器有更深入的理解。每当你获得一项职业特性，使你在某些武器上获得专家或强效熟练度时，你也会在长弓、复合长弓、细剑、短弓、复合短弓、短剑以及所有你已受训的小妖精（特征）武器上获得该熟练度。

You use a little bit of fey magic to enhance your weapon training, granting you improved understanding of your sprite weapons. Whenever you gain a class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency in certain weapons, you also gain that proficiency in longbows, composite longbows, rapiers, shortbows, composite shortbows, shortswords and all sprite weapons in which you are trained.

Elemental Aftershock.name: 元素余震 Elemental Aftershock
Elemental Aftershock.description:
当你用近战徒手攻击对你的敌人造成重击时，你可以释放一次元素余震，造成持续的能量伤害。这会根据与你的次要元素相关联的类型，对你的敌人造成1d4持续伤害：死亡对应负能量伤害，火对应火伤害，力场对应力场伤害，冰对应寒冷伤害，生命对应正能量伤害，闪电对应电击伤害，音乐对应音波伤害，毒素对应毒素伤害。照常，正能量伤害只会伤害不死生物或其他对负能量具有亲和性的生物。

When you critically hit your foe with a melee unarmed attack, you can unleash an elemental aftershock, causing lingering energy damage. This deals 1d4 persistent damage to your foe of a type associated with your secondary element: negative damage for death, fire damage for fire, force damage for force, cold damage for ice, positive damage for life, electricity damage for lightning, sonic damage for music, or poison damage for poison. As normal, positive damage only harms undead or other creatures with negative affinity.

Conceal Suffering.name: 隐匿痛苦 Conceal Suffering
Conceal Suffering.description:
频率 每日一次

触发 你因敌人的攻击受到伤害，且该伤害未使你降至 0 生命值。

你装出一副勇敢的样子，防止敌人知道他们伤到了你。你获得等同于因触发的伤害而失去的生命值数量的临时生命值。然而，这种表演是有代价的。1 分钟后，你失去等同于你在 1 分钟后获得的临时生命值的生命值。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You take damage from a foe's attack that doesn't reduce you to 0 Hit Points.

You put on a brave act to prevent foes from knowing they have wounded you. You gain temporary Hit Points equal to the number of Hit Points you lost from the triggering damage. However, such an act comes at a cost. After 1 minute, you lose Hit Points equal to the temporary Hit Points you gained after 1 minute.

Healthy Snack.name: 健康零食 Healthy Snack
Healthy Snack.description:
频率 每天一次

你进行交互，从身上某处取出一小口食物并吃下，获得立刻的恢复效果。你恢复[[/r (2*@actor.level)[治疗]]]{你等级的两倍}点生命值，并获得相当于你等级一半的临时生命值，持续1分钟。

Frequency once per day

You Interact to retrieve a morsel of food from somewhere on your person and then eat it, gaining an immediate restorative effect. You recover [[/r (2*@actor.level)[healing]]]{twice your level} in Hit Points and gain half your level in temporary Hit Points for 1 minute.

Rock Skin.name: 岩石皮肤 Rock Skin
Rock Skin.description:
你的土之形态覆盖着一层薄薄的保护性岩石外壳，它并非你身体的一部分，可以保护你免受伤害……至少在它被剥落之前。在你的每日准备期间，你获得对物理伤害（除精金外）的抗力5。任何时候该抗力防止了伤害，它就会降低1，最低降至0。不过，当你的抗力低于5时，它会随着时代间缓慢自我恢复；每过10分钟，它就增加1，最高增至5。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.0taDFMX7HNXLiW5s]{效果: Rock Skin}

Your earthen form is covered in a thin protective outer layer of rock that isn’t part of your body, which can protect you from harm... at least until it chips away. During your daily preparations, you gain resistance 5 to physical damage (except adamantine). Any time this resistance prevents damage, it decreases by 1, to a minimum of 0. However, when your resistance is below 5, it slowly recovers itself over time; for every 10 minutes, it increases by 1, to a maximum of 5.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.0taDFMX7HNXLiW5s]{Effect: Rock Skin}

Defiant Comrade.name: 不屈的战友 Defiant Comrade
Defiant Comrade.description:
