当你的盟友最需要你的帮助时，你的辛勤付出与情谊会给予他们违抗命运所需的力量。你每天可以施放一次@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.1b55SgYTV65JvmQd]{反抗祝福}，作为一个5级原初先天法术。

When your allies need your help the most, your hard work and camaraderie gives them the power necessary to defy their fates. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.1b55SgYTV65JvmQd]{Blessing of Defiance} once per day as a 5th-level primal innate spell.

Dominator's Vigor.name: 支配者的活力 Dominator's Vigor
Dominator's Vigor.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 你使30尺内的一名生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧（状态）} 状态

你沉浸于目标生物在你可怖威势面前显露的明显怯懦，从而恢复你的精力。你获得等于你等级一半的临时生命值。这些临时生命值持续的轮数等于你给予该触发生物的惊惧（状态）状态值。

 

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You give a creature within 30 feet of you the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} condition

You relish in the target creature's obvious cowardice in the face of your fearsome might, restoring your vigor. You gain temporary Hit Points equal to half your level. These temporary Hit Points last for a number of rounds equal to the frightened condition value you gave the triggering creature.

Xotlxotl Weapon Adept.name: 索特尔索特尔武器专家 Xotlxotl Weapon Adept
Xotlxotl Weapon Adept.description:
通往圆满之路要求你战斗。当你使用一把 xotlxotl 武器或“Xotlxotl 武器熟悉”专长中列出的任意一种武器造成大成功时，你施加该武器的大成功专精效果。

The path to Perfection requires you to fight. When you critically hit using a xotlxotl weapon or one of the weapons listed in the Xotlxotl weapon familiarity feat, you apply the weapon's critical specialization effect.

Frequent Snacker.name: 频繁零食者 Frequent Snacker
Frequent Snacker.description:
除了白天通常的七顿orpok餐之外，你还相信大量耐饥的零食。你可以每小时使用一次 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.Rrihbij0QwDXrkVy]{健康零食}，而不是每天一次。

In addition to the normal orpok seven meals during the day, you believe in numerous hardy snacks. You can use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.Rrihbij0QwDXrkVy]{Healthy Snack} once per hour instead of once per day.

Hardriggan Lore.name: 哈德里甘学识 Hardriggan Lore
Hardriggan Lore.description:
你在那些教会了你许多关于硬里根文化的人们之中长大，并尽你所能地学习了一切。你在运动与生存两项技能上均为受训。如果你将会自动在其中一项技能上成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能上成为受训。你也在硬里根学识上成为受训。

You grew up among those who taught you much about hardriggan culture, and you learned all that you could. You are trained in both Athletics and Survival. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also become trained in Hardriggan Lore.

Reflexive Sweat.name: 反射性出汗 Reflexive Sweat
Reflexive Sweat.description:
你已将排汗排毒的能力锤炼至臻纯，如今它会本能地触发。每当你在自己每个回合开始、恢复你的动作时，你获得额外的反应动作，该反应动作只能用于 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.7Jtrhy0d1lgKZvUc]{Sweat Toxin}。

You've perfected your ability to sweat toxin, and now it comes to you reflexively. At the start of each of your turns when you regain your actions, you gain an additional reaction that can be used only to @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.7Jtrhy0d1lgKZvUc]{Sweat Toxin}.

Long Tongue.name: 长舌头 Long Tongue
Long Tongue.description:
你口中那条蛙状的舌头盘着，比平时更长。当你用舌头施放射程为接触的法术或执行非常简单的交互动作时，你可以在比你通常的触及远5英尺的距离进行。

The frog-like tongue coiled in your mouth is longer than usual. When you use your tongue to deliver touch range spells or perform very simple Interact actions, you can do so at a distance that is 5 feet beyond your usual reach.

Neutralizing Skin.name: 中和皮肤 Neutralizing Skin
Neutralizing Skin.description:
你体内的某种化学成分能中和大多数酸。你获得等于你等级一半的酸抗力（最低 1）。

Something in your chemical makeup neutralizes most acids. You gain resistance to acid equal to half your level (minimum 1).

Craft Anything.name: 制作万物 Craft Anything
Craft Anything.description:
无论是炼金炸弹、陷阱，还是介于两者之间的任何东西，你都能理解事物如何运作以及如何制造它们。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.is3Oz9wt11lNq62K]{炼金制作}与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.DMetdzt1VJL2Y62i]{陷阱制作}技能专长。

Whether it’s an alchemical bomb, a snare, or anything in between, you just understand how things work and how to build them. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.is3Oz9wt11lNq62K]{Alchemical Crafting} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.DMetdzt1VJL2Y62i]{Snare Crafting} skill feats.

Silent Scream.name: 无声尖啸 Silent Scream
Silent Scream.description:
频率 每日1次

你把下颚脱臼并尖叫——一种可怖的无声尖啸，与其说是听见，不如说是感受到。你周围100尺内的所有敌人必须尝试一次对抗你职业DC或法术DC（取较高者）的 @Check[type:will|dc:resolve(@actor.system.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] 意志豁免，并承受以下效果。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 1}。

失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 3}。

大失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 4}。它还会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃窜}，持续1轮或直到它不再恐惧为止（以先发生者为准）。

此外，你会持续尖叫直到你下个回合开始——除非你的身体被彻底摧毁（例如被@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{解离术}），否则没有任何事物能阻止这声尖叫。即使你被杀死，你的尸体也会继续尖叫。在你下个回合开始时，你周围100尺内的所有敌人受到 @Damage[5d10[bleed]] 伤害（对抗你职业DC或法术DC，取较高者，进行一次带有 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.system.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)|basic:true] 的基础强韧豁免），因为它们会开始从眼睛和耳朵出血。

Frequency once per day

You unhinge your jaw and scream—a terrible, soundless shriek that is more felt than heard. All enemies within 100 feet of you must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:resolve(@actor.system.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] saving throw against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher, with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 4}. It's also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round or until it's no longer frightened, whichever comes first.

Furthermore, you continue to scream until the beginning of your next turn—nothing can stop the scream save the total destruction of your body (for instance, by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{Disintegrate}). Even if you are killed, your corpse will continue screaming. At the beginning of your next turn, all enemies within 100 feet of you take @Damage[5d10[bleed]] damage (with a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.system.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)|basic:true] save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher) as they begin to bleed from their eyes and ears.

G'mayun Weapon Expertise.name: 格玛云武器专精 G'mayun Weapon Expertise
G'mayun Weapon Expertise.description:
你将自己对g’mayun武器的热情与你的职业的训练与技巧融为一体，使你在使用g’mayun武器时具备高超的技能。每当你获得一项职业特性，使你在特定武器上获得专家或强效的熟练度时，你也会在匕首、弯刃大刀、长柄刀、库克里弯刀、弯刀，以及所有你已受训的g’mayun武器上获得该熟练度。

You blend your passions for g’mayun weapons and your class’s training and techniques, granting you great skill with g’mayun weapons. Whenever you gain a class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency in certain weapons, you also gain that proficiency in daggers, falchions, glaives, kukris, scimitars, and all g’mayun weapons in which you are trained.

Toxicant Sentinel Dedication.name: 毒物哨兵奉献 Toxicant Sentinel Dedication
Toxicant Sentinel Dedication.description:
许可 你是守卫紫罗兰林地守护者的毒素哨兵成员。

你已被引入毒素哨兵。即使紫罗兰林地的环境中弥漫着毒素，你也能在其中安全生活。这并不会为你提供对紫罗兰林地内有毒危害与怪物的绝对防护，只能抵御环境中的背景环境毒素。此外，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.4ZDb3iddvdjckn00]{渗出毒素} 动作。

特殊 在你从 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.W9kPftynQPH0q8DO.JournalEntryPage.JBFSaRR5MTW1aJgR#toxicant-sentinel-(archetype)]{毒素哨兵（变体）}获得另外两个专长之前，你不能选择另一个奉献专长。

Access You are a member of the toxicant sentinels who guard the wardens of the Violet Woodlands.

You've been initiated into the toxicant sentinels. You can safely live in the Violet Woodlands, despite the poison that suffuses the environment there. This doesn't provide absolute protection from poisonous hazards and monsters in the Violet Woodlands, only from the ambient environmental poison. Additionally, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.4ZDb3iddvdjckn00]{Exude Toxin} action.

Special You can't select another dedication feat until you have gained two other feats from the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.W9kPftynQPH0q8DO.JournalEntryPage.JBFSaRR5MTW1aJgR#toxicant-sentinel-(archetype)]{Toxicant Sentinel (Archetype)}.

Indigestion Resistance.name: 消化不良抗力 Indigestion Resistance
Indigestion Resistance.description:
你的胃是效率与韧性的奇迹，即使与其他奥波克那铁打的胃相比也是如此。当你在强韧豁免中成功以降低恶心值时，将其降低2（若为大成功则降低3）。

Your stomach is a marvel of efficiency and resilience, even compared to the iron stomachs of other orpoks. When you succeed at a Fortitude save to reduce the sickened value, reduce it by 2 (or by 3 on a critical success).

Hardriggan Weapon Familiarity.name: 哈德里根武器熟悉度 Hardriggan Weapon Familiarity
Hardriggan Weapon Familiarity.description:
哈德里根人喜欢使用巨大且令人生畏的武器，而你已学会熟练地运用它们。你受训于弯刃大刀、巨斧、巨剑与战用连枷。

此外，你获得所有非普通哈德里根武器的许可。为判定你的熟练度之用，军用哈德里根武器视为简易武器，而高等哈德里根武器视为军用武器。

Hardriggans like to use big, intimidating weapons, and you have learned to use them well. You are trained with falchions, greataxes, greatswords, and war flails.

In addition, you gain access to all uncommon hardriggan weapons. For the purpose of determining your proficiency, martial hardriggan weapons are simple weapons and advanced hardriggan weapons are martial weapons.

Protective Earthrune.name: 护护土之符文 Protective Earthrune
Protective Earthrune.description:
你的土之符文将你身体的外表变形为强大的防护护甲，其效果等同于胸甲，保护你免受物理伤害。你的身体是一套属于板甲护甲组的中型护甲，给予AC +4物品加值，敏捷上限+1，检定减值–2，速度减值–5英尺，以及力量值16，并具有舒适特性。你永远无法穿戴其他护甲或移除这套护甲，除非你重训该专长并移除土之符文。你可以在身体上蚀刻护甲符文来补强你的土之符文，使你能够如常升级你身体的护甲。

Your earthrune transforms the outer surface of your body into a powerful protective armor as effective as a breastplate, defending you from physical harm. Your body is medium armor in the plate armor group that grants a +4 item bonus to AC, a Dex cap of +1, a check penalty of –2, a speed penalty of –5 feet, and a Strength value of 16, and has the comfort trait. You can never wear other armor or remove this armor, unless you retrain the feat and remove the earthrune. You can etch armor runes into your body to complement your earthrune, allowing you to upgrade your body’s armor as normal.

Earthsense.name: 土感知 Earthsense
Earthsense.description:
你始终与周围的大地保持同步，使你能够感知附近各种各样的振动。你在30英尺范围内获得颤动感知，作为一种模糊感官，使你能够感知与自己接触同一表面的生物所造成的移动与振动。

You are constantly in tune with the earth around you, allowing you to sense all sorts of vibrations nearby. You gain tremorsense as an imprecise sense within 30 feet, which allows you to sense movements and vibrations made by creatures touching the same surface as you.

Xotlxotl Weapon Familiarity.name: 索特尔索特尔武器熟稔 Xotlxotl Weapon Familiarity
Xotlxotl Weapon Familiarity.description:
有些武器特别适合在你和其他蜥蜴人称之为家的沼泽中战斗，而你已经学会如何高效且有效地使用这些武器。你在吹箭、流星锤、长棍、长矛、砍刀、长矛和长鞭方面为受训。此外，你获得所有非普通蜥蜴人武器的许可。为了决定你的熟练度，军用蜥蜴人武器视为简易武器，而高等蜥蜴人武器视为军用武器。

There are certain weapons that are particularly well-suited for fighting in the swamps that you and other xotlxotl call home, and you've learned how to use those weapons efficiently and effectively. You are trained with blowguns, bolas, bo staves, longspears, machetes, spears, and whips. In addition, you gain access to all uncommon xotlxotl weapons. For the purpose of determining your proficiency, martial xotlxotl weapons are simple weapons, and advanced xotlxotl weapons are martial weapons.

Strange Mage.name: 奇异法师 Strange Mage
Strange Mage.description:
你可以通过运用如梦似幻的异术魔法，将你的意志显现于现实之中，即使在物质位面也能如此。选择一个来自异术法术列表的戏法。你可以随意将该法术作为异术天生法术施放。戏法会被升阶至等于你等级一半（向上取整）的法术等级。

You can manifest your will on reality by wielding dreamlike occult magic, even on the Material Plane. Choose one cantrip from the occult spell list. You can cast this spell as an occult innate spell at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell level equal to half your level rounded up.

Turkey Trot.name: 火鸡快跑 Turkey Trot
Turkey Trot.description:
如同许久以前迁徙的火鸡 g’mayun 一样，你带领一群盟友穿越各种地区，在远征中总是疾行以争取良好的时代。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.5ZsmRm7HvFAw2XDZ]{Caravan Leader} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.38uOVS8fLZxraUrg]{Pick Up The Pace} 通用专长，即使你不满足先决条件。

Like migratory meleagris g’mayuns long ago, you lead groups of allies through various regions, always hustling to make good time on your expeditions. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.5ZsmRm7HvFAw2XDZ]{Caravan Leader} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.38uOVS8fLZxraUrg]{Pick Up The Pace} general feats, even if you don’t meet the prerequisites.

X Marks the Spot.name: X标记地点 X Marks the Spot
X Marks the Spot.description:
你对敌人进行两次快速攻击，形成一个 X，并标记一个弱点供你的盟友利用。对同一名敌人打击两次。若两次打击都命中，则该敌人处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} 直到你的下个回合，且你的每位盟友在你的下个回合之前对该敌人的下一次攻击掷骰获得 +1 环境加值。若两次打击都是大成功，则该环境加值改为 +2 而非 +1。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.nmlpabAhKbHxcRzH]{效果：X 标记地点}

You make two quick attacks against your foe, forming an X and marking a vulnerability for your allies to exploit. Strike twice against the same foe. If both Strikes hit, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until your next turn, and each of your allies gain a +1 circumstance bonus on their next attack rolls against that foe before your next turn. If both Strikes are critical hits, the circumstance bonus is +2 instead of +1.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.nmlpabAhKbHxcRzH]{Effect: X Marks the Spot}

Spirit Spotter.name: 灵体侦测者 Spirit Spotter
Spirit Spotter.description:
你已经找到一种方法，能够调整你真彩视域所接收的输入，使其显示由负面生命精华与灵质精华构成的魔法效果，从而用来察觉那些难以发现的作祟与藏身于坚固物体内的无形生物。即使你在探索模式中并未进行搜索，你仍可进行一次检定以察觉附近的无形不死生物与作祟，但要承受–2环境减值。即使这些无形不死生物或作祟藏在坚固物体内部，此益处依然适用。若你正主动进行搜索或探寻，你不会承受该减值，反而在用于察觉无形不死生物与作祟的察觉检定上获得+2环境加值。

You have found a way to adapt the input from your truecolor sight that shows you magical effects formed of negative life essence and spiritual essence in order to notice hard-to-spot haunts and incorporeal creatures hidden inside solid objects. Even when you aren’t Searching in exploration mode, you get a check to notice incorporeal undead and haunts nearby, albeit at a –2 circumstance penalty. This benefit applies even if the incorporeal undead or haunts are hidden inside solid objects. If you are actively Searching or Seeking, you don’t take the penalty and instead get a +2 circumstance bonus on your Perception checks to notice incorporeal undead and haunts.

Sprite Weapon Familiarity.name: 小妖精（特征）武器熟悉度 Sprite Weapon Familiarity
Sprite Weapon Familiarity.description:
你偏爱弓、灵巧的刀剑，以及妖精的武器。你受训于长弓、复合长弓、细剑、短弓、复合短弓和短剑。

此外，你获得所有非普通小妖精（特征）武器的许可。为了决定你的熟练度，军用小妖精（特征）武器视为简易武器，而高级小妖精（特征）武器视为军用武器。

You favor bows, dextrous blades, and the weapons of the fey. You are trained with longbows, composite longbows, rapiers, shortbows, composite shortbows, and shortswords.

In addition, you gain access to all uncommon sprite weapons. For the purpose of determining your proficiency, martial sprite weapons are simple weapons and advanced sprite weapons are martial weapons.

Self-Immolate.name: 自焚 Self-Immolate
Self-Immolate.description:
频率 每小时一次

你使自己燃烧的余烬骤然迸发，在一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:5]内制造出一股浓厚的不透明烟雾。你失去[[/r @actor.level #Lost Hit Points]]{每等级1点生命值}。所有位于受影响区域内的生物获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，且所有其他生物对它们而言也处于隐蔽状态。烟雾持续1分钟，或直到被强风吹散为止。

Frequency once per hour

You cause your own burning embers to flare up, creating a thick plume of opaque smoke in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:5]. You lose [[/r @actor.level #Lost Hit Points]]{1 Hit Point per level}. All creatures within the affected area are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, and all other creatures are concealed to them. The smoke persists for 1 minute or until it is dispersed by a strong wind.

Bounding Dash.name: 疾跃冲刺 Bounding Dash
Bounding Dash.description:
你的跳跃步态使你在奔跑时能够避开大多数轻微障碍。当你使用 Sudden Dash 时，在此次移动期间你无视困难地形，且强效困难地形改为困难地形。

Your hopping gait enables you to avoid most minor obstacles as you run. When you use Sudden Dash, you ignore difficult terrain, and greater difficult terrain becomes difficult terrain instead during that movement.

Progenitor Form.name: 始祖形态 Progenitor Form
Progenitor Form.description:
频率 每日一次

曾经，你是神祇的一部分碎片。终有一日，你将变得更为强效。你原初的血液沸腾翻涌，你的血肉扭曲膨胀，化为新的形状。你的始祖形态具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8AMvNVOUEtxBCDvJ]{Monstrosity Form}的效果，但你必须根据你的前身选择下列特定形态之一。如果你能以其他方式施放monstrosity form（例如通过你的法术位或通过卷轴），你也可以选择基于你的前身的形态，但在那种情况下，伤害增加5。

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.w3bOEgtNAbLf0LVz]{The Ironshell}
    • 速度 40尺，游泳速度30尺
    • 近战 角（触及15尺），伤害 2d12+15穿刺；
    • 钢铁皮肤 你获得对物理伤害的抗力5。
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.roGZlGm3q8LnnmqL]{The Venomous}
    • 速度 40尺，攀爬速度30尺，游泳速度30尺
    • 近战 颌骨（触及15尺），伤害 2d8+15穿刺外加2d6持续毒素伤害
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.QW3wpM0ycoTzxYf5]{The Hungry}
    • 速度 40尺，掘洞速度40尺
    • 近战 颌骨（致命d12，触及15尺），伤害 2d10+15穿刺
    • 盛宴 1 需求 你与一具尸体相邻。效果 你停下来快速咬上一口，治疗[[/r 4d10[healing]]]生命值。你无法再次使用盛宴，直到[[/r 1d4 #Recharge Feast]]{1d4轮}后。
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.R0imNGObFe95bYUn]{The Mountain}
    • 速度 60尺
    • 近战 蹄（灵巧，触及10尺），伤害 2d8+10钝击
    • 践踏 3 你移动至多你速度的两倍，并穿过大型或更小生物的空间，践踏你进入其空间的每个生物。被践踏的生物承受蹄的伤害，并进行一次@Check[type:reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.system.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)|basic:true]豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC（取较高者）。
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.0IqssOw4z6nxtNRj]{The Strangler}
    • 速度 30尺，游泳速度90尺
    • 近战 爪击（灵巧，触及15尺），伤害 2d8+10挥砍外加擒抱。

注：要使用monstrosity form施放此效果并获得伤害加值，将效果链接添加到monstrosity form法术描述中，然后如常施放该法术。

Frequency once per day

Once, you were a fragment of a god. One day, you will become greater still. Your primordial blood bubbles up, your flesh twisting and ballooning into its new shape. Your progenitor form has the effects of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8AMvNVOUEtxBCDvJ]{Monstrosity Form}, but you must choose the specific form below based on your predecessor. If you can cast monstrosity form in another way (such as from your spell slots or via a scroll), you can also choose to take the form based on your predecessor, but in that case, the damage increases by 5.

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.w3bOEgtNAbLf0LVz]{The Ironshell}
    • Speed 40 feet, swim Speed 30 feet
    • Melee horn (reach 15 feet), Damage 2d12+15 piercing;
    • Steelskin You gain resistance 5 to physical damage.
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.roGZlGm3q8LnnmqL]{The Venomous}
    • Speed 40 feet, climb Speed 30 feet, swim Speed 30 feet
    • Melee jaws (reach 15 feet), Damage 2d8+15 piercing plus 2d6 persistent poison damage
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.QW3wpM0ycoTzxYf5]{The Hungry}
    • Speed 40 feet, burrow Speed 40 feet
    • Melee jaws (deadly d12, reach 15 feet), Damage 2d10+15 piercing
    • Feast 1 Requirements You are adjacent to a corpse. Effect You stop for a quick bite, healing [[/r 4d10[healing]]] Hit Points. You can't Feast again for [[/r 1d4 #Recharge Feast]]{1d4 rounds}.
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.R0imNGObFe95bYUn]{The Mountain}
    • Speed 60 feet
    • Melee hoof (agile, reach 10 feet), Damage 2d8+10 bludgeoning
    • Trample 3 You move up to double your Speed and move through the spaces of Large or smaller creatures, trampling each creature whose space you enter. A trampled creature takes hoof damage with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.system.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)|basic:true] save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher.
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.0IqssOw4z6nxtNRj]{The Strangler}
    • Speed 30 feet, swim Speed 90 feet
    • Melee claw (agile, reach 15 feet), Damage 2d8+10 slashing plus Grab.

Note: To cast this using monstrosity form and receive the damage bonus, add the effect links to the monstrosity form spell description then cast the spell as normal.

Drown Sorrow.name: 溺亡悲伤 Drown Sorrow
Drown Sorrow.description:
需求 你身上穿戴、持用或以其他方式容易取用至少一份普通酒精饮品

触发 你对抗除酒精以外的毒素或药物的豁免失败。

你的身体渴求酒精，会在处理你摄入的其他任何东西之前先处理它，并冲刷掉其他毒素。你抽出并灌下一份酒精饮品。对抗触发的毒素或药物的强韧豁免重骰，取较佳结果。随后你无需进行豁免便受到@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.UMAXLDpI6YLSfYX1]{酒精}的第1阶段影响；若你已经处于酒精的效果之下，则你的酒精中毒无需进行豁免便推进至下一阶段。你只能用普通酒精来使用“借酒浇愁”，并且你不会以这种方式饮用酒精获得任何其他益处，即使你拥有其他能力能从饮用酒精中获得有益效果。

Requirements You have at least one drink of ordinary alcohol worn, held, or otherwise easily accessible

Trigger You fail a saving throw against a poison or drug other than alcohol.

Your body craves alcohol, processing it first before anything else you ingest and flooding out other toxins. You draw and chug a single drink of alcohol. Reroll the Fortitude save against the triggering poison or drug, taking the better result. You then become affected by Stage 1 of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.UMAXLDpI6YLSfYX1]{Alcohol} without a saving throw, or you advance your alcohol poisoning to the next Stage without a saving throw if you were already under alcohol's effects. You can only Drown Sorrow with ordinary alcohol, and you don't gain any other benefits from drinking the alcohol in this way, even if you have other abilities that grant beneficial effects from drinking alcohol.

Whimsical Inclination.name: 奇想倾向 Whimsical Inclination
Whimsical Inclination.description:
频率 每天一次

你在各种兴趣之间频繁切换，因此能够迅速抓住一个概念并对其获得基础理解。你花费1分钟与一名在某项技能上受训的人相处，或阅读一本手册或其他关于该技能的信息来源，死记基础信息并用该技能进行基础练习。当你这么做时，你在该技能上变为受训。该熟练度持续到你再次进行准备为止。由于该熟练度是临时的，你不能将其用作技能提升的先决条件，或用作如专长这类永久角色选项的先决条件。

Frequency once per day

You flit about from interest to interest so often, you’re able to quickly latch onto a concept and gain a basic understanding of it. You spend 1 minute with either someone who is trained in a skill or a manual or other source of information about the skill, cramming basic information and performing basic exercises with the skill. When you do, you become trained in that skill. This proficiency lasts until you prepare again. Since this proficiency is temporary, you can’t use it as a prerequisite for a skill increase or a permanent character option like a feat.

Kick it up a Notch.name: 再提升一个档次 Kick it up a Notch
Kick it up a Notch.description:
需求 你正持有非魔法的食物或饮料，以及一瓶灵药、摄入型毒素或药水，或者你正穿戴着它们并且双手空闲。

你可以用意想不到的劲道为你的小点心调味。如果你的下一个动作是使用 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.qreAGIAKpvZJxEpG]{战斗小点心}，你可以将一瓶灵药、摄入型毒素或药水加入被摄入的食物或饮料中，使你所选择的盟友除了从战斗小点心获得的临时生命值之外，还会受到其效果影响。将有害或不受欢迎的效果施加到你盟友的食物或饮料上是一个邪恶动作。

Requirements You are holding non-magical food or drink and an elixir, ingested poison, or potion, or you are wearing them and have free hands.

You can season your canapes with a surprise kick. If your next action is to use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.qreAGIAKpvZJxEpG]{Battle Canapes}, you can add an elixir, ingested poison, or potion to the ingested food or drink, applying its effects to the ally you chose in addition to the temporary Hit Points from Battle Canapes. Applying harmful or unwanted effects to your allies' food or drink is an evil action.

Reality Shaper.name: 现实塑造者 Reality Shaper
Reality Shaper.description:
频率 每日一次

你将梦境强加于现实之上，塑造周围地形并使敌人迷失方向。你被一个梦境灵光所环绕，范围为 @Template[type:emanation|distance:10]。该灵光的区域为困难地形。处于灵光中的生物在对抗幻觉、法术或会施加 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied} 状态的效果时，其豁免承受–2状态减值。该灵光持续至你下一回合结束。你免疫你自身梦境灵光的效果（包括其困难地形）。

在第一回合之后的每个回合，当你使用 Reality Shaper 来创造一个梦境灵光时，你可以使用一个具有专注（特征）的单动作来延长你的梦境灵光的持续时间，使其持续至你下一回合结束。然而，如果你以这种方式延长持续时间五次，你将变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}，且不能再进一步延长持续时间。

Frequency once per day

You impose your dreams upon reality, shaping the surrounding terrain and disorienting your foes. You are surrounded by a dream aura in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10]. The area of the aura is difficult terrain. Creatures in the aura take a –2 status penalty on saving throws against illusions, spells, or effects that would impose the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied} condition. This aura lasts until the end of your next turn. You're immune to the effects of your own dream aura (including its difficult terrain).

Each turn after the first turn, when you use Reality Shaper to create a dream aura, you can use a single action, which has the concentrate trait, to extend the duration of your dream aura, causing it to last up to the end of your next turn. However, if you extend the duration in this way five times, you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} and can no longer extend the duration further.

Spew Wall.name: 喷吐之墙 Spew Wall
Spew Wall.description:
频率 每天一次

随着时间推移，你在身体自我愈合、突变并臻于完美的过程中，逐渐积攒起你不再需要的多余血肉。必要时，你会将其喷吐出来，形成一堵由海绵般、黏滑的xotlxotl血肉构成的巨大墙壁。这具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.ZLLY6ThJXCCrO0rL]{Wall of Flesh}的效果，但有以下不同：若你选择嘴，你改为使用你的关键能力值而非法术施放能力值；若你选择手臂，你改为使用你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。

Frequency once per day

Over time, you gather excess flesh you no longer need as your body heals, mutates, and Perfects itself. When necessary, you spew it out into an enormous wall of spongy, slimy xotlxotl flesh. This has the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.ZLLY6ThJXCCrO0rL]{Wall of Flesh}, except that you use your key ability score instead of a spellcasting ability score if you choose mouths, and you use the higher of your class DC or spell DC if you choose arms.

Harvest Banquet.name: 丰收宴会 Harvest Banquet
Harvest Banquet.description:
无论你的祖先是学会召唤实体用当地的orpok创造一场盛宴，还是反过来，你都已将能力精炼到无需仪式协助也能召来真正的大杂烩。你学会@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.yRf59eFtZ50cGlem]{Heroes' Feast}仪式，并且你可以在没有任何次要施法者的情况下施放该仪式，方法是将主检定DC提高2。

Whether your ancestors learned to summon entities to create a fabulous feast from the local orpok or vice versa, you’ve refined your abilities to the point you can call forth a veritable smorgasbord without ritual assistance. You learn the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.yRf59eFtZ50cGlem]{Heroes' Feast} ritual, and you can cast this ritual without any secondary casters by increasing the Primary Check DC by 2.

Swampling.name: 沼泽践踏 Swampling
Swampling.description:
沼泽是你的家，一个令你感到舒适的地方。你的游泳速度提升至等同于你的陆地速度。

The swamps are a home for you, a place of comfort. Your swim Speed increases to equal your land Speed.

Elder Magic.name: 远古魔法 Elder Magic
Elder Magic.description:
你可以施放一个从你周围世界的原始元素中汲取的简单魔法法术。从原始法术列表中选择一个戏法。你可以将该戏法作为原始天生法术随意施放。与戏法的常规规则相同，该戏法会被升阶至你等级的一半（向上取整）。

You can cast a simple magic spell drawn from the primal elements of the world around you. Choose a cantrip from the primal spell list. You can cast this cantrip as a primal innate spell at will. As normal for cantrips, the cantrip is heightened to half your level, rounded up.

Empathetic Aura.name: 共情灵光 Empathetic Aura
Empathetic Aura.description:
频率 每天一次

你散发出理解的灵光，持续1分钟。你和15尺内的所有盟友在对抗精神效果的豁免上获得+1环境加值。如果你在交涉中为大师，则此加值提升至+2环境加值；如果你为传奇，则提升至+3环境加值。

Frequency once per day

You exude an aura of understanding for 1 minute. You and all allies within 15 feet gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against mental effects. This increases to a +2 circumstance bonus if you're a master in Diplomacy and a +3 circumstance bonus if you're legendary.

Mystical Chef.name: 秘法厨师 Mystical Chef
Mystical Chef.description:
你创造和调味食物的能力简直魔法般神奇。你每天各可施放一次@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Mt6ZzkVX8Q4xigFq]{创造食物}和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rdTEF1hfAWbN58NE]{强化食物}，作为2级原始天生法术。在13级时，强化食物会升阶至3级。在17级时，这两个法术都会升阶至4级。

Your ability to conjure and season food is downright magical. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Mt6ZzkVX8Q4xigFq]{Create Food} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rdTEF1hfAWbN58NE]{Enhance Victuals} each once per day as 2nd-level primal innate spells. At 13th level, enhance victuals is heightened to 3rd level. At 17th level, both spells are heightened to 4th level.

Bananarama.name: 芭娜娜拉玛 Bananarama
Bananarama.description:
你不能指望离开你最爱的零食。你每天一次可以施放@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Mt6ZzkVX8Q4xigFq]{创造食物}，作为一个2级原初先天法术，但你召唤出的食物完全由香蕉和牛奶组成；你创造的食物足够供8个中型生物食用而非6个，并且这些食物并不寡淡、也不令人倒胃口。

You can't expect to go without your favorite snacks. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Mt6ZzkVX8Q4xigFq]{Create Food} once per day as a 2nd-level primal innate spell, but the food you conjure is entirely bananas and milk; you create enough food for 8 Medium creatures instead of 6, and the food isn't bland and unappealing.

Dream Experience.name: 梦境体验 Dream Experience
Dream Experience.description:
你是一位聪明且充满热情的梦境行者，能够将梦中时光里那些奇异的技能与杂糅的经历带到清醒时光中，尽管这份专精如同梦境本身一样转瞬即逝。每日一次，在你醒来时，你可以选择一项技能。你在所选技能上获得受训（熟练度）等级，直到你的下一次每日准备；或者如果你已在所选技能上为受训，则改为成为专家。如果你在所选技能上已是专家或更高，则选择该技能不会获得任何益处。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.itELbeznE2W5Wmju]{效果: 梦境经历}

You're a clever and passionate dreamer, capable of carrying the strange skills and mishmash of experiences of your dreaming hours over into your waking hours, though this expertise is as fleeting as dreams themselves. Once per day, upon waking, you can select one skill. You gain the trained proficiency rank in the skill you selected until your next daily preparation, or if you're already trained in the selected skill, you become an expert instead. If you were already an expert or better in the selected skill, you don't gain any benefit from selecting that skill.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.itELbeznE2W5Wmju]{Effect: Dream Experience}

Hardriggan Weapon Brutality.name: 哈德里根武器残暴 Hardriggan Weapon Brutality
Hardriggan Weapon Brutality.description:
你挥舞大型武器的天赋意味着当它们命中时你能将其威力发挥到极致，并学会如何充分运用它们的全部潜能。每当你使用你的角、一把硬里甘武器，或你通过硬里甘武器熟悉专长而受训的武器造成大成功或大失败命中时，你应用该武器的重击专精效果。

Your talent for swinging big weapons means you can get the most out of them when they connect, and you learn how to use them to their full potential. Whenever you critically hit using your horn, a hardriggan weapon, or one of the weapons you are trained with from the Hardriggan Weapon Familiarity feat, you apply the weapon's critical specialization effect.

Rumplank Reveler Dedication.name: 朗普兰克狂欢者奉献 Rumplank Reveler Dedication
Rumplank Reveler Dedication.description:
许可 你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-backgrounds.Item.slh3lyeHxQoNtBUi]{Rumplank Reveler} 背景，或曾深度参与 Rumplank 的庆典活动。

你是一名爱嬉闹的纵饮狂欢者，能够鼓动任何人群投入到具有感染力的欢乐与喜庆庆祝之中。若你尚未同时在酒精学识（技能）与烹饪学识（技能）两者上都为受训，你将成为酒精学识（技能）或烹饪学识（技能）受训。若你已在酒精学识（技能）或烹饪学识（技能）上为受训，则你在已受训的上述各项学识（技能）上改为专家。你成为表演专家，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.M2DHoTWpUrQKGlzH]{Revel} 动作。

特殊 在你从 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.W9kPftynQPH0q8DO.JournalEntryPage.JBFSaRR5MTW1aJgR#rumplank-reveler-(archetype)]{Rumplank Reveler（变体）}中获得另外两个专长之前，你不能选择另一个奉献专长。

Access You have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-backgrounds.Item.slh3lyeHxQoNtBUi]{Rumplank Reveler} background or have participated heavily in Rumplank festivities.

You are a merry-making carouser capable of rallying any crowd into a contagious celebration of cheerfulness and gaiety. You become trained in Alcohol Lore or Cooking Lore if you aren't trained in both. If you were already trained in Alcohol Lore or Cooking, you become an expert in each of those Lore skills in which you were trained instead. You become an expert in Performance, and you gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.M2DHoTWpUrQKGlzH]{Revel} action.

Special You can't select another dedication feat until you have gained two other feats from the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.W9kPftynQPH0q8DO.JournalEntryPage.JBFSaRR5MTW1aJgR#rumplank-reveler-(archetype)]{Rumplank Reveler (Archetype)}.

Master Telepath.name: 心灵通讯大师 Master Telepath
Master Telepath.description:
通过扩展你的心灵能力，你可以与30英尺内的生物进行心灵感应交流。一旦你通过与某个生物交流建立连接，该交流就是双向的。你只能与和你共享一种语言的生物交流。

By expanding your psychic abilities, you can communicate telepathically with creatures within 30 feet. Once you establish a connection by communicating with a creature, the communication is two-way. You can only communicate with creatures that share a language with you.

Model of Durability.name: 耐久范式 Model of Durability
Model of Durability.description:
你的盟友总能指望你帮助他们挺过最艰难的体力考验。即使你没有事先准备提供帮助，你也可以使用援助反应动作（）来给予一名相邻盟友的强韧豁免加值。

Your allies can always count on you to help them tough out the most physically demanding situations. You can use the Aid reaction to grant a bonus to an adjacent ally’s Fortitude saving throw even when you haven’t prepared to help.

Coral Reef.name: 珊瑚礁 Coral Reef
Coral Reef.description:
频率 每天一次

你召唤出与你自身相谐的特化珊瑚虫，并将它们结合成一座巨大的礁体。这具有与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kOa055FIrO9Smnya]{Wall of Stone}类似的效果，但若不是在水下召唤，该礁体会在1分钟内死亡并消失。直到你的下一次每日准备，你通过共享的珊瑚虫与一座被召唤的珊瑚礁维持连接。这使你能够交互你的珊瑚礁，以便通过所有礁体的空间进行观察，并能看到礁体另一侧，即使它通常会阻挡你的视觉线。这种礁体视野持续至你下个回合的开始。

 

Frequency once per day

You call forth specialized polyps attuned to your own and form them together into a massive reef. This has effects similar to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kOa055FIrO9Smnya]{Wall of Stone}, except the reef dies and vanishes in 1 minute if not conjured underwater. Until your next daily preparations, you maintain a link to a conjured coral reef through your shared polyps. This allows you to Interact with your coral reef in order to see through all of the reefs’ spaces, and on the other side of the reef even if it would normally block your line of sight. This reef vision lasts until the beginning of your next turn.

Stoke Fear.name: 煽动恐惧 Stoke Fear
Stoke Fear.description:
你的攻击向懦夫们证明你才是占据主导的战士。当你用近战打击命中一名处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧（状态）} 的敌人时，该敌人在你的下个回合开始前无法将其惊惧（状态）降低到 1 以下。在第一次因此阻止该敌人降低其惊惧（状态）之后，该敌人将对你的 stoke fear 获得 1 分钟的暂时免疫。

Your attacks show cowards that you are the dominant warrior. When you hit a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} foe with a melee Strike, that foe can't reduce their frightened condition below 1 until the beginning of your next turn. After the first time this prevents the foe from reducing their frightened condition, that foe is then temporarily immune to your stoke fear for 1 minute.

Nutrispeaker.name: 营养演说者 Nutrispeaker
Nutrispeaker.description:
频率 每日一次

食物会与厨师的技能以及其周遭生物的生命能量产生共鸣，而你知道如何以超自然的层面汲取这些信息。在10分钟内，你可以与任何已被准备好供食用的食物交谈。

尽管食物并不具备智能，但你是在与食物内部的一缕驱动火花交谈——那火花由食材逐渐消散的本质与厨师的精神投入相结合而成。食物在被制作之前并不知道任何事，但大多数食物都能描述自它成为食物以来曾在其周围出现过的任何人（包括制作它的人），并且可能能够对它原本 intended 的餐食性质发表看法：例如胜利庆宴、家常便饭、勉强果腹等。食物对自己最终被吃掉的命运出奇地坦然，因此不会刻意回避这个话题。新鲜的食物往往活泼健谈，而陈旧或腐烂的食物通常回答迟缓且脾气乖戾。食物知识的范围由GM决定。

Frequency once per day

Food resonates with the skill of the cook and the life energy of those around it, and you know how to tap into that information on a supernatural level. For 10 minutes, you can speak with any kind of food that’s been prepared for consumption.

While food is not intelligent, you speak with an animating spark within the food, formed from a combination of the ingredients’ fading essence and the cook’s mental efforts. Food doesn’t know anything prior to being prepared, but most food can describe anyone it’s been around since becoming food (including the person who prepared it) and might be able to opine as to the nature of the meal it was intended for: as a victory feast, common meal, meager subsistence, and so on. Food is surprisingly accepting about its ultimate fate of being eaten, and thus it doesn’t make any effort to avoid this topic. Fresh food tends to be lively and chatty, while food that is old or rotting tends to be slow to answer and churlish. The scope of food’s knowledge is up to the GM.

Sturdy Name.name: 坚固名称 Sturdy Name
Sturdy Name.description:
通过你伟大的事迹与成就，你的名字比其他克拉格拉克更具分量，并且你可以更频繁地呼唤它。你可以每小时使用一次 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.4txBP4TSmh6fapGq]{Invoke Name Mark}，而不是每天一次。

Through your great deeds and accomplishments, your name has gained more significance than other kragraks, and you can invoke it more often. You can use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.4txBP4TSmh6fapGq]{Invoke Name Mark} once per hour, instead of once per day.

Rock Fist.name: 岩石拳 Rock Fist
Rock Fist.description:
你的拳坚硬如岩石，使你能够进行致命的拳击和类似攻击，并将敌人在战场上推来推去。你的拳失去非致命（特征）并获得推撞特性。此外，当你获得此专长时，你可以选择让你的拳失去灵巧特性，作为交换将伤害骰从1d4提高到1d6。一旦你做出移除灵巧特性的选择，就无法更改。

Your fists are as hard as rock, allowing you to make lethal punches and similar attacks and push your foes around the battlefield. Your fists lose the nonlethal trait and gain the shove trait. Additionally, when you take this feat, you can choose to have your fists lose the agile trait and in exchange increase the damage die from 1d4 to 1d6. Once you make the choice to remove the agile trait, you can’t change it.

Xotlxotl Weapon Expertise.name: 索特尔索特尔武器专精 Xotlxotl Weapon Expertise
Xotlxotl Weapon Expertise.description:
你的武器技巧或许尚未臻于完美，但绝对比大多数人更接近数步。每当你获得一项职业特性，使你在某种武器或多种武器上获得专家或强效熟练度时，你也会在你已受训的 xotlxotl 武器，以及 Xotlxotl Weapon Familiarity 专长中列出的武器上获得该熟练度。

Your weapon skills may not yet be perfect, but they're definitely a few steps closer than most people's. Whenever you gain a class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency in a given weapon or weapons, you also gain that proficiency in xotlxotl weapons in which you are trained and the weapons listed in the Xotlxotl Weapon Familiarity feat.

Push Past Death.name: 突破死亡 Push Past Death
Push Past Death.description:
频率 每日一次

触发 你具有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死（状态）} 状态，并即将尝试一次复苏检定。

你拒绝再向死亡之门靠近一步；相反，你用力把自己从门口生生拽回来，撞碎门框，并回来做最后一搏以击败你的敌人。你恢复至 1 生命值，失去濒死（状态）与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷} 状态，并且在此回合中可以如常行动。你以这种方式失去濒死（状态）时，照常获得或提高 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{受伤（状态）} 状态。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying} condition and are about to attempt a recovery check.

You refuse to step any closer to death’s door; instead, you wrench yourself bodily from the doorway, bust up the frame, and return for one final push to defeat your foes. You’re restored to 1 Hit Point, lose the dying and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} conditions, and can act normally on this turn. You gain or increase the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded} condition as normal when losing the dying condition in this way.

Natural Toxin Lore.name: 天然毒素学识 Natural Toxin Lore
Natural Toxin Lore.description:
你对毒素的知识基于自然界的原理，但你可以运用同样的理念去理解各类毒素，甚至合成毒素。你可以用自然代替制作来鉴定任何类型的毒素，包括炼金毒素。你也可以用自然来制作毒素。

Your knowledge of toxins is based on the principles of the natural world, but you can apply those same ideas to understand all sorts of poisons, even synthetic poisons. You can use Nature instead of Crafting to identify any type of poison, including alchemical poisons. You can also use Nature to Craft poisons.

Concealed Traveler.name: 隐蔽旅者 Concealed Traveler
Concealed Traveler.description:
你的长辈教会了你安全旅行的技巧。在探索期间，当你尝试 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{Avoid Notice} 时，你可以用 Bacoo 学识 代替 隐匿。如果你在 Avoid Notice 时担任带领者且盟友在 Follow the Expert，那么若你在所使用的技能上为专家，你给予的环境加值为+3而非+2；若你为大师或传奇，则给予+4环境加值。

Your elders taught you techniques to travel safely. During exploration, you can use Bacoo Lore instead of Stealth when trying to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{Avoid Notice}. If you're leading while Avoiding Notice and allies are Following the Expert, you grant a +3 circumstance bonus instead of +2 if you're an expert in the skill you're using, and a +4 circumstance bonus if you're a master or legendary.

Venomous Infusion.name: 毒液灌注 Venomous Infusion
Venomous Infusion.description:
你可以在打出有力一击后向你的敌人释放毒液，若你使用来自触须编织者传承的触手，则会有额外效果。当你以近战打击对相邻敌人造成大成功或大失败时，你将毒液注入敌人体内，使其受到[[/r 1d4[persistent,poison]]]伤害。若你拥有触须编织者传承，则即使你并不相邻，此持续性毒素伤害也会在你以触须编织者传承的触手打击造成大成功或大失败时生效；并且若你相邻，则你以触须编织者传承的触手打击造成大成功或大失败时，该伤害提高至[[/r 1d6[persistent,poison]]]伤害。

You can release venom into your foes after you land a telling blow, with extra effect if you’re using your tentacle from the tendrilweaver heritage. On a critical hit with a melee Strike against an adjacent enemy, you inject venom into your foe, causing it to take [[/r 1d4[persistent,poison]]] damage. If you have the tendrilweaver heritage, this persistent poison damage also applies on a critical hit with your tentacle Strike from the tendrilweaver heritage, even if you aren’t adjacent, and it increases to [[/r 1d6[persistent,poison]]] damage on a critical hit with your tentacle Strike from the tendrilweaver heritage if you’re adjacent.

Diligent Efforts.name: 勤勉努力 Diligent Efforts
Diligent Efforts.description:
你的专注与集中能力甚至超越其他勤奋的欧波克。你在进行任何休整模式行动的检定时获得+1环境加值。

You have a sense of focus and concentration beyond even other hardworking orpoks. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to checks to perform any downtime activity.

Kragrak Dig.name: 克拉格拉克挖掘 Kragrak Dig
Kragrak Dig.description:
频率 每分钟一次

利用你与大地的连接，你会立刻在触及范围内的松散泥土、尘土、碎石、沙子等物质中（但不能在坚固石头中）挖出一个洞，最大至一个 5 英尺立方体的体型。如果你在一个被盟友占据的空间下方使用该能力，该盟友会无害地下沉。如果你在一个被敌人占据的空间下方使用该能力，该敌人可以选择无害地下沉，或移动到其选择的最近可用空间。

Frequency once per minute

Using your connection to earth, you instantly dig a hole through loose dirt, dust, gravel, sand, and the like (though not solid stone) within reach, up to the size of a 5-foot cube. If you use this ability underneath a space occupied by an ally, that ally descends harmlessly. If you use it underneath a space occupied by a foe, the foe can either descend harmlessly or move to the nearest available space of its choice.

Metabolic Recovery.name: 代谢恢复 Metabolic Recovery
Metabolic Recovery.description:
你已重新获得通过幼年形态的克拉格拉克所具备的快速代谢来迅速恢复的能力，但不会有任何让你精疲力竭的风险。若你休息 10 分钟，你恢复等同于你的体质调整值 × 你等级的一半的生命值。这会与任何你从 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} 获得的治疗累加。你的身体再生也比其他克拉格拉克更快。通常，你只需要 1 天就能长回一个手指体型的身体部位，1 周长回一只手，1 个月长回一条手臂。

You’ve regained the ability to rapidly recover via fast metabolism available to kragraks in child form, but without any risk of burning yourself out. If you rest for 10 minutes, you gain Hit Points equal to your Constitution modifier × half your level. This is cumulative with any healing you receive from @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}. Your bodily regeneration also works faster than other kragraks. It typically only takes you 1 day to regrow a body part the size of a finger, 1 week for a hand, and 1 month for an arm.

Curse of the Waves.name: 波涛诅咒 Curse of the Waves
Curse of the Waves.description:
你用波涛的愤怒诅咒你的敌人，使水本身令其染病。你可以每天施放一次@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.z2mfh3oPnfYqXflY]{水手的诅咒}，作为原初先天法术。

You curse your foe with the wrath of the waves, causing the water itself to sicken them. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.z2mfh3oPnfYqXflY]{Mariner's Curse} once per day as a primal innate spell.

Song's Secrets.name: 歌之秘密 Song's Secrets
Song's Secrets.description:
你与伟大之歌的魔法联系已经强大到足以授予你更强大的奥秘，你将其化为优势，把曲调转化为神秘学魔法。选择一个1环神秘学法术以及一个2环或更低环的神秘学法术。它们必须是你有许可的法术，且必须来自预言、附魔或幻术学派。你每天可以将你所选择的每个法术各施放一次，作为神秘学天生法术。

Your magical connection to the great song has grown strong enough to grant you more powerful secrets, which you use to your advantage, transforming the tunes into occult magic. Select one 1st-level occult spell and one 2nd-level or lower occult spell. They must be spells to which you have access, and they must be from the divination, enchantment, or illusion schools. You can cast each of your chosen spells once per day as occult innate spells.

Rabbit Whisperer.name: 兔语者 Rabbit Whisperer
Rabbit Whisperer.description:
和许多班诺格一样，你一直觉得自己与普通兔子有着密切的亲缘关系，并且你与这些动物近亲共享许多习性与怪癖。你将兔形目动物的抽动、肢体语言与罕见的声音辨认为它们独特的语言。你可以向兔子、野兔以及类兔生物（例如鹿角兔和阿尔米拉吉）提问、从它们那里获得回答，并对它们使用交涉（技能）。

Like many bannogs, you've always felt a close kinship with ordinary rabbits, and you share many habits and eccentricities in common with your animal kindred. You recognize the twitches, body language, and rare sounds of lagomorphs as their own peculiar language. You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with rabbits, hares, and rabbit-like creatures, such as jackalopes and almirajs.

Superior Strikes.name: 卓越打击 Superior Strikes
Superior Strikes.description:
你利用在智谋上胜过对手或趁他们喝醉的机会。当你对处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied} 的目标进行一次近战打击时，你在伤害掷骰上获得等同于武器伤害骰数量或 stupefied 数值（取较高者）的环境加值。

You take advantage of outthinking your opponents or catching them drunk. When making a melee Strike against a target who is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied}, you gain a circumstance bonus to the damage roll equal to the number of weapon damage dice or the stupefied value, whichever is higher.

Magical Mender.name: 魔法修补者 Magical Mender
Magical Mender.description:
你擅长用魔法修理东西，也许是在别人没注意的时候。你每天一次可以将@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.dINQzhqGmIsqGMUY]{Mending}作为一种原初先天法术施放。到第9等级时，你可以施放2级mending，到第13等级时，你可以施放3级mending。

You have a knack for fixing things magically, perhaps when others aren’t watching. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.dINQzhqGmIsqGMUY]{Mending} as a primal innate spell once per day. At 9th level, you can cast 2nd level mending, and at 13th level, you can cast 3rd-level mending.

Coral Expansion.name: 珊瑚扩张 Coral Expansion
Coral Expansion.description:
频率 每日一次

你以魔法移除导致你身体的息肉分化成你身体的专门化，使你的整个身体变形为未分化、剧毒无比的珊瑚触手，伸展以触及远处的位置，然后在该位置重新物质化你的形态。触手以一条 @Template[type:line|distance:120] 伸展，并对线内所有敌人造成 @Damage[18d6[poison]] 伤害，进行一次 @Check[type:reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)|basic:true] 豁免，对抗你职业DC与法术DC中较高者，但你仍对自身有足够的控制，不会伤害你的盟友。你作为一团触手的移动仍可触发反应动作（），但大多数反应动作（）不会影响你，除了那些会反制该效果的，或GM判定会影响未分化毒素触手的。

 

Frequency once per day

Magically removing the specialization that causes your body’s polyps to differentiate into your body, you transform your entire body into undifferentiated incredibly venomous coral tendrils, stretching out to reach a distant location, then rematerialize your form in that location. The tendrils stretch out in a @Template[type:line|distance:120] and deal @Damage[18d6[poison]] damage to all foes in the line, with a @Check[type:reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)|basic:true] save against the higher of your class DC and spell DC, but you still have enough control of yourself not to damage your allies. Your movement as a collection of tendrils can still trigger reactions, but most reactions won’t affect you, except for those that would counteract the effect or that the GM decides would affect undifferentiated poison tendrils.

Perfect Regeneration.name: 完美再生 Perfect Regeneration
Perfect Regeneration.description:
频率 每天一次

你以神秘的强效为你天生的完美治疗充能，获得再生 15，持续 1 分钟，它会在你每个回合开始时为你恢复 15 点生命值。当你拥有再生时，你不会因受到伤害而死亡，且你的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死（状态）} 不会增加到会杀死你的数值（这会阻止大多数生物超过濒死 3），但若你的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{重伤} 数值变为 4 或更高，你会保持 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷} 直到你的伤势被治疗。若你受到火伤害，你的再生会失效，直到你下个回合结束后才会恢复。

如果你拥有“完美复原”专长，则每当你从再生中恢复生命值时，你还会再生一个受损或毁坏的器官（若有），并且在“完美再生”的持续时间内，你可以花费一个 交互 动作将被切断的身体部位按在其被切断的区域上，从而将其重新接回。

Frequency once per day

You supercharge your natural perfect healing with mystic potency, gaining regeneration 15 for 1 minute, which restores 15 Hit Points to you at the start of each of your turns. While you have regeneration, you can't die from damage, and your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying} condition can't increase to a value that would kill you (this stops most creatures from going beyond dying 3), though if your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded} value becomes 4 or higher, you stay @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} until your wounds are treated. If you take fire damage, your regeneration deactivates until after the end of your next turn.

If you have the Perfect Recovery feat, each time you regain Hit Points from regeneration, you also regrow one damaged or ruined organ (if any), and during Perfect Regeneration's duration, you can reattach severed body parts by spending an Interact action to hold the body part to the area from which it was severed.

Horn Charge.name: 号角冲锋 Horn Charge
Horn Charge.description:
频率 每分钟一次

你身体前倾并发起冲锋，用你的犄角刺穿敌人。沿直线前进一次，然后使用来自硬掘矮人族裔的犄角徒手攻击进行一次犄角打击。若你移动了至少10尺且命中，你在每个武器伤害骰上对伤害掷骰获得+2环境加值。

Frequency once per minute

You lean forward and charge, impaling foes with your horns. Stride once in a straight line, then make a horn Strike with the horn unarmed attack from the hardriggan ancestry. If you moved at least 10 feet and hit, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to the damage roll per weapon damage die.

The Dead Tell No Tales.name: 亡者无言 The Dead Tell No Tales
The Dead Tell No Tales.description:
你提醒他人，死人最擅长保守秘密，以此把他们吓得噤声。由于你令人畏惧的名声会威胁他人保持沉默（以及你为此采取的明确行为，例如使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{Coerce} 动作），你试图压制的信息将变得更难被获取。当你正积极试图压制该信息时，任何用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Request} 请求该信息、用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{Gather Information} 收集信息，或以其他方式让某人泄露相关信息的检定，除了所有其他相关 DC 之外，还必须超过你的威吓 DC。若他们在其他 DC 上成功，但未能超过你的威吓 DC，他们能够判断人们确实知道该信息，但因害怕而不敢透露其内容。

You remind others that the dead keep secrets best of all, scaring them into silence. Due to your fearsome reputation threatening others into silence (and explicit activities you take to do so such as using the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{Coerce} action), it becomes much more difficult to gain information you’re trying to suppress. Checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Request} the information, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{Gather Information}, or otherwise get someone to divulge the information in question when you’re actively attempting to suppress it, must exceed your Intimidation DC, in addition to all other relevant DCs. If they succeed at the other DC but not against your Intimidation DC, they are able to determine that people know the information but are too scared to reveal what it is.

Take Root.name: 扎根 Take Root
Take Root.description:
你借助自己与红树林深根的联结来提升稳定性。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{禁足（状态）}，并在对抗试图强行移动你或使你 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地} 的检定时，你的反射与强韧豁免以及 DC 获得 +4 环境加值。你可以再次使用扎根以结束此效果并重新能够移动；若你失去禁足（状态）或被强行移动（你的根被拔出），此效果也会自动结束。

You draw upon your connection to the mangrove's deep roots to improve your stability. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} condition, and a +4 circumstance bonus to your Reflex and Fortitude saving throws and DC against attempts to forcefully move you or make you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. You can use Take Root again to end this effect and be able to move again, and it automatically ends if you lose the immobilized condition or are forcefully moved as your roots are pulled out.

Boogie Down.name: 布吉舞步 Boogie Down
Boogie Down.description:
你的表演极具感染力，周围的人忍不住想跟着你的编舞一起动起来。你向一个方向Stride。若你的Stride成功，则所有受@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.M2DHoTWpUrQKGlzH]{Revel}影响的生物在1轮内，只要它们朝着你移动的同一方向移动，便获得+10英尺的速度状态加值。

Your performance is so catchy that those around you can't help but want to follow along with your choreography. You Stride in one direction. If your Stride is successful, all creatures affected by @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.M2DHoTWpUrQKGlzH]{Revel} get +10-foot status bonus to their Speed for 1 round as long as they move in the same direction that you moved.

Toxin Advantage.name: 毒素优势 Toxin Advantage
Toxin Advantage.description:
当你的毒素肆虐敌人时，你能轻易将其击倒。任何生物因你的毒素而承受持续酸性伤害或持续毒素伤害时，只要其仍在承受该持续伤害，便对你处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]状态。若其同时免疫酸性与毒素伤害，则其不会对你处于措手不及状态。

It's easy for you to strike your foe down while they're ravaged by your toxin. Any creature suffering from persistent acid damage or persistent poison damage from your toxin is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] to you as long as they're suffering from the persistent damage. If they're immune to both acid and poison damage, they aren't off-guard to you.

Searing Strikes.name: 灼热打击 Searing Strikes
Searing Strikes.description:
当你的攻击以强大的力场命中时，你体内的火焰会随之涌动，沿着你的手指奔流而下并点燃你的敌人。你对相邻生物的近战打击在大成功或大失败时会额外造成 [[/r 1d4[persistent,fire]]] 伤害。

When your attacks connect with great force, the fire within your body surges in response, racing down your fingers and igniting your foe. Your melee Strikes against adjacent creatures deal an additional [[/r 1d4[persistent,fire]]] damage on a critical hit.

Coral's Voice, Nature's Ears.name: 珊瑚之声，自然之耳 Coral's Voice, Nature's Ears
Coral's Voice, Nature's Ears.description:
你将从只能与珊瑚交流拓展到与所有其他种类的动物交流。你可以与所有动物交谈，而不仅仅是珊瑚这种动物。你在对动物进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} 时获得+1 环境加值（这通常使用交涉（技能））。

You branch out from being able to communicate with coral to all other kinds of animals. You can speak to all animals, not just animals that are coral. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} on animals (which usually uses the Diplomacy skill).

Burrowing Claws.name: 掘地爪击 Burrowing Claws
Burrowing Claws.description:
你的爪击锋利且足够强壮，使你能够挖掘大地与沙子。你获得15英尺的掘穴速度。

Your claws are sharp and strong enough to enable you to dig through earth and sand. You gain a burrow Speed of 15 feet.

Eld's Familiar.name: 埃尔德的魔宠 Eld's Familiar
Eld's Familiar.description:
你与埃尔德界的一只极其微小的怪物建立了羁绊——一只孱弱的埃尔德魔——并将其带入与物质世界同调的相位，以使其作为你的魔宠为你效力。你获得一只魔宠。该魔宠通常看起来像一只动物或其他生物，并带有与你的柯拉元素相匹配的轻微元素特性。若你在生命后期的重大生命转折中改变了你的柯拉，你的魔宠特性也会随之改变以匹配（若你拥有 Familiar Meld，这也会改变魔宠所获得的魔宠能力）。

You have bonded with an extremely minor monster of the Eld, a weak eldamon, and brought it into phase with the material world in order to serve as your familiar. You gain a familiar. The familiar typically looks like an animal or other creature with minor elemental features that match your chora’s element. If you change your chora later in life during a major life transition, your familiar’s features change to match (this also changes the familiar ability it gains if you have Familiar Meld).

Song's Sovereignty.name: 歌谣的主权 Song's Sovereignty
Song's Sovereignty.description:
你与伟大之歌的魔法联结强大到极致，已达到该联结的巅峰，得以引出通常需要吟游诗人数年才能掌握的秘传魔法。选择一个3级或更低的秘传法术，以及一个4级或更低的秘传法术。它们必须是你拥有许可的法术，且必须来自预言、附魔或幻术学派。你每天可以各施放一次所选法术，作为秘传先天法术。

Your magical connection to the great song is so powerful that you have reached the apex of that connection, drawing out occult magic that normally takes bards years to master. Select one 3rd-level or lower occult spell and one 4th-level or lower occult spell. They must be spells to which you have access, and they must be from the divination, enchantment, or illusion schools. You can cast each of your chosen spells once per day as occult innate spells.

Orpok Ways.name: 奥波克之道 Orpok Ways
Orpok Ways.description:
频率 每日一次

触发 你尝试进行一次基于智力或感知的技能检定，但你尚未掷骰

你从奥尔波克历史中回想起一位相关的英雄或某个情境，并迅速将那些历史教诲应用到眼前的局势中。你改为使用你的奥尔波克学识（技能）来进行该检定，而非通常使用的技能；DC与正常情况相同。

Frequency once per day

Trigger you attempt a Intelligence or Wisdom-based skill check, but you haven’t rolled yet

You recall a relevant hero or situation from orpok history and quickly apply those historical teachings to the situation at hand. Roll the check using your Orpok Lore skill instead of the usual skill, at the same DC as normal.

Drag Down.name: 拖拽下坠 Drag Down
Drag Down.description:
你擅长从水中猛然冲出并将猎物偷走。当你在至少 10 英尺深的水中游泳时，你擒抱一名相邻的生物（在附近陆地上或在水中），并将其拉到水面之下。尝试一次运动检定以对该生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple}。成功时，若该生物在陆地上，除 Grapple 的正常效果外，你将该生物拉入水中，置于与你相邻的一个空间内。若该生物已经在水中，成功时，除 Grapple 的正常效果外，你将该生物拖向水中更深处 10 英尺，并与该生物一起移动 10 英尺。使用“拖拽下潜”将生物移入水中或拖入更深的水中，对该生物而言属于强迫移动，但对你而言不是。提醒一下，强迫移动不能将生物强行推入有害的空间。

You are a master at bursting forth from the water and stealing your prey away. While swimming in water at least 10 feet deep, you grab an adjacent creature (on nearby land or in the water) and pull it below the surface. Attempt an Athletics check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple} the creature. On a success, if the creature is on land, in addition to the normal effects of Grapple, you pull the creature into the water in a space adjacent to you. If the creature is already in the water, on a success, in addition to the normal effects of Grapple, you drag the creature 10 feet deeper into the water, moving 10 feet with the creature. Moving a creature into water or deeper into water using Drag Down is forced movement for the creature but not for you. As a reminder, forced movement can't force a creature into a harmful space.

Plentiful Toxin.name: 丰裕毒素 Plentiful Toxin
Plentiful Toxin.description:
通过专注于流经你自身体内的来自梦境位面的形而上力量，你加快了你想象毒素的积累，使你能够比物质位面的其他bannog显著更频繁地召唤你的灵性毒素。@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.F3KQBROagKZ93FV5]{Manifest Membrane}的频率变为每小时一次。

By focusing on the metaphysical forces from the Dimension of Dreams coursing through your own body, you speed up your imaginary toxin's accumulation, allowing you to conjure your spiritual poison significantly more often than other bannogs from the Material Plane can manage. The frequency of @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.F3KQBROagKZ93FV5]{Manifest Membrane} becomes once per hour.

Polyp Expansion.name: 多形怪扩张 Polyp Expansion
Polyp Expansion.description:
你长出许多额外的息肉，使你的身体体型显著且永久地增大。你持续获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge} 的效果。

You grow many additional polyps to increase the size of your body significantly and permanently. You gain the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge} constantly.

Psychic Traveller.name: 灵能旅者 Psychic Traveller
Psychic Traveller.description:
你是一位天赋异禀的造梦者，在各种梦境与思维的领域中能够完成惊人的专长，甚至连像你这样熟练的人也无法在清醒世界中真正做到。只要你身处梦境景观或心灵景观之中，你的先攻掷骰获得+2环境加值；你在心灵决斗中进行的先攻掷骰也同样获得该加值。此外，当你处于梦境景观、心灵景观或心灵决斗中时，你的AC获得+1状态加值。若你在神秘学中为大师，则当你处于梦境景观、心灵景观或心灵决斗中时，你的AC改为获得+2状态加值，而非获得+1状态加值。在计算你在心灵决斗中的天然心灵法术数量时，你可以额外加入一个天然心灵法术。

You're a gifted dreamer, capable of amazing feats within the various realms of dreams and thoughts that even someone as skilled as you can't quite manage to achieve in the waking world. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to initiative rolls while you're within dreamscapes or mindscapes, as well as initiative rolls you make as part of psychic duels. Additionally, you gain a +1 status bonus to your AC while in a dreamscape, mindscape, or psychic duel. If you're a master in Occultism, you gain a +2 status bonus to your AC while in a dreamscape, mindscape, or psychic duel instead of gaining a +1 status bonus. When you calculate your number of natural psychic spells in a psychic duel, you can add one additional natural psychic spell.

Familiar Meld.name: 魔宠融合 Familiar Meld
Familiar Meld.description:
你获得的魔宠取回了更多的元素力量，并且它可以融入你以保护自身。它会根据你的chori所属的元素，获得一个魔宠能力作为额外能力，此能力不计入其可拥有的能力数量的正常上限。此外，作为一个具有专注（特征）的单动作，当它位于你的空间内时，它可以融入你。融入期间，它不能成为外部效果的目标，且不处于任何区域效果的区域内。然而，它不能行动，除非解除融入并再次在你的空间内分离出来；这同样是一个具有专注（特征）的单动作。

你的魔宠对传统七种chora分别获得的魔宠能力如下：如果你是aikrys，它获得飞行者；如果你是carbor，它获得植物形态，即使它不是植物；如果你是farose，它获得对火的抗力与强效抗力（但不获得对第二种能量类型的抗力）；如果你是hypisk，它获得两栖；如果你是jamamabri，它获得对电击的抗力与强效抗力（但不获得对第二种能量类型的抗力）；如果你是terath，它获得掘地者；如果你是vergiss，它获得对寒冷的抗力与强效抗力（但不获得对第二种能量类型的抗力）。

The familiar you gained retrieves more of its elemental power, and it can meld into you in order to protect itself. It gains a familiar ability depending on the element of your chori as a bonus ability, which does not count against the normal limit to the number of abilities it can have. Furthermore, as a single action, which has the concentrate trait, when it’s in your space, it can meld into you. While melded, it can’t be targeted by external effects, and isn’t in the area of any area effects, However, it can’t act except to unmeld and separate itself out into your space again, which is also a single action with the concentrate trait.

The familiar ability your familiar gains for each of the traditional seven choras is as follows: If you’re aikrys, it gains flier; if you’re carbor it gains plant form even if it isn’t a plant; if you’re farose, it gains resistance and greater resistance to fire (but not to a second energy type); if you’re hypisk, it gains amphibious; if you’re jamamabri, it gains resistance and greater resistance to electricity (but not to a second energy type); if you’re terath it gains burrower; if you’re vergiss, it gains resistance and greater resistance to cold (but not to a second energy type).

Speak with Coral.name: 与珊瑚交谈 Speak with Coral
Speak with Coral.description:
你可以与任何种类的珊瑚交流，使你能在各种类型与种类的珊瑚礁中找到交谈对象。你可以向珊瑚提问、从珊瑚那里获得回答，并对珊瑚使用交涉（技能）。GM决定哪些动物在此能力的目的下算作珊瑚。

You can communicate with any kind of coral, allowing you to find conversation partners in coral reefs of all types and kinds. You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with coral. The GM determines which animals count as coral for the purpose of this ability.

Polyp Regeneration.name: 息肉再生 Polyp Regeneration
Polyp Regeneration.description:
频率 每日一次

你迅速长出特化的息肉来替换自身受损或被毁的部分，以便治疗自己并替换缺失的器官或肢体。你暂时获得再生 15，在你每个回合开始时为你恢复 15 点生命值。当你拥有再生时，你不会因伤害而死亡，且你的濒死（状态）不能增加到会杀死你的数值（这会阻止你超过濒死 3，除非你会在不同于濒死 4 的数值死亡），不过若你的受伤值变为 4 或更高，你将保持 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷}，直到你的伤口被处理为止。如果你受到酸或火伤害，你的再生会停用，直到你的下个回合结束之后。每当你从再生中恢复生命值时，你也会再生一个受损或毁坏的器官或身体部位（如果有的话）。

 

Frequency once per day

You quickly grow specialized polyps to replace damaged or destroyed parts of yourself, in order to heal yourself and replace missing organs or limbs. You temporarily gains regeneration 15, which restores 15 Hit Points to you at the start of each of your turns. While you have regeneration, you can’t die from damage and its dying condition can’t increase to a value that would kill you (this stops you from going beyond dying 3 unless you would die at a different value than dying 4), though if your wounded value becomes 4 or higher, you stay @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} until your wounds are treated. If you take acid or fire damage, your regeneration deactivates until after the end of your next turn. Each time you regains Hit Points from regeneration, you also regrows one damaged or ruined organ or body part (if any).

Strong Piercings.name: 强力穿刺 Strong Piercings
Strong Piercings.description:
你有带有钩或饰钉的穿刺装饰，在紧急情况下可以用来悬挂物品。只要每件物品都有钩或孔以便挂在穿刺上，你就可以穿戴总计至多 1 负载的物品，且每件物品必须为 光 负载或更低。将一件物品挂到穿刺上或从穿刺上取回该物品需要一次 交互 动作。只要超出的工具是悬挂在你的穿刺上，你的穿刺还能让你额外穿戴至多 1 负载的工具（通常你能穿戴 3 负载的工具，而不是 2 负载）。

You have piercings that incorporate hooks or studs upon which you can, in a pinch, hang items. You can wear up to 1 Bulk of items that are each light Bulk or less, so long as each item has a hook or hole allowing it to hang on a piercing. Placing an item onto a piercing or retrieving it from a piercing requires a single Interact action. Your piercings allow you to wear up to 1 additional Bulk of tools (normally, 3 Bulk of tools instead of 2 Bulk), so long as the excess tools hang from your piercings.

Truecolor Revelation.name: 真彩启示 Truecolor Revelation
Truecolor Revelation.description:
你的真彩视觉极其有效，以至于你甚至能将@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}生物和物体看作带有不寻常色彩的模糊轮廓。对你而言，隐形的生物和物体是@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}，而不是因隐形而处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}或未被侦测。

Your truecolor sight is so effective that you can even see @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} creatures and objects as blurs of unusual coloration. Invisible creatures and objects are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} to you, rather than @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} or undetected due to being invisible.

Dreams Given Life.name: 被赋予生命的梦境 Dreams Given Life
Dreams Given Life.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

如果你的下一个动作是施放一个召唤带有仆从（特征）的生物的咒法学派法术，你从你的梦境中具现被召唤的生物，调整其形态以更好地满足你的需求。被召唤的生物获得梦境（特征）。此外，被召唤的生物获得以下你选择的一项能力（若你在神秘学中为传奇，则获得两项能力）。

  • 它获得20尺的攀爬、飞行或游泳速度。
  • 它获得黑暗视觉。
  • 它获得嗅觉（模糊，30尺）。
  • 它的速度增加10尺。
  • 它不需要呼吸。
  • 它可以说并理解你所知的一种语言。

     

Frequency once per 10 minutes

If your next action is to cast a conjuration spell that summons a creature with the minion trait, you conjure the summoned creature from your dreams, adapting its form to better suit your needs. The summoned creature gains the dream trait. Additionally, the summoned creature gains one of the following abilities of your choice (or two abilities if you're legendary in Occultism).

  • It gains a climb, fly, or swim speed of 20 feet.
  • It gains darkvision.
  • It gains scent (imprecise, 30 feet).
  • Its Speed increases by 10 feet.
  • It doesn't need to breathe.
  • It can speak and understand one language that you know.

Towering Growth.name: 巍然生长 Towering Growth
Towering Growth.description:
你可以在战场上成长为真正的巨人。你持续获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge} 的效果。

You can grow to become a true giant on the battlefield. You gain the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge} constantly.

Irrepressible Stride.name: 不可遏止的步伐 Irrepressible Stride
Irrepressible Stride.description:
频率 每小时一次

没有任何事物能阻止你旅行。你先进行疾走再进行挪步，或先进行挪步再进行疾走，在这次移动期间无视困难地形、强效困难地形和有害地形。若某个效果阻止你移动，你可以先尝试 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{脱逃} 该效果，若成功则再进行其他动作。

Frequency once per hour

Nothing can keep you from traveling. You Stride and then Step, or Step and then Stride, ignoring difficult terrain, greater difficult terrain, and hazardous terrain during this movement. If an effect prevents you from moving, you can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} the effect first, taking the other actions if you succeed.

Volcanic Destruction.name: 火山毁灭 Volcanic Destruction
Volcanic Destruction.description:
尽管许多克拉格拉克将火山喷发视为一种原始而辉煌的重生形态，你也明白如何将其用于破坏性的目的。事实上，你甚至学会了以一种足以让附近所有活物都感到惊恐的频率召唤喷发。每天一次，你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.O7ZEqWjwdKyo2CUv]{Volcanic Eruption} 作为天生的原始法术施放。

While many kragraks envision volcanic eruptions as a primal and resplendent form of rebirth, you understand how to use them for destructive purposes as well. In fact, you’ve even learned how to call forth eruptions at a rate that should alarm everyone living nearby. Once per day, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.O7ZEqWjwdKyo2CUv]{Volcanic Eruption} as an innate primal spell.

Sudden Dash.name: 突进冲刺 Sudden Dash
Sudden Dash.description:
你以自己可能达到的最大速度向前冲刺或跳跃，以逃离危险或抓住机会。疾行或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{跳跃}三次，以疾行与跳跃的任意组合进行。

You dash or leap forward at your maximum possible speed, either to escape from danger or seize an opportunity. Stride or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap} three times, in any combination of Strides and Leaps.

Vicious Bite.name: 凶残噬咬 Vicious Bite
Vicious Bite.description:
你已训练你的颌骨以让自己拥有强劲的咬击。你获得一个颌骨徒手攻击，造成1d6穿刺伤害并具有擒抱特征。你的颌骨属于斗殴组

You have trained your jaws to give yourself a strong bite. You gain a jaws unarmed attack that deals 1d6 piercing damage and has the grapple trait. Your jaws are in the brawling group

Expanded Scent.name: 扩展嗅觉 Expanded Scent
Expanded Scent.description:
你的嗅觉感官格外敏锐。将你的嗅觉模糊感官的射程从30英尺提高至60英尺。

Your sense of smell is particularly refined. Increase the range of your scent imprecise sense from 30 feet to 60 feet.

Crowd Favorite.name: 人群宠儿 Crowd Favorite
Crowd Favorite.description:
你清楚地知道该播放什么歌曲或端上什么食物，才能让派对上的每个人都感到彼此相连、自在且受欢迎。在你进行 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.M2DHoTWpUrQKGlzH]{Revel} 的每个回合结束时，尝试一次与你选择用于 Revel 的技能相关的技能检定。DC 通常为一个标准难度 DC，其等级等同于从你的 Revel 中受益的最高等级角色，但 GM 可以根据环境指定不同的 DC。

大成功 使所有受你的 Revel 影响的生物的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} 数值减少 2。

成功 使所有受你的 Revel 影响的生物的 frightened 数值减少 1。

You know exactly what song to play or food to serve to make everyone at the party feel connected, at ease, and welcome. At the end of each of your turns during a @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.M2DHoTWpUrQKGlzH]{Revel}, attempt a skill check associated with the skill you chose to Revel. The DC is usually a standard-difficulty DC of a level equal to the highest-level character benefiting from your Revel, but the GM can assign a different DC based on the circumstances.

Critical Success Reduce the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} value of all creatures affected by your Revel by 2.

Success Reduce the frightened value of all creatures affected by your Revel by 1.

Mystical Cleanse.name: 秘法净化 Mystical Cleanse
Mystical Cleanse.description:
当食物腐败或饮料变酸时，你知道如何抢救它们，使其不仅仅能吃，而且真正可口。你可以每餐施放一次@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.qXTB7Ec9yYh5JPPV]{净化食物与饮水}（每小时至多一次，每天最多七次），作为一个1级原初先天法术。

When food goes rancid or drinks turn sour, you know how to salvage them to make them not merely edible but truly palatable. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.qXTB7Ec9yYh5JPPV]{Purify Food and Drink} once per meal (at most once per hour, up to seven times each day), as a 1st-level primal innate spell.

Potion Mixologist.name: 药剂调配师 Potion Mixologist
Potion Mixologist.description:
你可以使用制作行动来酿造药水和毒素。你立即获得四个3级或更低等级的常见药水或摄入毒素的配方。在7级时以及之后每提升2个等级，你获得一个你等级 – 2或更低等级的常见药水或摄入毒素的配方（如果你是7级，则为5级药水；如果你是9级，则为7级药水；以此类推）。你将这些配方存放在配方簿中。

You can use the Craft activity to brew potions and poisons. You immediately gain the formulas for four common potions or ingested poisons that are 3rd level or lower. At 7th level and every 2 levels beyond that, you gain the formula for a common potion or ingested poison of your level – 2 or lower (a 5th-level potion if you’re 7th level, a 7th-level potion if you’re 9th level, and so on). You store these formulas in a formula book.

Orpok Lore.name: 奥波克学识 Orpok Lore
Orpok Lore.description:
你花了大量时间学习奥波克的历史与文化，并且熟知其传奇、英雄与食谱。你在工艺和社会两项技能上获得受训熟练度等级。如果你将自动在其中一项技能上变为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能上变为受训。你也在奥波克学识上变为受训。

You have spent a lot of time learning about orpok history and culture, and you know its legends, heroes, and recipes well. You gain the trained proficiency rank in both Crafting and Society. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also become trained in Orpok Lore.

Murk Eyes.name: 昏暗之眼 Murk Eyes
Murk Eyes.description:
你的眼睛适合在沼泽无光的幽暗中视物，无论这是与生俱来的、通过突变而适应的，还是你在黑暗中努力让自己看得更远。你获得黑暗视觉。

Your eyes are suited to seeing through the lightless gloom of the swamp, whether they've been that way since birth, adapted via mutation, or straining yourself to see further through the darkness. You gain darkvision.

Everyone! Sashay!.name: 所有人！摇曳前行！ Everyone! Sashay!
Everyone! Sashay!.description:
你命令所有随着你的音乐起舞的人立刻朝同一方向移动。你朝一个方向【Stride】。同时，所有受 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.M2DHoTWpUrQKGlzH]{Revel} 影响且愿意的盟友使用一个反应动作来朝同一方向【Stride】。若此移动会使生物立刻陷入危险，则生物停止移动。受 Revel 影响的敌人必须尝试一次对抗你表演DC的@Check[type:will|dc:resolve(@actor.system.skills.performance.dc)]豁免，效果如下。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响，且在24小时内暂时免疫。

成功 该敌人不受影响。

失败 该敌人被迫【Stride】，但不需要使用其反应动作来这么做。

大成功或大失败 该敌人必须使用其反应动作来【Stride】。如果它没有反应动作可用于【Stride】，你可以选择是否仍强迫它【Stride】，或让它留在原地。

You order everyone dancing along with your music to move at once in the same direction. You Stride in one direction. At the same time, all willing allies affected by @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.M2DHoTWpUrQKGlzH]{Revel} use a reaction to Stride in the same direction. Creatures stop moving if this movement would put them in immediate danger. Foes affected by Revel must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:resolve(@actor.system.skills.performance.dc)] saving throw against your Performance DC, with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected and is temporarily immune for 24 hours.

Success The foe is unaffected.

Failure The foe is forced to Stride, but it doesn't need to use its reaction to do so.

Critical Failure The foe must use its reaction to Stride. If it doesn't have a reaction to Stride, you can choose whether to force it to Stride anyway or to have it remain in place.

Party Foul.name: 派对丑闻 Party Foul
Party Foul.description:
触发 一名受益于 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.M2DHoTWpUrQKGlzH]{Revel} 的生物掷出大失败，或使用一个以同样受益于该 Revel 的生物为目标的动作掷出大成功。

当你队伍中的某人犯错时，你会出声提醒，给他们一个纠正自己的机会。该目标重骰该次检定，并在24小时内免疫 Party Foul。若触发的动作是大失败，则此反应动作具有幸运（特征）。若触发的动作是大成功，则此反应动作具有厄运（特征），且你终止触发生物获得的 Revel 增益；如果该触发生物是敌人，则其在24小时内暂时免疫你的 Revel。

Trigger A creature benefiting from @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.M2DHoTWpUrQKGlzH]{Revel} rolls a critical failure, or rolls a critical success using an action that targets a creature also benefiting from the same Revel.

You call out when someone in your party makes a mistake, giving them an opportunity to correct themselves. The target rerolls the check and is immune to Party Foul for 24 hours. If the triggering action was a critical failure, this reaction has the fortune trait. If the triggering action was a critical success, this reaction has the misfortune trait, and you end the benefit of Revel for the triggering creature; if the triggering creature was a foe, they become temporarily immune to your Revel for 24 hours.

Ripping Horns.name: 撕裂犄角 Ripping Horns
Ripping Horns.description:
你犄角上的尖锐倒刺——无论是自然生长还是精心雕刻而成——都会造成参差不齐的创口。你的穿刺犄角打击在大成功或大失败时会额外造成 [[/r 1d4[persistent,bleed]]] 伤害。

Sharp barbs on your horns—whether from naturally-occurring growths or carefully carved from them—inflict jagged wounds. Your piercing horn Strikes deal an additional [[/r 1d4[persistent,bleed]]] damage on a critical hit.

Pigheaded.name: 顽固 Pigheaded
Pigheaded.description:
你顽强的意志甚至能在你本会就此死去时拯救你的生命。当你将要死亡时，你可以尝试一次 @Check[type:flat|dc:17|showDC:all]。若成功，你改为降至 0 生命值，且濒死值比会杀死你的数值低 1（通常，这会让你变为濒死 3）。这对死亡效果或诸如解离术之类的法术，或其他在不留下尸体的情况下将你湮灭的效果无效。

Your stubborn will can save your life, even when you would otherwise perish. When you would die, you can attempt a @Check[type:flat|dc:17|showDC:all]. On a success, you’re instead reduced to 0 Hit Points and a dying value 1 less than the value that would kill you (typically, this takes you to dying 3). This has no effect against death effects or spells such as disintegrate, or other effects that annihilate you without leaving a body.

Tenacious Tendrils.name: 坚韧触须 Tenacious Tendrils
Tenacious Tendrils.description:
你的坚韧使你能够更快地创造更强大的触须陷阱。你可以每小时使用一次触须陷阱，而非每天一次，并且生物每经过你触须陷阱的每一格会受到4点毒素伤害，而非2点毒素伤害。

Your tenacity allows you to create more powerful tendril traps more quickly. You can use Tendril Trap once per hour, instead of once per day, and creatures take 4 poison damage per square from your Tendril Trap, instead of 2 poison Damage.

Taste Sensation.name: 味觉感知 Taste Sensation
Taste Sensation.description:
你创造的食物和饮品不仅更美味，而且比通常情况（即便与其他兽人烹厨相比）也显著更有效。你制作的药水与灵药，若其具有持续时间至少为5分钟的效果，则其效果额外持续1分钟。若其持续时间至少为1小时，则其效果改为额外持续10分钟。

The food and drink you create is not only more flavorful but significantly more efficacious than is typical, even for other orpoks. Potions and elixirs you make that have an effect with a duration of at least 5 minutes provide their effects for an additional minute. If they have a duration of at least 1 hour, their effects last for an additional 10 minutes instead.

Bellowing Purification.name: 咆哮净化 Bellowing Purification
Bellowing Purification.description:
频率 每天一次

你发出一声撼天动地的咆哮，震撼你的内心深处，以你的意志对抗侵袭你身体或灵体的力量。尝试一次@Check[type:intimidation]检定，以反制一个影响你的诅咒、疾病或毒素。如常，你的反制等级等于你等级的一半（向上取整）。若你在威吓上为传奇，你可以针对每一个影响你的诅咒、疾病与毒素分别尝试威吓检定。

Frequency once per day

You give a mighty bellow that shakes you to your core, pitting your will against forces that assail your body or spirit. Attempt an @Check[type:intimidation] check to counteract a single curse, disease, or poison that afflicts you. As normal, your counteract level is equal to half your level, rounded up. If you are legendary in Intimidation, you can attempt Intimidation checks against each curse, disease, and poison that afflicts you.

Battle Canapes.name: 战斗小点心 Battle Canapes
Battle Canapes.description:
你可以递送准备好的饮品和帕亚约，为宾客提供一阵短暂的活力迸发。你可以自己享用这些开胃小点，或将其施予一名受益于 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.M2DHoTWpUrQKGlzH]{Revel} 的盟友；该盟友要么与你相邻，要么通过任意数量相互毗连、正在狂欢的盟友组成的链条与你相连，并由他们将开胃小点一路传递过去。尝试一次 @Check[type:Alcohol Lore|dc:30] 或 @Check[type:Cooking Lore|dc:30] 检定。若你在其中一项技能上拥有传奇熟练度，你可以改为尝试一次 @Check[type:Alcohol Lore|dc:40] 或 @Check[type:Cooking Lore|dc:40] 检定，以将成功检定时获得的临时生命值提高至15（大成功或大失败时为25）。

大成功或大失败 目标获得10点临时生命值。他们在1分钟后或在遭遇结束时（以先到者为准）失去任何剩余的临时生命值。

成功 目标获得5点临时生命值。他们在1分钟后或在遭遇结束时（以先到者为准）失去任何剩余的临时生命值。

失败 这些开胃小点没有效果。

You can pass around prepared drinks and payayos to give your guests a quick burst of energy. You consume the canapes yourself or administer them to an ally benefiting from @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.M2DHoTWpUrQKGlzH]{Revel}, either adjacent to you or connected to you by a chain of any number of contiguous Reveling allies who pass the canapes along. Attempt a @Check[type:Alcohol Lore|dc:30] or @Check[type:Cooking Lore|dc:30] check. If you have legendary proficiency in one of those skills, you can instead attempt a @Check[type:Alcohol Lore|dc:40] or @Check[type:Cooking Lore|dc:40] check to increase the temporary Hit Points gained on a successful check to 15 (25 on a critical success).

Critical Success The target gains 10 temporary Hit Points. They lose any remaining temporary Hit Points after 1 minute or at the end of the encounter, whichever comes first.

Success The target gains 5 temporary Hit Points. They lose any remaining temporary Hit Points after 1 minute or at the end of the encounter, whichever comes first.

Failure The canapes have no effect.

Remote Dreamer.name: 遥梦者 Remote Dreamer
Remote Dreamer.description:
如果你与一名沉睡的生物相邻，你可以作为观察者查看其梦境景观，包括其中的内容、情节与氛围。梦境中的任何事物都无法察觉或与您交互，而您也无法与梦境交互。你的目标在24小时内对远程入梦暂时免疫。你无法查看不会做梦的生物的梦境。

一旦你正在查看一个目标的梦境，只要该生物仍然沉睡，你就可以继续观看该梦境；或者直到你花费一个动作来切断这条心灵连接。当你正在查看一个目标的梦境时，你会失去来自自身身体的所有感官信息。

If you're adjacent to a sleeping creature, you can view their dreamscape, including its content, plot, and tone, as an observer. Nothing in the dream can perceive or interact with you, and you can't interact with the dream. Your target becomes temporarily immune to Remote Dreamer for 24 hours. You can't view the dreams of a creature that doesn't dream.

Once you are viewing a target's dream, you can continue watching the dream for as long as the creature remains asleep, or until you spend one action to sever this psychic connection. While you're viewing a target's dream, you lose all sensory information from your own body.

Reality Sculptor.name: 现实雕塑师 Reality Sculptor
Reality Sculptor.description:
