你可以随心所欲地塑造现实。你的@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.XVqFfyYWp1yowGpm]{Reality Shaper}的频率提高为每小时一次。当你使用Reality Shaper时，你可以选择将你的梦境灵光的区域增加为@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]。你可以以自由动作（）延长你的梦境灵光的持续时间，并且在你变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}且不再能够延长持续时间之前，你最多可以延长持续时间10次。

You can sculpt reality as you see fit. The frequency of your @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.XVqFfyYWp1yowGpm]{Reality Shaper} increases to once per hour. When you use Reality Shaper, you can choose to increase the area of your dream aura to a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]. You can extend the duration of your dream aura as a free action, and can extend the duration up to 10 times before you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} and are no longer able to extend the duration.

Mythical Malevolence.name: 神话恶意 Mythical Malevolence
Mythical Malevolence.description:
你引导关于巴库恶意与诡计多端的传说，迷惑并惊吓你的敌人。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.hkSuxXOc9qBleJbd]{骇人学识}技能专长，但你在使用骇人学识时，改为尝试一次@Check[type:Bacoo Lore|defense:will|traits:emotion,fear,mental,action:disturbing-knowledge]检定，而非神秘学检定。你只能在巴库学识达到传奇时，选择影响30尺内任意数量的敌人，而非在神秘学达到传奇时。

You channel tales of bacoo malevolence and trickster caprice, confusing and frightening your foes. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.hkSuxXOc9qBleJbd]{Disturbing Knowledge} skill feat, but you attempt a @Check[type:Bacoo Lore|defense:will|traits:emotion,fear,mental,action:disturbing-knowledge] check instead of an Occultism check to use your Disturbing Knowledge. You can choose to affect any number of enemies within 30 feet only when becoming legendary in Bacoo Lore, rather than when becoming legendary in Occultism.

Talented Psychic.name: 天赋异禀的心灵师 Talented Psychic
Talented Psychic.description:
你“聆听”心灵震动与想法的能力有所提升。你每天可以将@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KHnhPHL4x1AQHfbC]{心智探知}作为天生秘法法术施放一次。

Your ability to "hear" psychic vibrations and thoughts has improved. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KHnhPHL4x1AQHfbC]{Mind Reading} as an innate occult spell once per day.

Keep This Party Going.name: 让这场派对继续下去 Keep This Party Going
Keep This Party Going.description:
需求 你正从 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.M2DHoTWpUrQKGlzH]{Revel} 中获益

你知道如何通过分发额外的食物、倒上你最好的饮品，或仅仅用大家最喜欢的歌曲把气氛推向高潮，从而让派对持续下去。尝试以你为你的 Revel 选择的技能进行一次检定。DC 通常为标准难度的 DC，其等级等于从你的 Revel 中获益的等级最高的角色的等级，但 GM 可以根据环境指定不同的 DC。

大成功或大失败：成功 Revel 持续至你下下个回合结束。在你下个回合开始前，对豁免的状态加值提高至 +2。

成功 Revel 持续至你下个回合结束，或其当前持续时间，以较长者为准。

大成功或大失败：失败 Revel 立即结束。

Requirements You are benefiting from @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.M2DHoTWpUrQKGlzH]{Revel}

You know how to keep a party going by passing out extra food, pouring your best drinks, or simply kicking things into high gear with everyone's favorite song. Attempt a check in the skill chosen for your Revel. The DC is usually a standard-difficulty DC of a level equal to the highest-level character benefiting from your Revel, but the GM can assign a different DC based on the circumstances.

Critical Success The Revel lasts until the end of your turn after next. Until the beginning of your next turn, the status bonus to saving throws increases to +2.

Success The Revel lasts until the end of your next turn, or its current duration, whichever is longer.

Critical Failure The Revel ends immediately.

Poppy's Peerless Pierce.name: 波比的无双穿刺 Poppy's Peerless Pierce
Poppy's Peerless Pierce.description:
运用由波比·冯·藤壶传承下来的海盗技法，并自她鼎盛时期以来仅有少数人得以精通，你能毫不费力地刺穿一名敌人的防御，并同时攻击其身后的另一名敌人。对一名位于你触及范围内的敌人，以一把穿刺武器进行一次近战打击。此次打击无视该敌人等同于你等级的硬度或抗力。如果你的攻击命中并对目标造成伤害，你可以将你的攻击掷骰结果与紧邻第一名目标、且在其身后呈一直线的另一名敌人的AC进行比较。对第二名敌人使用相同的伤害掷骰。即使第二名敌人通常会位于你的触及边缘之外5英尺处，你仍可以攻击该敌人。波比的无双穿刺在计算你的多重攻击减值时视为两次攻击。

Using a piratical technique passed down by Poppy von Barnacle and mastered by few others since her heyday, you effortlessly pierce a foe’s defenses and attack a foe behind them as well. Make a melee Strike with a piercing weapon against a foe within reach. This Strike ignores an amount of the foe’s Hardness or resistance equal to your level. If your attack hits and damages the target, you can compare the result of your attack roll to the AC of a foe adjacent to the first target and in a straight line behind them. Use the same damage roll against the second foe. You can attack the second foe even if they would normally be 5 feet beyond the edge of your reach. Poppy’s Peerless Pierce counts as two attacks for the purpose of calculating your multiple attack penalty.

Yo Ho Ho and a Bottle of Rum!.name: 哟呵呵，再来一瓶朗姆酒！ Yo Ho Ho and a Bottle of Rum!
Yo Ho Ho and a Bottle of Rum!.description:
频率 每小时一次

你退后一步，猛灌一口酒精饮料，以克服困境并给自己来一剂液态勇气。你先用一次交互动作取出一份酒精饮料，然后再用一次交互动作喝下它；这不能是具有超出酒精基础效果之外额外效果的特殊炼金酒精。你在2轮内每等级获得3点临时生命值，并尝试进行一次反制检定，以对抗当前正在影响你的一个精神效果；以你的意志豁免调整值作为反制调整值，并以你等级的一半（向上取整）作为反制等级。若该反制检定未能移除该精神效果，你不能再用“哟嚯嚯，再来一瓶朗姆酒！”尝试移除它！你无需针对酒精进行豁免，并且你不会从其他要求你喝酒精、或在你喝酒精时发生的能力中获得任何其他特殊收益。

Frequency once per hour

You withdraw and swig a drink of alcohol in order to overcome a difficult situation and give yourself a dose of liquid courage. Interact to draw a drink of alcohol and then Interact again to drink it; this can’t be a special alchemical alcohol that has additional effects beyond the base effects of alcohol. You gain 3 temporary Hit Points per level for 2 rounds and attempt a counteract check against a mental effect currently affecting you, using your Will save modifier as the counteract modifier and half your level rounded up as the counteract level. If the counteract check doesn’t remove the mental effect, you can’t try to remove it again with Yo Ho Ho and a Bottle of Rum! You don’t have to attempt a saving throw against the alcohol, and you don’t gain any other special benefits from other abilities that require you to drink alcohol, or that occur when you drink alcohol.

Perfect Recovery.name: 完美复原 Perfect Recovery
Perfect Recovery.description:
你完美的治疗尤为迅速，只要你有足够的营养，便能在短短数日内再生身体的大部分组织。你可以在[[/br 1d4 #days]]{1d4 days}内再生一整条断肢或一个器官，不过在此期间，你必须摄入足够的额外食物以构成新的断肢或器官（通常每天需要相当于1周份量的食物，才能再生一整条肢体）。

Your perfect healing is especially quick, regrowing large parts of your body in mere days if you have enough sustenance. You can regrow an entire lost limb or organ in [[/br 1d4 #days]]{1d4 days}, though while you are doing so, you must consume enough additional food to constitute the new limb or organ (typically 1 week's worth of food each day to regrow an entire limb).

Silent Aura.name: 寂静灵光 Silent Aura
Silent Aura.description:
频率 每日1次

在你周围，鸟儿不再歌唱，昆虫不再鸣叫，甚至草叶也不再沙沙作响。你是世界之歌中的一片寂静。当你使用静默灵光时，你的寂静灵光以@Template[type:emanation|distance:15]延伸，并持续1分钟。它会使所有起源于该区域内或穿过该区域的声音失效。在灵光内，你与所有其他生物都无法被听见（因此也无法仅凭听觉被注意到），无法产生音波效果，也无法使用带有听觉（特征）的动作，包括言语施法。根据效果的位置，生物可能会注意到没有声音传到它那里（例如，阻断了从一群同伴处传来的噪音）。

Frequency once per day

Around you, birds do not sing, insects do not chirp, and even grass does not rustle. You are a silence in the song of the world. When you use Silent Aura, your aura of silence extends in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:15] and lasts for 1 minute. It deadens all sound originating in or passing through the area. Inside the aura, you and all other creatures can't be heard (and so can't be noticed by hearing alone), can't produce sonic effects, or use actions with the auditory trait, including verbal spellcasting. Depending upon the position of the effect, a creature might notice the lack of sound reaching it (blocking off the noise coming from a party, for example).

Sickening Toxin.name: 致病毒素 Sickening Toxin
Sickening Toxin.description:
每当你的毒素完全扩散至敌人体内时，便会令其作呕。若你以会施加 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.4ZDb3iddvdjckn00]{Exude Toxin} 的伤害的打击造成大成功，且目标受到酸或毒素伤害，则其陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}。若你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.7Jtrhy0d1lgKZvUc]{Sweat Toxin} 专长，则当其因受到酸或毒素伤害而出现大成功或大失败时，目标同样陷入 Sickened 1。若你以 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.NUHcJWnab2IrsCZx]{Persistent Toxin} 对敌人造成持续性伤害，则在该持续性伤害持续期间，敌人无法将其 Sickened 值降低至 1 以下。

Your toxin sickens your foe whenever it spreads fully through their system. On a critical hit with a Strike that applies the damage from @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.4ZDb3iddvdjckn00]{Exude Toxin}, if the target takes acid or poison damage, they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}. If you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.7Jtrhy0d1lgKZvUc]{Sweat Toxin} feat, the target is also sickened 1 on a critical failure if they take acid or poison damage. If you deal persistent damage to the foe with @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.NUHcJWnab2IrsCZx]{Persistent Toxin}, the foe can't reduce their sickened value below 1 while the persistent damage lasts.

Extra Grease.name: 额外油腻 Extra Grease
Extra Grease.description:
频率 每日一次

触发 你变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{被擒抱}

紧握使你的身体渗出额外的一点油脂。你不再处于被擒抱状态，然后踏步。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}

The tight grip causes your body to exude an extra bit of grease. You cease being grabbed, then Step.

Toxic Slime.name: 剧毒黏液怪 Toxic Slime
Toxic Slime.description:
大多数 xotlxotl 都有光滑、滑溜的皮肤（源自一层异常薄的黏液）。你的黏液层更厚、更黏稠，而且——最关键的是——有毒。你的徒手攻击在大成功时额外造成 1d4 持续性强酸伤害。

Most xotlxotl have smooth, slippery skin (the product of an exceptionally thin layer of slime). Yours is thicker, more viscous, and—most to the point—toxic. Your unarmed attacks deal an additional 1d4 persistent acid damage on a critical hit.

Unbelievable Leaper.name: 难以置信的跳跃者 Unbelievable Leaper
Unbelievable Leaper.description:
你强壮的双腿让你成为出色的跳跃者，使你能够跳得比其他班诺格所能跳到的距离远得多。当你通过 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump} 进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap} 时，你可以花费更多动作，使你能够跳得比你的速度更远：若花费两个动作，最多可跳至你速度的两倍；若花费三个动作，最多可跳至你速度的三倍；你仍需要在相应的运动检定中成功，才能跳出这些距离。当你进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{High Jump} 或 Long Jump 时，如果你没有先 Stride 至少10尺，你的检定不会自动失败。

Your powerful legs make you an excellent jumper, allowing you to leap a far greater distance than even other bannogs are capable of jumping. When you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap} via @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump}, you can spend more actions to allow you to Leap farther than your Speed, up to a maximum of double your Speed for two actions, or triple your Speed for three actions; you still need to succeed at the appropriate Athletics check to jump these distances. When you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{High Jump} or Long Jump, you don't automatically fail your check if you don't Stride at least 10 feet first.

Sugar Rush.name: 糖分冲刺 Sugar Rush
Sugar Rush.description:
你可以通过更频繁地吃香蕉来获得益处，而当糖分冲上头时，你也会移动得更快。你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.uYkTdBUysCp0Nge1]{Going Bananas} 的使用频率从每天一次改为每小时一次。只要你拥有来自 Going Bananas 的临时生命值，你的各项速度获得 +20 尺的状态加值。

You can gain benefits from eating bananas more often, and when the sugar rush goes to your head, you move faster too. You can use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.uYkTdBUysCp0Nge1]{Going Bananas} once per hour instead of once per day. You gain a +20-foot status bonus to your Speeds as long as you have temporary Hit Points from Going Bananas.

Xotlxotl Lore.name: 索特尔索特尔学识 Xotlxotl Lore
Xotlxotl Lore.description:
你知晓“化五为众者”和“寂静之声”，并学会了追求完美的使命之秘。你在神秘学和生存（技能）上变为受训。如果你会自动在这些技能之一上变为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能上变为受训。你也在索特尔索特尔学识（技能）上变为受训。

You know of the Five-who-became-Many and the Silent Voice and have learned the secrets of the quest for Perfection. You become trained in the Occultism and Survival skills. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also become trained in the Xotlxotl Lore skill.

Tusk Terror.name: 獠牙恐惧 Tusk Terror
Tusk Terror.description:
你对自己獠牙的精通使你能发动残暴的攻击，从而震慑你的敌人。当你以獠牙攻击造成大成功时，你会施加其重击专精效果。

Your skill with your tusks allows you to make brutal attacks that stun your foes. When you critically hit with your tusk attack, you apply its critical specialization effect.

Going Bananas.name: 香蕉失控 Going Bananas
Going Bananas.description:
频率 每天一次

需求 你持有至少一根香蕉

香蕉是你最喜欢的食物，你可以吃一根来为自己注入活力。你进行一次交互来吃一根香蕉以获得兴奋感，在 1 分钟内获得等于 3 加上你的等级的临时生命值。

Frequency once per day

Requirements You possess at least one banana

Bananas are your favorite food, and you can eat one to energize yourself. You Interact to eat a banana in order to get a high, gaining temporary Hit Points equal to 3 plus your level for 1 minute.

Orpok Welcome.name: 奥波克 欢迎 Orpok Welcome
Orpok Welcome.description:
你很容易与其他奥尔波克交朋友，而且在几乎每个奥尔波克居住的定居点，你都有奥尔波克人脉。在你于一个至少有一打奥尔波克活地公开居住的定居点中待了至少一天后，你在该定居点进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{收集信息} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.QyzlsLrqM0EEwd7j]{谋生} 时获得+1环境加值。

You make friends with other orpoks easily, and you have orpok connections in nearly every settlement where they reside. After you have spent at least one day in a settlement that has at least a dozen orpoks living openly there, you gain a +1 circumstance to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{Gather Information} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.QyzlsLrqM0EEwd7j]{Earn Income} in that settlement.

Vigilant Sentry.name: 警觉哨兵 Vigilant Sentry
Vigilant Sentry.description:
你在危险临近时向盟友示警，而你的警觉会提高他们的生存几率。当你使用「超凡警觉」时，你选择的30尺内任意生物，若正尝试对抗同一效果（例如同一个法术）的反射豁免，或正在为同一场遭遇掷先攻，则在其豁免或掷骰上获得+2环境加值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.VfhXOw6Qr1UGVz7Q]{效果：警戒哨兵}

You signal your allies when danger is near, and your vigilance improves their odds of survival. When you use Uncanny Vigilance, any creatures you choose within 30 feet that are attempting a Reflex saving throw against the same effect (such as a single spell) or are rolling initiative for the same encounter gain a +2 circumstance bonus on their save or roll.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-effects.Item.VfhXOw6Qr1UGVz7Q]{Effect: Vigilant Sentry}

Song's Sorcery.name: 歌之魔法 Song's Sorcery
Song's Sorcery.description:
你与伟大之歌的连接为你提供了一丝秘传魔法的线索，这种魔法由与伟大之歌本身相同类型的精神羁绊与文化昏迷锻造而成。从秘传法术列表中选择一个普通戏法，或从你拥有许可的秘传法术列表中选择另一个戏法。你可以随意将该戏法作为秘传先天法术施放。正常情况下，该戏法会被升阶至你等级的一半（向上取整）。

Your connection to the great song provides you a hint of occult magic forged of the same sort of spiritual bonds and cultural unconscious that make up the great song itself. Choose a common cantrip from the occult spell list, or another cantrip from the occult spell list to which you have access. You can cast this cantrip as an occult innate spell at will. As normal, the cantrip is heightened to half your level, rounded up.

Perpetual Awareness.name: 永续警觉 Perpetual Awareness
Perpetual Awareness.description:
你对其他感官的信赖不亚于甚至超过你锐利的双眼，因此你总能察觉到周围的移动，这些移动可能预示着对你或你的队列的危险。你获得动觉感官，作为一种模糊感官，范围为20英尺。动觉感官使你能够通过振动和空气的移动来侦测移动。如同所有特殊感官的常规规则，知道你拥有动觉感官的生物可以采取预防措施来应对它。

Trusting your other senses as much or more than your sharp eyes, you are always aware of movement around you that might manifest as danger to you or your column. You gain motion sense as an imprecise sense out to 20 feet. Motion sense allows you to detect motion through vibration and air movement. As normal for all special senses, creatures who know you have motion sense can take precautions against it.

Stubborn Demeanor.name: 顽固举止 Stubborn Demeanor
Stubborn Demeanor.description:
即使面对明显的危险，你也拒绝退缩。你在对抗恐惧效果的豁免检定上获得+1环境加值，并且在对抗威吓（技能）动作（例如试图对你施展@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize}）时，你的意志DC获得+2环境加值。

You refuse to back down, even when faced with obvious danger. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against fear effects and a +2 circumstance bonus to your Will DC against Intimidation skill actions, such as attempts to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} you.

Show of Force.name: 力场展示 Show of Force
Show of Force.description:
频率 每分钟一次

你通过砸开某物来展示你的力量。你 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{力场打开} 一个开口或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞} 一个生物，然后你 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{威吓} 一个生物。你在没有撬棍的情况下对力场打开该开口不会承受减值，并且你在不共享语言的情况下对威吓不会承受减值。

Frequency once per minute

You demonstrate your might by smashing something open. You @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{Force Open} an opening or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} a creature, and then you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} a creature. You don’t take a penalty to Force Open the opening for not having a crowbar, and you don’t take a penalty to Demoralize for not sharing a language.

Wandering Waves.name: 漫游波涛 Wandering Waves
Wandering Waves.description:
频率 每日一次

触发 60英尺内的一名生物进行游泳。

你操纵触发生物对水的感知，制造魅影（特征）波浪并将其引入歧途。触发生物必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] 意志豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者，具有以下效果。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 波浪似乎与该生物采取的任何移动相对抗。该生物在其游泳动作期间将所有方格视为困难地形。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但你决定目标在游泳期间移动到哪里，不过你不能将其移入有害地形或类似的危险位置。

Frequency once per day

Trigger A creature within 60 feet Swims.

You manipulate the triggering creature’s perceptions of the water, creating phantom waves and leading them astray. The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC, with the following effects.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The waves seem to be against any move the creature takes. The creature treats all squares as difficult terrain during its Swim action.

Critical Failure As failure, except that you determine where the target moves during the Swim, though you can’t move it into hazardous terrain or a similar dangerous location.

Protective Squirt.name: 防护喷射 Protective Squirt
Protective Squirt.description:
你已经学会如何用你有毒的汗液来保护你的盟友，并保护自己免受远程攻击。除其正常触发外，当一名距离你15英尺内的敌人用一次攻击（无论是否为近战攻击）击中你或距离你15英尺内的一名盟友时，你也可以使用你的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.7Jtrhy0d1lgKZvUc]{Sweat Toxin} 反应动作（）。

You've learned how to use your poisonous sweat to protect your allies, as well as to protect yourself from ranged attacks. You can use your @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.7Jtrhy0d1lgKZvUc]{Sweat Toxin} reaction if a foe within 15 feet of you hits you or an ally within 15 feet of you with an attack (whether or not it's a melee attack), in addition to its normal trigger.

Kragrak Roll.name: 克拉格拉克 掷骰 Kragrak Roll
Kragrak Roll.description:
你可以蜷缩成一块岩石或一团大地并沿着斜坡向下滚动。你蜷成一团，并沿斜坡向下沿直线移动，最多可达你速度的四倍。如果你在这第一个移动回合中到达斜坡底部或撞上障碍物，你会安全地停止滚动。否则，你会在后续回合中以此速度自动持续滚动，直到你撞到斜坡底部或某个障碍物结束这次移动（这可能发生在你回合的中途）。在第一个回合之后你仍在持续滚动的每个回合中，你都处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2}状态；并且如果你在第一个回合之后的某个回合中撞上障碍物，你和该障碍物都会受到@Damage[4d6[bludgeoning]]伤害，并且你会停止滚动。

You can curl up into a rock or clump of earth and roll down an incline. You roll up into a ball and move up to four times your Speed in a straight line down an incline. If you reach the bottom of the incline or hit an obstacle during this first turn of movement, you stop rolling safely. Otherwise, you automatically keep rolling at this Speed during subsequent turns until you hit the bottom of the incline or an obstacle ends this movement (which can happen in the middle of your turn). You’re @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} during each turn after the first that you keep rolling, and if you hit an obstacle on a turn after the first, you and the obstacle both take @Damage[4d6[bludgeoning]] damage and you stop rolling.

Rock and Roll.name: 摇滚 Rock and Roll
Rock and Roll.description:
当你施展克拉格拉克翻滚时，你是不可阻挡的攻城巨兽，碾平路径上的一切。若你在任何回合（包括第一回合）撞上障碍物，该障碍物受到 @Damage[6d6[钝击]] 伤害，而你安然无恙。若这足以摧毁该障碍物，你可以选择停下或继续翻滚。若你撞上一名生物，你可以尝试从其身上滚过去。尝试一次运动检定，对该生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{绊摔}，并同时造成伤害；若成功，你可以选择停下或继续翻滚，而若你继续翻滚，你可以穿过该生物的空间。在你完成结算克拉格拉克翻滚的全部移动之前，你不会因任何此类绊摔尝试而承受多重攻击减值。

When you perform a Kragrak Roll, you are an unstoppable juggernaut, flattening all in your path. If you hit an obstacle on any turn, including the first, the obstacle takes @Damage[6d6[bludgeoning]] damage and you are unharmed. If this is enough to break the obstacle, you can choose to stop or keep rolling. If you hit a creature, you can try to roll over them. Attempt an Athletics check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} that creature, in addition to dealing damage; on a success, you can choose to stop or keep rolling, and if you keep rolling, you can move through the creature’s space. You don’t apply the multiple attack penalty from any such Trip attempts until after you finish resolving the full movement from Kragrak Roll.

Soaring Heart.name: 翱翔之心 Soaring Heart
Soaring Heart.description:
你与歌翼之间的联系已变得如此强大，以至于它们已然成为你的一部分。你从“歌之飞行”中获得的翅膀将持续无限的持续时间，除非你希望将其解消。若你这么做，你每天可以随心所欲地用一次交互动作将其恢复。

Your connection to your song wings has grown so strong that they have simply become a part of you. The wings you gain from Song’s Flight last for an unlimited duration, unless you wish to Dismiss them. If you do, you can restore them with a single Interact action as many times per day as you wish.

Mutagenic Shriek.name: 诱变尖啸 Mutagenic Shriek
Mutagenic Shriek.description:
频率 每天一次

你发出一声颤音般的战嚎，使盟友的血肉都发生变化。你与30尺内的所有盟友，都会受到影响，如同他们刚刚使用了你的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.EAXIUqKqlBx1pGOk]{突发突变} 专长一般，获得所选诱变剂的增益与减益效果。若你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.xxqkRimWhd4szjTJ]{强效突变} 专长，他们将改为获得该诱变剂的第11等级版本的增益与减益效果，但你的盟友的持续时间仍只有1分钟，而你获得完整的持续时间。

Frequency once per day

You let out a warbling cry that makes the very flesh of your allies change. You and all allies within 30 feet are affected as if they had just used your @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.EAXIUqKqlBx1pGOk]{Sudden Mutation} feat, gaining the benefits and drawbacks of the selected mutagen. If you possess the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.xxqkRimWhd4szjTJ]{Greater Mutation} feat, they benefit from the 11th-level version of the mutagen's benefits and drawbacks, but the duration for your allies is still just 1 minute, while you gain the full duration.

Visionary Toxin.name: 幻视毒素 Visionary Toxin
Visionary Toxin.description:
你的梦境薄膜滴落着最深层梦魇的浓缩精华，变得前所未有地更加强大且致命。当你使用 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.F3KQBROagKZ93FV5]{Manifest Membrane} 时，你改为创造深邃梦境薄膜毒素。

此外，Manifest Membrane 的频率变为每小时一次，而非每日一次。最后，如果你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.igjftlvKSgXRyuam]{Plentiful Toxin} 专长，Manifest Membrane 的频率改为每10分钟一次。

深邃梦境薄膜（死亡、惑控、无能、伤害、秘法、毒素）

豁免 @Check[type:will|dc:resolve(@actor.system.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)|traits:death,enchantment,incapacitation,injury,occult, poison|overrideTraits:true]

最大持续时间 10分钟

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}（1轮）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}（1轮）

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}（1轮）

阶段 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷}（10分钟）

阶段 5 死亡

Your dream membrane drips with the concentrated essence of the deepest nightmares, becoming drastically more potent and deadly than ever before. When you use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.F3KQBROagKZ93FV5]{Manifest Membrane}, you instead create the deep dream membrane poison.

Additionally, the frequency of Manifest Membrane becomes once per hour, instead of once per day. Finally, if you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.igjftlvKSgXRyuam]{Plentiful Toxin} feat, the frequency of Manifest Membrane instead becomes once per 10 minutes.

Deep Dream Membrane (death, enchantment, incapacitation, injury, occult, poison)

Saving Throw @Check[type:will|dc:resolve(@actor.system.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)|traits:death,enchantment,incapacitation,injury,occult, poison|overrideTraits:true]

Maximum Duration 10 minutes

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (1 round)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 round)

Stage 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} (10 minutes)

Stage 5 dead

Bannog Lore.name: 班诺格学识 Bannog Lore
Bannog Lore.description:
你精通自己族群的历史，也了解你和其他班诺格在清醒与梦境生活中栖居的奇异之地与异界领域。你获得神秘技能的受训（熟练度）等级。若你本会自动在神秘技能上成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能上成为受训。你还会在班诺格学识、梦境界学识与心灵景域学识上成为受训。

You're well-versed in the history of your people, and you understand the strange places and otherworldly realms where you and other bannogs live your waking and dreaming lives. You gain the trained proficiency rank in the Occultism skill. If you would automatically become trained in the Occultism skill (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also become trained in Bannog Lore, Dreamlands Lore, and Mindscapes Lore.

Vanish.name: 消失 Vanish
Vanish.description:
触发 一名敌人以一次打击选择你为目标，你察觉到该打击，且你能看见攻击者。

在该打击结算前，你变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}，迫使敌人尝试常规的 @Check[type:flat|dc:11] 以将你作为目标。该打击后，你横移 10 尺。该隐形持续至你使用一次敌对动作或你的下个回合结束，以先发生者为准。

Trigger A foe targets you with a Strike, you’re aware of the Strike, and you can see the attacker.

You become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} before the Strike resolves, forcing the enemy to attempt the regular @Check[type:flat|dc:11] to target you. After the Strike you Step 10 feet. The invisibility lasts until you use a hostile action or the end of your next turn, whichever happens first.

Serial Liar.name: 连环骗子 Serial Liar
Serial Liar.description:
你擅长将多个谎言与真相交织在一起。每小时一次，当你说谎时，你可以组合至多五条彼此独立的陈述，其中至少一条必须为假。你针对所有这些陈述仅进行一次欺瞒检定，其 DC 基于它们合在一起的不可信程度。

大成功或大失败 目标相信你说的都是真话，并被你连珠炮般的陈述压得喘不过气；在你们交谈的持续时间内，目标在对抗你的欺瞒、交涉与威吓检定时，其察觉与意志 DC 承受 –1 环境减值。

成功 目标相信你说的都是真话，并短暂地被扰乱；在当前交谈期间，目标在对抗你下一次欺瞒、交涉或威吓检定时，其察觉与意志 DC 承受 –1 环境减值。

失败 目标认为你夸大了事实，但不确定你哪些陈述（如果有的话）完全是假的；在你们交谈的持续时间内，目标在对抗你试图说谎的行动时获得 +4 环境加值。

大成功或大失败 目标不相信你的任何陈述，即使是那些真实的也不信；在你们交谈的持续时间内，目标在对抗你试图说谎的行动时获得 +4 环境加值。目标在未来也更可能对你心存怀疑。

You are adept at weaving multiple lies together alongside truths. Once per hour, when you Lie, you can combine up to five separate claims, of which at least one must be false. You roll a single Deception check for all the claims based on their combined implausibility.

Critical Success The target believes you are telling the truth and is so overwhelmed by your barrage of claims that they take a –1 circumstance penalty to their Perception and Will DCs against your Deception, Diplomacy, and Intimidation checks for the duration of your conversation.

Success The target believes you are telling the truth and is thrown off temporarily. They take a –1 circumstance penalty to their Perception and Will DCs against your next Deception, Diplomacy, or Intimidation check during your current conversation.

Failure The target thinks you stretched the truth but isn't sure which, if any, of your claims are completely false. The target gains a +4 circumstance bonus against your attempts to Lie for the duration of your conversation.

Critical Failure The target doesn't believe any of your claims, even the ones that are true, and gains a +4 circumstance bonus against your attempts to Lie for the duration of your conversation. The target is also much more likely to be suspicious of you in the future.

Uncanny Vigilance.name: 不可思议的警觉 Uncanny Vigilance
Uncanny Vigilance.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 你尝试一次反射豁免或你为先攻掷骰，但你尚未掷骰。

你持久的警觉（或者也许是偏执）让你保持安全，并使你能够毫不犹豫地对危险作出反应。为先攻掷骰或对触发的豁免掷骰两次，并使用较好的结果。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You attempt a Reflex save or you roll for initiative, but you haven't rolled yet.

Your persistent vigilance (or perhaps paranoia) keeps you safe and enables you to react to danger without hesitation. Roll initiative or the triggering save twice and use the better result.

Sprite Weapon Mischief.name: 小妖精（特征）武器恶作剧 Sprite Weapon Mischief
Sprite Weapon Mischief.description:
你知道如何使用传统的小妖精（特征）武器来对其他生物进行恶作剧和捣乱。每当你使用小妖精（特征）武器或“小妖精（特征）武器熟悉”中列出的一种武器造成大成功或大失败命中时，你会应用该武器的大成功或大失败专精效果。

You know how to perform pranks and make mischief on other creatures using traditional sprite weapons. Whenever you critically hit using a sprite weapon or one of the weapons listed in Sprite Weapon Familiarity, you apply the weapon’s critical specialization effect.

Wayward Wanderer.name: 误途漫游者 Wayward Wanderer
Wayward Wanderer.description:
你能比其他 chochori 更稳定地感知你周围的涟漪与波动，让你更常将你的敌人引入歧途。你可以每 10 分钟使用一次 Wandering Waves，而不是每天一次。

You can feel the ripples and waves around you much more consistently than other chochori, allowing you to lead your foes astray more often. You can use Wandering Waves once per 10 minutes, instead of once per day.

Greater Mutation.name: 强效突变 Greater Mutation
Greater Mutation.description:
你的即兴突变极其强大——当你使用 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.EAXIUqKqlBx1pGOk]{突然突变} 时，它具有该诱变剂第11等级版本的增益、缺陷和持续时间。

Your impromptu mutation is incredibly potent—when you use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-feats.Item.EAXIUqKqlBx1pGOk]{Sudden Mutation}, it has the benefits, drawbacks, and duration of the 11th-level version of the mutagen.

Soaring Flight.name: 翱翔飞行 Soaring Flight
Soaring Flight.description:
你始终获得“僵硬之翼”的效果，而非仅每天一次持续10分钟。

You gain the effects of Stiffened Wings at all times, rather than just once per day for 10 minutes.

Rock Form.name: 岩石形态 Rock Form
Rock Form.description:
你变形为一个中型岩石，将自己伪装起来不被他人识破。察觉检定不会揭露你的真实本质，但一次成功的 @Check[type:nature|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] 或 @Check[type:survival|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] 检定，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者，会揭示你看起来像是一块不符合该区域的奇怪岩石，并且与附近任何类似的岩石都不相似。当处于岩石形态时，你可以观察周围的一切，但你无法采取除结束该效果以及在你的回合中使用单动作之外的任何动作；该单动作具有专注（特征）。作为岩石时，你的AC为20，且只有状态加值、状态减值、环境加值与环境减值会影响你。你在岩石形态下进行反射豁免时掷出的任何成功与大成功都视为失败。

You transform into a Medium-sized rock, disguising yourself from others. Perception checks don’t reveal your true nature, but a successful @Check[type:nature|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] or @Check[type:survival|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] check against the higher of your class DC or spell DC reveals that you appear to be a strange rock that doesn’t fit the area, and dissimilar from any similar nearby rock. While in rock form, you can observe everything around you, but you can’t act other than to end the effect, and your turn, by using a single action, which has the concentrate trait. As a rock, your AC is 20, and only status bonuses, status penalties, circumstance bonuses, and circumstance penalties affect you. Any successes and critical successes you roll on Reflex saves while you’re in rock form are failures.

Stomp.name: 跺击 Stomp
Stomp.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你的步伐沉重，你能重踏到让地面开裂并隆起。你在以你空间的一个角为中心的 @Template[type:burst|distance:5] 内创造困难地形。若你为大型，该区域增大为 @Template[type:burst|distance:10]；若你为巨型或超巨型，该区域增大为 @Template[type:burst|distance:15]。

 

Frequency once every 10 minutes

Your tread is heavy, and you can stomp so hard that the ground cracks and buckles. You create difficult terrain in a @Template[type:burst|distance:5] centered on one corner of your space. If you’re Large, the area increases to a @Template[type:burst|distance:10], and if you’re Huge or Gargantuan, the area increases to a @Template[type:burst|distance:15].

Violent Comeback.name: 暴烈回击 Violent Comeback
Violent Comeback.description:
当对手在身体上压制你时，你会以突然而强烈的愤怒爆发作为回应，并立刻在心智中涌起对这份侮辱的复仇念头。若一个与你同等体型或更大的敌人将你击倒至@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，该敌人对你而言在1轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。若一个敌人将你的生命值降至0，该敌人在你恢复意识后的1轮内对你而言处于off-guard。

You respond with a sudden and powerful flare of fury when an opponent overwhelms you physically and revenge comes quickly to mind for this indignity. If a foe your size or larger knocks you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}, that foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} to you for 1 round. If a foe reduces you to 0 Hit Points, that foe is off-guard to you for 1 round after you regain consciousness.
